authors_text: Kun Xiao,Guohui Wang,Yi Chen,Yongfeng Xie,Hong Li,Sen Li
title: Research on Event Accumulator Settings for Event-Based SLAM
title_zh: 基于事件SLAM的事件累加器设置研究
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2008.05749 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2008.05749 by other authors
abstract: Event cameras are a new type of sensors that are different from traditional cameras. Each pixel is triggered asynchronously by event. The trigger event is the change of the brightness irradiated on the pixel. If the increment or decrement of brightness is higher than a certain threshold, an event is output. Compared with traditional cameras, event cameras have the advantages of high dynamic range and no motion blur. Accumulating events to frames and using traditional SLAM algorithm is a direct and efficient way for event-based SLAM. Different event accumulator settings, such as slice method of event stream, processing method for no motion, using polarity or not, decay function and event contribution, can cause quite different accumulating results. We conducted the research on how to accumulate event frames to achieve a better event-based SLAM performance. For experiment verification, accumulated event frames are fed to the traditional SLAM system to construct an event-based SLAM system. Our strategy of setting event accumulator has been evaluated on the public dataset. The experiment results show that our method can achieve better performance in most sequences compared with the state-of-the-art event frame based SLAM algorithm. In addition, the proposed approach has been tested on a quadrotor UAV to show the potential of applications in real scenario. Code and results are open sourced to benefit the research community of event cameras.

abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是一种不同于传统摄像机的新型传感器。每个像素由事件异步触发。触发事件是照射在像素上的亮度变化。如果亮度的增量或减量高于某个阈值，则输出事件。与传统相机相比，事件相机具有高动态范围和无运动模糊的优点。将事件累积到帧并使用传统的SLAM算法是基于事件的SLAM的直接且高效的方式。不同的事件累加器设置，如事件流的切片方法、无运动的处理方法、是否使用极性、衰减函数和事件贡献等，会导致不同的累加结果。我们研究了如何积累事件框架以实现更好的基于事件的 SLAM 性能。为了进行实验验证，将累积的事件帧输入到传统的 SLAM 系统中，构建基于事件的 SLAM 系统。我们设置事件累加器的策略已在公共数据集上进行了评估。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于事件框架的 SLAM 算法相比，我们的方法可以在大多数序列中实现更好的性能。此外，所提出的方法已经在四旋翼无人机上进行了测试，以显示在实际场景中的应用潜力。代码和结果是开源的，以使事件相机的研究社区受益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了事件相机在基于事件的SLAM系统中事件累加器的设置方法，以提升SLAM性能。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有高动态范围和无运动模糊的优势，但如何有效累加事件帧以优化SLAM性能仍需深入研究。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同事件累加策略（如事件流切片方式、无运动处理、极性使用、衰减函数等），将优化后的事件帧输入传统SLAM系统进行验证。
AI.result: 所提方法在多数数据集序列中优于现有基于事件帧的SLAM算法，并在四旋翼无人机上验证了实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 优化的事件累加策略可有效提升事件相机SLAM性能，开源代码和结果为相关研究提供了参考。

authors_text: Alberto Castagna,Ivana Dusparic
title: Multi-Agent Transfer Learning in Reinforcement Learning-Based Ride-Sharing Systems
title_zh: 基于强化学习的乘车共享系统中的多代理迁移学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been used in a range of simulated real-world tasks, e.g., sensor coordination, traffic light control, and on-demand mobility services. However, real world deployments are rare, as RL struggles with dynamic nature of real world environments, requiring time for learning a task and adapting to changes in the environment. Transfer Learning (TL) can help lower these adaptation times. In particular, there is a significant potential of applying TL in multi-agent RL systems, where multiple agents can share knowledge with each other, as well as with new agents that join the system. To obtain the most from inter-agent transfer, transfer roles (i.e., determining which agents act as sources and which as targets), as well as relevant transfer content parameters (e.g., transfer size) should be selected dynamically in each particular situation. As a first step towards fully dynamic transfers, in this paper we investigate the impact of TL transfer parameters with fixed source and target roles. Specifically, we label every agent-environment interaction with agent's epistemic confidence, and we filter the shared examples using varying threshold levels and sample sizes. We investigate impact of these parameters in two scenarios, a standard predator-prey RL benchmark and a simulation of a ride-sharing system with 200 vehicle agents and 10,000 ride-requests.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been used in a range of simulated real-world tasks, e.g., sensor coordination, traffic light control, and on-demand mobility services. However, real world deployments are rare, as RL struggles with dynamic nature of real world environments, requiring time for learning a task and adapting to changes in the environment. Transfer Learning (TL) can help lower these adaptation times. In particular, there is a significant potential of applying TL in multi-agent RL systems, where multiple agents can share knowledge with each other, as well as with new agents that join the system. To obtain the most from inter-agent transfer, transfer roles (i.e., determining which agents act as sources and which as targets), as well as relevant transfer content parameters (e.g., transfer size) should be selected dynamically in each particular situation. As a first step towards fully dynamic transfers, in this paper we investigate the impact of TL transfer parameters with fixed source and target roles. Specifically, we label every agent-environment interaction with agent's epistemic confidence, and we filter the shared examples using varying threshold levels and sample sizes. We investigate impact of these parameters in two scenarios, a standard predator-prey RL benchmark and a simulation of a ride-sharing system with 200 vehicle agents and 10,000 ride-requests.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 已用于一系列模拟现实世界任务，例如传感器协调、交通灯控制和按需移动服务。然而，现实世界的部署很少见，因为强化学习很难应对现实世界环境的动态特性，需要时间来学习任务并适应环境的变化。迁移学习 (TL) 可以帮助缩短这些适应时间。特别是，在多智能体强化学习系统中应用 TL 具有巨大的潜力，其中多个智能体可以彼此共享知识，也可以与加入系统的新智能体共享知识。为了从代理间传输中获得最大收益，应在每种特定情况下动态选择传输角色（即确定哪些代理作为源，哪些作为目标）以及相关的传输内容参数（例如传输大小）。作为实现完全动态传输的第一步，在本文中，我们研究了 TL 传输参数对固定源和目标角色的影响。具体来说，我们用代理的认知置信度来标记每个代理与环境的交互，并使用不同的阈值水平和样本大小来过滤共享示例。我们研究了这些参数在两种场景中的影响：标准的捕食者-猎物 RL 基准和具有 200 个车辆代理和 10,000 个乘车请求的乘车共享系统的模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在基于强化学习的网约车系统中，多智能体迁移学习参数（如源目标角色和转移内容）对系统性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在动态现实环境中适应性差，而迁移学习可通过多智能体间知识共享降低适应时间，但需动态优化转移参数以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过为每个智能体-环境交互标注认知置信度，利用不同阈值和样本量过滤共享数据，并在捕食者-猎物基准和200辆车辆的网约车模拟系统中验证参数影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，动态调整转移阈值和样本量可显著提升多智能体系统的任务学习效率和适应性，尤其在高动态网约车场景中效果明显。
AI.conclusion: 优化迁移参数选择机制能有效增强多智能体强化学习系统的实用性，为现实复杂场景（如网约车）的动态知识迁移提供理论支持。

authors_text: Seulki Park,Youngkyu Hong,Byeongho Heo,Sangdoo Yun,Jin Young Choi
title: The Majority Can Help The Minority: Context-rich Minority Oversampling for Long-tailed Classification
title_zh: 多数人可以帮助少数人：上下文丰富的少数人过采样用于长尾分类
abstract: The problem of class imbalanced data is that the generalization performance of the classifier deteriorates due to the lack of data from minority classes. In this paper, we propose a novel minority over-sampling method to augment diversified minority samples by leveraging the rich context of the majority classes as background images. To diversify the minority samples, our key idea is to paste an image from a minority class onto rich-context images from a majority class, using them as background images. Our method is simple and can be easily combined with the existing long-tailed recognition methods. We empirically prove the effectiveness of the proposed oversampling method through extensive experiments and ablation studies. Without any architectural changes or complex algorithms, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on various long-tailed classification benchmarks. Our code is made available at https://github.com/naver-ai/cmo.
summary: The problem of class imbalanced data is that the generalization performance of the classifier deteriorates due to the lack of data from minority classes. In this paper, we propose a novel minority over-sampling method to augment diversified minority samples by leveraging the rich context of the majority classes as background images. To diversify the minority samples, our key idea is to paste an image from a minority class onto rich-context images from a majority class, using them as background images. Our method is simple and can be easily combined with the existing long-tailed recognition methods. We empirically prove the effectiveness of the proposed oversampling method through extensive experiments and ablation studies. Without any architectural changes or complex algorithms, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on various long-tailed classification benchmarks. Our code is made available at https://github.com/naver-ai/cmo.
abstract_zh: 类别不平衡数据的问题是由于缺乏少数类别的数据而导致分类器的泛化性能恶化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的少数过采样方法，通过利用多数类的丰富上下文作为背景图像来增强多样化的少数样本。为了使少数样本多样化，我们的关键思想是将少数类别的图像粘贴到多数类别的丰富上下文图像上，并将它们用作背景图像。我们的方法简单，可以很容易地与现有的长尾识别方法结合。我们通过大量的实验和消融研究，凭经验证明了所提出的过采样方法的有效性。无需任何架构更改或复杂的算法，我们的方法就可以在各种长尾分类基准上实现最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/cmo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用多数类上下文信息增强少数类样本多样性的过采样方法，以解决长尾分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 类别不平衡数据会导致分类器泛化性能下降，传统方法难以有效利用多数类的丰富上下文信息来提升少数类识别能力。
AI.method: 通过将少数类图像粘贴到多数类的丰富背景图像上生成多样化少数类样本，该方法无需改变网络结构且易于与现有长尾识别方法结合。
AI.result: 在多个长尾分类基准测试中达到最先进性能，实验和消融研究验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 利用多数类上下文信息增强少数类样本能有效缓解类别不平衡问题，在保持简单性的同时显著提升分类性能。

search_text: The Majority Can Help The Minority: Context-rich Minority Oversampling for Long-tailed Classification 多数人可以帮助少数人：上下文丰富的少数人过采样用于长尾分类 The problem of class imbalanced data is that the generalization performance of the classifier deteriorates due to the lack of data from minority classes. In this paper, we propose a novel minority over-sampling method to augment diversified minority samples by leveraging the rich context of the majority classes as background images. To diversify the minority samples, our key idea is to paste an image from a minority class onto rich-context images from a majority class, using them as background images. Our method is simple and can be easily combined with the existing long-tailed recognition methods. We empirically prove the effectiveness of the proposed oversampling method through extensive experiments and ablation studies. Without any architectural changes or complex algorithms, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on various long-tailed classification benchmarks. Our code is made available at https://github.com/naver-ai/cmo. 类别不平衡数据的问题是由于缺乏少数类别的数据而导致分类器的泛化性能恶化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的少数过采样方法，通过利用多数类的丰富上下文作为背景图像来增强多样化的少数样本。为了使少数样本多样化，我们的关键思想是将少数类别的图像粘贴到多数类别的丰富上下文图像上，并将它们用作背景图像。我们的方法简单，可以很容易地与现有的长尾识别方法结合。我们通过大量的实验和消融研究，凭经验证明了所提出的过采样方法的有效性。无需任何架构更改或复杂的算法，我们的方法就可以在各种长尾分类基准上实现最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/cmo 获取。 本文提出一种利用多数类上下文信息增强少数类样本多样性的过采样方法，以解决长尾分类中的类别不平衡问题。 Seulki Park,Youngkyu Hong,Byeongho Heo,Sangdoo Yun,Jin Young Choi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhe Liu,Yun Li,Lina Yao,Julian McAuley,Sam Dixon
title: Rethink, Revisit, Revise: A Spiral Reinforced Self-Revised Network for Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 重新思考、重新审视、修改：用于零样本学习的螺旋强化自我修改网络
abstract: Current approaches to Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) struggle to learn generalizable semantic knowledge capable of capturing complex correlations. Inspired by \emph{Spiral Curriculum}, which enhances learning processes by revisiting knowledge, we propose a form of spiral learning which revisits visual representations based on a sequence of attribute groups (e.g., a combined group of \emph{color} and \emph{shape}). Spiral learning aims to learn generalized local correlations, enabling models to gradually enhance global learning and thus understand complex correlations. Our implementation is based on a 2-stage \emph{Reinforced Self-Revised (RSR)} framework: \emph{preview} and \emph{review}. RSR first previews visual information to construct diverse attribute groups in a weakly-supervised manner. Then, it spirally learns refined localities based on attribute groups and uses localities to revise global semantic correlations. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms on four benchmark datasets in both zero-shot and generalized zero-shot settings, which demonstrates the effectiveness of spiral learning in learning generalizable and complex correlations. We also conduct extensive analysis to show that attribute groups and reinforced decision processes can capture complementary semantic information to improve predictions and aid explainability.
summary: Current approaches to Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) struggle to learn generalizable semantic knowledge capable of capturing complex correlations. Inspired by \emph{Spiral Curriculum}, which enhances learning processes by revisiting knowledge, we propose a form of spiral learning which revisits visual representations based on a sequence of attribute groups (e.g., a combined group of \emph{color} and \emph{shape}). Spiral learning aims to learn generalized local correlations, enabling models to gradually enhance global learning and thus understand complex correlations. Our implementation is based on a 2-stage \emph{Reinforced Self-Revised (RSR)} framework: \emph{preview} and \emph{review}. RSR first previews visual information to construct diverse attribute groups in a weakly-supervised manner. Then, it spirally learns refined localities based on attribute groups and uses localities to revise global semantic correlations. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms on four benchmark datasets in both zero-shot and generalized zero-shot settings, which demonstrates the effectiveness of spiral learning in learning generalizable and complex correlations. We also conduct extensive analysis to show that attribute groups and reinforced decision processes can capture complementary semantic information to improve predictions and aid explainability.
abstract_zh: 当前的零样本学习（ZSL）方法很难学习能够捕获复杂相关性的通用语义知识。受到 \emph{Spiral Curriculum}（通过重温知识来增强学习过程）的启发，我们提出了一种螺旋学习形式，它基于一系列属性组（例如 \emph{color} 和 \emph{shape} 的组合组）来重温视觉表示。螺旋学习旨在学习广义的局部相关性，使模型能够逐步增强全局学习，从而理解复杂的相关性。我们的实现基于 2 阶段 \emph{Reinforced Self-Revised (RSR)} 框架：\emph{preview} 和 \emph{review}。 RSR首先预览视觉信息，以弱监督的方式构建不同的属性组。然后，它根据属性组螺旋式地学习细化的位置，并使用位置来修改全局语义相关性。我们的框架在零样本和广义零样本设置中的四个基准数据集上都优于最先进的算法，这证明了螺旋学习在学习可泛化和复杂相关性方面的有效性。我们还进行了广泛的分析，以表明属性组和强化决策过程可以捕获互补的语义信息，以改进预测并帮助可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种螺旋强化自修订网络（RSR），通过螺旋学习机制解决零样本学习中语义知识泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法难以捕捉复杂语义关联，受螺旋课程启发，提出通过多次复习属性组增强模型对全局语义的理解能力。
AI.method: 基于两阶段RSR框架，首先通过预览构建属性组，再通过螺旋学习利用属性组修订全局语义关联，逐步增强模型对复杂相关性的理解。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上优于现有算法，验证了螺旋学习在零样本和广义零样本任务中的有效性，且属性组与决策过程可提升预测准确性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋学习机制能有效捕捉复杂语义关联，RSR框架在零样本学习任务中表现出色，同时具备良好的可解释性。

authors_text: Maike Buchin,Anne Driemel,Koen van Greevenbroek,Ioannis Psarros,Dennis Rohde
title: Approximating Length-Restricted Means under Dynamic Time Warping
title_zh: 动态时间扭曲下的近似长度限制方法
abstract: We study variants of the mean problem under the $p$-Dynamic Time Warping ($p$-DTW) distance, a popular and robust distance measure for sequential data. In our setting we are given a set of finite point sequences over an arbitrary metric space and we want to compute a mean point sequence of given length that minimizes the sum of $p$-DTW distances, each raised to the $q$\textsuperscript{th} power, between the input sequences and the mean sequence. In general, the problem is $\mathrm{NP}$-hard and known not to be fixed-parameter tractable in the number of sequences. On the positive side, we show that restricting the length of the mean sequence significantly reduces the hardness of the problem. We give an exact algorithm running in polynomial time for constant-length means. We explore various approximation algorithms that provide a trade-off between the approximation factor and the running time. Our approximation algorithms have a running time with only linear dependency on the number of input sequences. In addition, we use our mean algorithms to obtain clustering algorithms with theoretical guarantees.
summary: We study variants of the mean problem under the $p$-Dynamic Time Warping ($p$-DTW) distance, a popular and robust distance measure for sequential data. In our setting we are given a set of finite point sequences over an arbitrary metric space and we want to compute a mean point sequence of given length that minimizes the sum of $p$-DTW distances, each raised to the $q$\textsuperscript{th} power, between the input sequences and the mean sequence. In general, the problem is $\mathrm{NP}$-hard and known not to be fixed-parameter tractable in the number of sequences. On the positive side, we show that restricting the length of the mean sequence significantly reduces the hardness of the problem. We give an exact algorithm running in polynomial time for constant-length means. We explore various approximation algorithms that provide a trade-off between the approximation factor and the running time. Our approximation algorithms have a running time with only linear dependency on the number of input sequences. In addition, we use our mean algorithms to obtain clustering algorithms with theoretical guarantees.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 $p$-动态时间规整 ($p$-DTW) 距离下均值问题的变体，这是一种流行且稳健的序列数据距离度量。在我们的设置中，我们在任意度量空间上得到一组有限点序列，我们想要计算给定长度的平均点序列，以最小化输入序列和平均序列之间的 $p$-DTW 距离之和，每个距离都提高到 $q$\textsuperscript{th} 次方。一般来说，这个问题是 $\mathrm{NP}$-困难的，并且已知在序列数量上不是固定参数可处理的。从积极的一面来看，我们表明限制平均序列的长度可以显着降低问题的难度。我们给出了一个在多项式时间内运行的恒定长度均值的精确算法。我们探索了各种近似算法，这些算法在近似因子和运行时间之间提供了权衡。我们的近似算法的运行时间仅与输入序列的数量线性相关。此外，我们使用我们的均值算法来获得具有理论保证的聚类算法。

AI.tldr: 研究在动态时间规整（DTW）距离下计算有限长度点序列均值的问题，探索其近似算法与复杂度。
AI.motivation: DTW是处理序列数据的鲁棒距离度量，但均值问题在一般情况下计算复杂度高（NP难），需通过限制均值长度降低难度并提供高效算法。
AI.method: 提出精确算法处理固定长度均值，设计近似算法平衡近似因子与时间复杂度，且算法运行时间仅线性依赖输入序列数量。
AI.result: 实现多项式时间精确算法，开发近似算法并应用于聚类，获得理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 限制均值长度显著降低问题复杂度，为DTW均值计算及聚类提供高效可行方案。

ai_content.method: 提出精确算法处理固定长度均值，设计近似算法平衡近似因子与时间复杂度，且算法运行时间仅线性依赖输入序列数量。

motivation: DTW是处理序列数据的鲁棒距离度量，但均值问题在一般情况下计算复杂度高（NP难），需通过限制均值长度降低难度并提供高效算法。

search_text: Approximating Length-Restricted Means under Dynamic Time Warping 动态时间扭曲下的近似长度限制方法 We study variants of the mean problem under the $p$-Dynamic Time Warping ($p$-DTW) distance, a popular and robust distance measure for sequential data. In our setting we are given a set of finite point sequences over an arbitrary metric space and we want to compute a mean point sequence of given length that minimizes the sum of $p$-DTW distances, each raised to the $q$\textsuperscript{th} power, between the input sequences and the mean sequence. In general, the problem is $\mathrm{NP}$-hard and known not to be fixed-parameter tractable in the number of sequences. On the positive side, we show that restricting the length of the mean sequence significantly reduces the hardness of the problem. We give an exact algorithm running in polynomial time for constant-length means. We explore various approximation algorithms that provide a trade-off between the approximation factor and the running time. Our approximation algorithms have a running time with only linear dependency on the number of input sequences. In addition, we use our mean algorithms to obtain clustering algorithms with theoretical guarantees. 我们研究 $p$-动态时间规整 ($p$-DTW) 距离下均值问题的变体，这是一种流行且稳健的序列数据距离度量。在我们的设置中，我们在任意度量空间上得到一组有限点序列，我们想要计算给定长度的平均点序列，以最小化输入序列和平均序列之间的 $p$-DTW 距离之和，每个距离都提高到 $q$\textsuperscript{th} 次方。一般来说，这个问题是 $\mathrm{NP}$-困难的，并且已知在序列数量上不是固定参数可处理的。从积极的一面来看，我们表明限制平均序列的长度可以显着降低问题的难度。我们给出了一个在多项式时间内运行的恒定长度均值的精确算法。我们探索了各种近似算法，这些算法在近似因子和运行时间之间提供了权衡。我们的近似算法的运行时间仅与输入序列的数量线性相关。此外，我们使用我们的均值算法来获得具有理论保证的聚类算法。 研究在动态时间规整（DTW）距离下计算有限长度点序列均值的问题，探索其近似算法与复杂度。 Maike Buchin,Anne Driemel,Koen van Greevenbroek,Ioannis Psarros,Dennis Rohde cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Ha Min Son,Moon Hyun Kim,Tai-Myoung Chung
title: Compare Where It Matters: Using Layer-Wise Regularization To Improve Federated Learning on Heterogeneous Data
title_zh: 比较重要的地方：使用逐层正则化改进异构数据的联邦学习
abstract: Federated Learning is a widely adopted method to train neural networks over distributed data. One main limitation is the performance degradation that occurs when data is heterogeneously distributed. While many works have attempted to address this problem, these methods under-perform because they are founded on a limited understanding of neural networks. In this work, we verify that only certain important layers in a neural network require regularization for effective training. We additionally verify that Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) most accurately calculates similarity between layers of neural networks trained on different data. By applying CKA-based regularization to important layers during training, we significantly improve performance in heterogeneous settings. We present FedCKA: a simple framework that out-performs previous state-of-the-art methods on various deep learning tasks while also improving efficiency and scalability.
summary: Federated Learning is a widely adopted method to train neural networks over distributed data. One main limitation is the performance degradation that occurs when data is heterogeneously distributed. While many works have attempted to address this problem, these methods under-perform because they are founded on a limited understanding of neural networks. In this work, we verify that only certain important layers in a neural network require regularization for effective training. We additionally verify that Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) most accurately calculates similarity between layers of neural networks trained on different data. By applying CKA-based regularization to important layers during training, we significantly improve performance in heterogeneous settings. We present FedCKA: a simple framework that out-performs previous state-of-the-art methods on various deep learning tasks while also improving efficiency and scalability.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种广泛采用的基于分布式数据训练神经网络的方法。一个主要限制是数据异构分布时会出现性能下降。虽然许多工作试图解决这个问题，但这些方法表现不佳，因为它们建立在对神经网络的有限理解之上。在这项工作中，我们验证了神经网络中只有某些重要层需要正则化才能进行有效训练。我们还验证了中心核对齐（CKA）最准确地计算在不同数据上训练的神经网络层之间的相似性。通过在训练期间将基于 CKA 的正则化应用于重要层，我们显着提高了异构环境中的性能。我们提出了 FedCKA：一个简单的框架，它在各种深度学习任务上优于以前最先进的方法，同时还提高了效率和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedCKA框架，通过逐层正则化方法改进联邦学习在异构数据上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在处理异构数据时效果不佳，因其对神经网络结构的理解不足，缺乏针对性的正则化策略。
AI.method: 基于中心核对齐（CKA）度量神经网络层相似性，仅对关键层施加正则化约束，构建FedCKA框架。
AI.result: FedCKA在多个深度学习任务中超越现有最优方法，在保持效率的同时提升异构数据下的联邦学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别关键层并结合CKA相似性度量进行正则化，FedCKA有效解决了联邦学习中的异构数据挑战。

authors_text: Zihan Liu,Feijun Jiang,Yuxiang Hu,Chen Shi,Pascale Fung
title: NER-BERT: A Pre-trained Model for Low-Resource Entity Tagging
title_zh: NER-BERT：用于低资源实体标记的预训练模型
abstract: Named entity recognition (NER) models generally perform poorly when large training datasets are unavailable for low-resource domains. Recently, pre-training a large-scale language model has become a promising direction for coping with the data scarcity issue. However, the underlying discrepancies between the language modeling and NER task could limit the models' performance, and pre-training for the NER task has rarely been studied since the collected NER datasets are generally small or large but with low quality. In this paper, we construct a massive NER corpus with a relatively high quality, and we pre-train a NER-BERT model based on the created dataset. Experimental results show that our pre-trained model can significantly outperform BERT as well as other strong baselines in low-resource scenarios across nine diverse domains. Moreover, a visualization of entity representations further indicates the effectiveness of NER-BERT for categorizing a variety of entities.
summary: Named entity recognition (NER) models generally perform poorly when large training datasets are unavailable for low-resource domains. Recently, pre-training a large-scale language model has become a promising direction for coping with the data scarcity issue. However, the underlying discrepancies between the language modeling and NER task could limit the models' performance, and pre-training for the NER task has rarely been studied since the collected NER datasets are generally small or large but with low quality. In this paper, we construct a massive NER corpus with a relatively high quality, and we pre-train a NER-BERT model based on the created dataset. Experimental results show that our pre-trained model can significantly outperform BERT as well as other strong baselines in low-resource scenarios across nine diverse domains. Moreover, a visualization of entity representations further indicates the effectiveness of NER-BERT for categorizing a variety of entities.
abstract_zh: 当资源匮乏的领域无法获得大型训练数据集时，命名实体识别 (NER) 模型通常表现不佳。近年来，预训练大规模语言模型已成为应对数据稀缺问题的一个有前景的方向。然而，语言建模和 NER 任务之间的潜在差异可能会限制模型的性能，并且由于收集的 NER 数据集通常较小或较大但质量较低，因此很少研究 NER 任务的预训练。在本文中，我们构建了一个质量相对较高的海量 NER 语料库，并基于创建的数据集预训练了 NER-BERT 模型。实验结果表明，我们的预训练模型在九个不同领域的低资源场景中可以显着优于 BERT 以及其他强大的基线。此外，实体表示的可视化进一步表明了 NER-BERT 对各种实体进行分类的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NER-BERT预训练模型，旨在解决低资源场景下命名实体识别（NER）任务中数据不足导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有NER模型在低资源领域表现不佳，而通用预训练模型（如BERT）因任务目标差异难以有效适配，且高质量NER语料稀缺。
AI.method: 构建高质量大规模NER语料库，并基于该语料预训练专用NER-BERT模型，通过实体表示可视化验证模型效果。
AI.result: NER-BERT在九个不同领域低资源实验中显著优于BERT及其他基线模型，实体分类可视化结果验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 针对NER任务的预训练模型能有效提升低资源场景下的实体识别性能，高质量语料构建是关键突破点。

authors_text: Anthony C. Constantinou,Yang Liu,Neville K. Kitson,Kiattikun Chobtham,Zhigao Guo
title: Effective and efficient structure learning with pruning and model averaging strategies
title_zh: 通过修剪和模型平均策略进行有效且高效的结构学习
abstract: Learning the structure of a Bayesian Network (BN) with score-based solutions involves exploring the search space of possible graphs and moving towards the graph that maximises a given objective function. Some algorithms offer exact solutions that guarantee to return the graph with the highest objective score, while others offer approximate solutions in exchange for reduced computational complexity. This paper describes an approximate BN structure learning algorithm, which we call Model Averaging Hill-Climbing (MAHC), that combines two novel strategies with hill-climbing search. The algorithm starts by pruning the search space of graphs, where the pruning strategy can be viewed as an aggressive version of the pruning strategies that are typically applied to combinatorial optimisation structure learning problems. It then performs model averaging in the hill-climbing search process and moves to the neighbouring graph that maximises the objective function, on average, for that neighbouring graph and over all its valid neighbouring graphs. Comparisons with other algorithms spanning different classes of learning suggest that the combination of aggressive pruning with model averaging is both effective and efficient, particularly in the presence of data noise.
summary: Learning the structure of a Bayesian Network (BN) with score-based solutions involves exploring the search space of possible graphs and moving towards the graph that maximises a given objective function. Some algorithms offer exact solutions that guarantee to return the graph with the highest objective score, while others offer approximate solutions in exchange for reduced computational complexity. This paper describes an approximate BN structure learning algorithm, which we call Model Averaging Hill-Climbing (MAHC), that combines two novel strategies with hill-climbing search. The algorithm starts by pruning the search space of graphs, where the pruning strategy can be viewed as an aggressive version of the pruning strategies that are typically applied to combinatorial optimisation structure learning problems. It then performs model averaging in the hill-climbing search process and moves to the neighbouring graph that maximises the objective function, on average, for that neighbouring graph and over all its valid neighbouring graphs. Comparisons with other algorithms spanning different classes of learning suggest that the combination of aggressive pruning with model averaging is both effective and efficient, particularly in the presence of data noise.
abstract_zh: 使用基于分数的解决方案学习贝叶斯网络 (BN) 的结构涉及探索可能图的搜索空间并转向最大化给定目标函数的图。一些算法提供精确的解决方案，保证返回具有最高客观分数的图，而另一些算法则提供近似解决方案，以换取降低的计算复杂性。本文描述了一种近似 BN 结构学习算法，我们称之为模型平均爬山（MAHC），它将两种新颖的策略与爬山搜索相结合。该算法首先修剪图的搜索空间，其中修剪策略可以被视为通常应用于组合优化结构学习问题的修剪策略的激进版本。然后，它在爬山搜索过程中执行模型平均，并移动到相邻图，该相邻图使该相邻图及其所有有效相邻图的目标函数平均最大化。与跨越不同学习类别的其他算法的比较表明，积极剪枝与模型平均的结合既有效又高效，特别是在存在数据噪声的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合剪枝与模型平均策略的近似贝叶斯网络结构学习算法MAHC，以提高计算效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 精确贝叶斯网络结构学习算法计算复杂度高，而传统近似方法在噪声数据下效果不佳，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过激进剪枝策略缩小搜索空间，再结合模型平均的爬山搜索，选择使目标函数平均值最大的邻近图结构。
AI.result: 实验表明MAHC在噪声数据下优于其他算法，兼具有效性与效率，尤其在大规模数据集上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝与模型平均的结合能有效平衡计算复杂度与结构学习精度，为贝叶斯网络学习提供新思路。

search_text: Effective and efficient structure learning with pruning and model averaging strategies 通过修剪和模型平均策略进行有效且高效的结构学习 Learning the structure of a Bayesian Network (BN) with score-based solutions involves exploring the search space of possible graphs and moving towards the graph that maximises a given objective function. Some algorithms offer exact solutions that guarantee to return the graph with the highest objective score, while others offer approximate solutions in exchange for reduced computational complexity. This paper describes an approximate BN structure learning algorithm, which we call Model Averaging Hill-Climbing (MAHC), that combines two novel strategies with hill-climbing search. The algorithm starts by pruning the search space of graphs, where the pruning strategy can be viewed as an aggressive version of the pruning strategies that are typically applied to combinatorial optimisation structure learning problems. It then performs model averaging in the hill-climbing search process and moves to the neighbouring graph that maximises the objective function, on average, for that neighbouring graph and over all its valid neighbouring graphs. Comparisons with other algorithms spanning different classes of learning suggest that the combination of aggressive pruning with model averaging is both effective and efficient, particularly in the presence of data noise. 使用基于分数的解决方案学习贝叶斯网络 (BN) 的结构涉及探索可能图的搜索空间并转向最大化给定目标函数的图。一些算法提供精确的解决方案，保证返回具有最高客观分数的图，而另一些算法则提供近似解决方案，以换取降低的计算复杂性。本文描述了一种近似 BN 结构学习算法，我们称之为模型平均爬山（MAHC），它将两种新颖的策略与爬山搜索相结合。该算法首先修剪图的搜索空间，其中修剪策略可以被视为通常应用于组合优化结构学习问题的修剪策略的激进版本。然后，它在爬山搜索过程中执行模型平均，并移动到相邻图，该相邻图使该相邻图及其所有有效相邻图的目标函数平均最大化。与跨越不同学习类别的其他算法的比较表明，积极剪枝与模型平均的结合既有效又高效，特别是在存在数据噪声的情况下。 本文提出一种结合剪枝与模型平均策略的近似贝叶斯网络结构学习算法MAHC，以提高计算效率和鲁棒性。 Anthony C. Constantinou,Yang Liu,Neville K. Kitson,Kiattikun Chobtham,Zhigao Guo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Isinsu Katircioglu,Costa Georgantas,Mathieu Salzmann,Pascal Fua
title: Dyadic Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: 二元人体运动预测
abstract: Prior work on human motion forecasting has mostly focused on predicting the future motion of single subjects in isolation from their past pose sequence. In the presence of closely interacting people, however, this strategy fails to account for the dependencies between the different subject's motions. In this paper, we therefore introduce a motion prediction framework that explicitly reasons about the interactions of two observed subjects. Specifically, we achieve this by introducing a pairwise attention mechanism that models the mutual dependencies in the motion history of the two subjects. This allows us to preserve the long-term motion dynamics in a more realistic way and more robustly predict unusual and fast-paced movements, such as the ones occurring in a dance scenario. To evaluate this, and because no existing motion prediction datasets depict two closely-interacting subjects, we introduce the LindyHop600K dance dataset. Our results evidence that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art single person motion prediction techniques.
summary: Prior work on human motion forecasting has mostly focused on predicting the future motion of single subjects in isolation from their past pose sequence. In the presence of closely interacting people, however, this strategy fails to account for the dependencies between the different subject's motions. In this paper, we therefore introduce a motion prediction framework that explicitly reasons about the interactions of two observed subjects. Specifically, we achieve this by introducing a pairwise attention mechanism that models the mutual dependencies in the motion history of the two subjects. This allows us to preserve the long-term motion dynamics in a more realistic way and more robustly predict unusual and fast-paced movements, such as the ones occurring in a dance scenario. To evaluate this, and because no existing motion prediction datasets depict two closely-interacting subjects, we introduce the LindyHop600K dance dataset. Our results evidence that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art single person motion prediction techniques.
abstract_zh: 先前关于人体运动预测的工作主要集中于预测单个受试者的未来运动，与他们过去的姿势序列隔离。然而，在人们密切互动的情况下，这种策略无法解释不同主体动作之间的依赖性。因此，在本文中，我们引入了一个运动预测框架，该框架明确地解释了两个观察对象的相互作用。具体来说，我们通过引入成对注意力机制来实现这一点，该机制模拟两个主体运动历史中的相互依赖关系。这使我们能够以更现实的方式保留长期运动动态，并更稳健地预测不寻常和快节奏的运动，例如舞蹈场景中发生的运动。为了评估这一点，并且由于没有现有的运动预测数据集描述两个密切交互的主题，因此我们引入了 LindyHop600K 舞蹈数据集。我们的结果证明我们的方法优于最先进的单人运动预测技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双人人体运动预测框架，通过建模两人间的互动依赖关系提升运动预测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统单人运动预测方法无法处理互动场景中人物间的运动依赖关系，导致预测效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入成对注意力机制建模双人运动历史依赖关系，并构建LindyHop600K舞蹈数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在舞蹈等互动场景中，该方法优于现有单人运动预测技术，能更准确预测复杂快速动作。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模互动依赖关系的框架可有效提升双人运动预测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Tomer Amit,Tal Shaharbany,Eliya Nachmani,Lior Wolf
title: SegDiff: Image Segmentation with Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: SegDiff：使用扩散概率模型进行图像分割
abstract: Diffusion Probabilistic Methods are employed for state-of-the-art image generation. In this work, we present a method for extending such models for performing image segmentation. The method learns end-to-end, without relying on a pre-trained backbone. The information in the input image and in the current estimation of the segmentation map is merged by summing the output of two encoders. Additional encoding layers and a decoder are then used to iteratively refine the segmentation map, using a diffusion model. Since the diffusion model is probabilistic, it is applied multiple times, and the results are merged into a final segmentation map. The new method produces state-of-the-art results on the Cityscapes validation set, the Vaihingen building segmentation benchmark, and the MoNuSeg dataset.
summary: Diffusion Probabilistic Methods are employed for state-of-the-art image generation. In this work, we present a method for extending such models for performing image segmentation. The method learns end-to-end, without relying on a pre-trained backbone. The information in the input image and in the current estimation of the segmentation map is merged by summing the output of two encoders. Additional encoding layers and a decoder are then used to iteratively refine the segmentation map, using a diffusion model. Since the diffusion model is probabilistic, it is applied multiple times, and the results are merged into a final segmentation map. The new method produces state-of-the-art results on the Cityscapes validation set, the Vaihingen building segmentation benchmark, and the MoNuSeg dataset.
abstract_zh: 采用扩散概率方法来生成最先进的图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种扩展此类模型以执行图像分割的方法。该方法进行端到端学习，而不依赖于预先训练的主干网络。通过对两个编码器的输出求和来合并输入图像中的信息和分割图的当前估计中的信息。然后，使用扩散模型，使用附加编码层和解码器来迭代细化分割图。由于扩散模型是概率性的，因此会多次应用，并将结果合并到最终的分割图中。新方法在 Cityscapes 验证集、Vaihingen 建筑分割基准和 MoNuSeg 数据集上产生了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegDiff方法，利用扩散概率模型实现无需预训练骨干网络的图像分割。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法依赖预训练模型，而本文旨在开发端到端的分割方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过合并输入图像与分割图的编码信息，结合额外编码层和解码器迭代优化，利用扩散模型多次生成并融合结果。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、Vaihingen和MoNuSeg数据集上达到最先进的分割效果。
AI.conclusion: SegDiff方法验证了扩散模型在图像分割任务中的有效性，且无需依赖预训练模型。

authors_text: Woncheol Shin,Gyubok Lee,Jiyoung Lee,Eunyi Lyou,Joonseok Lee,Edward Choi
title: Exploration into Translation-Equivariant Image Quantization
title_zh: 平移等变图像量化的探索
abstract: This is an exploratory study that discovers the current image quantization (vector quantization) do not satisfy translation equivariance in the quantized space due to aliasing. Instead of focusing on anti-aliasing, we propose a simple yet effective way to achieve translation-equivariant image quantization by enforcing orthogonality among the codebook embeddings. To explore the advantages of translation-equivariant image quantization, we conduct three proof-of-concept experiments with a carefully controlled dataset: (1) text-to-image generation, where the quantized image indices are the target to predict, (2) image-to-text generation, where the quantized image indices are given as a condition, (3) using a smaller training set to analyze sample efficiency. From the strictly controlled experiments, we empirically verify that the translation-equivariant image quantizer improves not only sample efficiency but also the accuracy over VQGAN up to +11.9% in text-to-image generation and +3.9% in image-to-text generation.
summary: This is an exploratory study that discovers the current image quantization (vector quantization) do not satisfy translation equivariance in the quantized space due to aliasing. Instead of focusing on anti-aliasing, we propose a simple yet effective way to achieve translation-equivariant image quantization by enforcing orthogonality among the codebook embeddings. To explore the advantages of translation-equivariant image quantization, we conduct three proof-of-concept experiments with a carefully controlled dataset: (1) text-to-image generation, where the quantized image indices are the target to predict, (2) image-to-text generation, where the quantized image indices are given as a condition, (3) using a smaller training set to analyze sample efficiency. From the strictly controlled experiments, we empirically verify that the translation-equivariant image quantizer improves not only sample efficiency but also the accuracy over VQGAN up to +11.9% in text-to-image generation and +3.9% in image-to-text generation.
abstract_zh: 这是一项探索性研究，发现当前的图像量化（矢量量化）由于混叠而无法满足量化空间中的平移等变性。我们不关注抗锯齿，而是提出了一种简单而有效的方法，通过在码本嵌入之间强制正交性来实现平移等变图像量化。为了探索平移等变图像量化的优势，我们使用精心控制的数据集进行了三个概念验证实验：（1）文本到图像生成，其中量化图像索引是预测目标，（2）图像到文本生成，其中量化图像索引作为条件给出，（3）使用较小的训练集来分析样本效率。通过严格控制的实验，我们凭经验验证平移等变图像量化器不仅提高了样本效率，而且在文本到图像生成方面比 VQGAN 的准确度提高了 11.9%，在图像到文本生成方面提高了 3.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了一种实现平移等变图像量化的方法，通过强制码本嵌入的正交性来解决现有量化方法因混叠效应导致的平移等变性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 当前图像量化方法在量化空间中无法满足平移等变性，导致生成结果对输入位置敏感。传统抗混叠方法复杂且效果有限，需寻找更直接的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过强制码本嵌入向量的正交性，设计平移等变的量化器，使量化结果在空间平移后保持一致的表示，无需额外抗混叠处理。
AI.result: 在严格控制的实验中，该方法在文本到图像生成任务中比VQGAN提升11.9%准确率，在图像到文本任务中提升3.9%，且在小数据集上表现出更高的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 平移等变量化通过正交约束有效提升了生成质量与效率，为未来图像生成模型提供了更鲁棒的量化方案。

authors_text: Johannes Pankert,Maria Vittoria Minniti,Lorenz Wellhausen,Marco Hutter
title: Deep Measurement Updates for Bayes Filters
title_zh: 贝叶斯滤波器的深度测量更新
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 1, pp. 414-421, Jan. 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 1, pp. 414-421, Jan. 2022
abstract: Measurement update rules for Bayes filters often contain hand-crafted heuristics to compute observation probabilities for high-dimensional sensor data, like images. In this work, we propose the novel approach Deep Measurement Update (DMU) as a general update rule for a wide range of systems. DMU has a conditional encoder-decoder neural network structure to process depth images as raw inputs. Even though the network is trained only on synthetic data, the model shows good performance at evaluation time on real-world data. With our proposed training scheme primed data training , we demonstrate how the DMU models can be trained efficiently to be sensitive to condition variables without having to rely on a stochastic information bottleneck. We validate the proposed methods in multiple scenarios of increasing complexity, beginning with the pose estimation of a single object to the joint estimation of the pose and the internal state of an articulated system. Moreover, we provide a benchmark against Articulated Signed Distance Functions(A-SDF) on the RBO dataset as a baseline comparison for articulation state estimation.
summary: Measurement update rules for Bayes filters often contain hand-crafted heuristics to compute observation probabilities for high-dimensional sensor data, like images. In this work, we propose the novel approach Deep Measurement Update (DMU) as a general update rule for a wide range of systems. DMU has a conditional encoder-decoder neural network structure to process depth images as raw inputs. Even though the network is trained only on synthetic data, the model shows good performance at evaluation time on real-world data. With our proposed training scheme primed data training , we demonstrate how the DMU models can be trained efficiently to be sensitive to condition variables without having to rely on a stochastic information bottleneck. We validate the proposed methods in multiple scenarios of increasing complexity, beginning with the pose estimation of a single object to the joint estimation of the pose and the internal state of an articulated system. Moreover, we provide a benchmark against Articulated Signed Distance Functions(A-SDF) on the RBO dataset as a baseline comparison for articulation state estimation.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯滤波器的测量更新规则通常包含手工设计的启发式方法，用于计算高维传感器数据（例如图像）的观察概率。在这项工作中，我们提出了深度测量更新（DMU）的新方法作为各种系统的通用更新规则。 DMU 具有条件编码器-解码器神经网络结构，可将深度图像作为原始输入进行处理。尽管网络仅在合成数据上进行训练，但该模型在对真实数据进行评估时表现出了良好的性能。通过我们提出的训练方案启动数据训练，我们演示了如何有效地训练 DMU 模型以对条件变量敏感，而不必依赖随机信息瓶颈。我们在复杂性不断增加的多种场景中验证了所提出的方法，从单个物体的姿态估计开始到关节系统的姿态和内部状态的联合估计。此外，我们在 RBO 数据集上提供了针对铰接符号距离函数（A-SDF）的基准，作为铰接状态估计的基线比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的贝叶斯滤波器测量更新方法DMU，用于处理高维传感器数据。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯滤波器依赖手工设计的启发式方法处理高维观测数据，难以适应复杂场景且泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 设计条件编码器-解码器网络结构处理深度图像，采用合成数据训练结合primed data training方案，无需随机信息瓶颈即可捕捉条件变量敏感性。
AI.result: 模型在真实数据集上表现优异，成功应用于单物体姿态估计及关节系统联合状态估计，并在RBO数据集上超越A-SDF基准。
AI.conclusion: DMU验证了深度学习在贝叶斯滤波器测量更新中的有效性，为复杂系统状态估计提供了新方法论。

authors_text: Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie
title: $\ell_\infty$-Robustness and Beyond: Unleashing Efficient Adversarial Training
title_zh: $\ell_\infty$-稳健性及超越：释放高效的对抗性训练
comment: Accepted to the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: Accepted to the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches in training robust models against such attacks. However, it is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration, hampering its effectiveness. Recently, Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) was proposed that can obtain robust models efficiently. However, the reasons behind its success are not fully understood, and more importantly, it can only train robust models for $\ell_\infty$-bounded attacks as it uses FGSM during training. In this paper, by leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a general, more principled approach toward reducing the time complexity of robust training. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training (PAT). Our experimental results indicate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight reduction in the clean and robust accuracy.
summary: Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches in training robust models against such attacks. However, it is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration, hampering its effectiveness. Recently, Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) was proposed that can obtain robust models efficiently. However, the reasons behind its success are not fully understood, and more importantly, it can only train robust models for $\ell_\infty$-bounded attacks as it uses FGSM during training. In this paper, by leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a general, more principled approach toward reducing the time complexity of robust training. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training (PAT). Our experimental results indicate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight reduction in the clean and robust accuracy.
abstract_zh: 神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击：在其输入中添加精心设计的、难以察觉的扰动可以修改其输出。对抗性训练是训练针对此类攻击的稳健模型的最有效方法之一。然而，它比神经网络的普通训练慢得多，因为它需要在每次迭代时为整个训练数据构建对抗性示例，从而限制了其有效性。最近，提出了快速对抗训练（FAT），可以有效地获得鲁棒模型。然而，其成功背后的原因尚不完全清楚，更重要的是，它只能训练针对 $\ell_\infty$-bounded 攻击的鲁棒模型，因为它在训练过程中使用了 FGSM。在本文中，通过利用核心集选择理论，我们展示了选择一小部分训练数据如何提供一种通用的、更有原则性的方法来降低鲁棒训练的时间复杂度。与现有方法不同，我们的方法可以适应各种训练目标，包括 TRADES、$\ell_p$-PGD 和感知对抗训练 (PAT)。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法将对抗性训练速度提高了 2-3 倍，同时干净和稳健的准确性略有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核心集选择理论的高效对抗训练方法，通过选择少量训练数据子集来降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽然有效但计算成本高，现有方法如FAT仅适用于特定攻击类型，缺乏通用性且效率不足。
AI.method: 利用核心集选择理论，从训练数据中选取代表性子集进行对抗训练，适配多种目标函数（如TRADES、ℓ_p-PGD等）。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法使对抗训练速度提升2-3倍，同时清洁准确率和鲁棒准确率仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为对抗训练提供了通用且高效的解决方案，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算开销。

search_text: $\ell_\infty$-Robustness and Beyond: Unleashing Efficient Adversarial Training $\ell_\infty$-稳健性及超越：释放高效的对抗性训练 Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches in training robust models against such attacks. However, it is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration, hampering its effectiveness. Recently, Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) was proposed that can obtain robust models efficiently. However, the reasons behind its success are not fully understood, and more importantly, it can only train robust models for $\ell_\infty$-bounded attacks as it uses FGSM during training. In this paper, by leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a general, more principled approach toward reducing the time complexity of robust training. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training (PAT). Our experimental results indicate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight reduction in the clean and robust accuracy. 神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击：在其输入中添加精心设计的、难以察觉的扰动可以修改其输出。对抗性训练是训练针对此类攻击的稳健模型的最有效方法之一。然而，它比神经网络的普通训练慢得多，因为它需要在每次迭代时为整个训练数据构建对抗性示例，从而限制了其有效性。最近，提出了快速对抗训练（FAT），可以有效地获得鲁棒模型。然而，其成功背后的原因尚不完全清楚，更重要的是，它只能训练针对 $\ell_\infty$-bounded 攻击的鲁棒模型，因为它在训练过程中使用了 FGSM。在本文中，通过利用核心集选择理论，我们展示了选择一小部分训练数据如何提供一种通用的、更有原则性的方法来降低鲁棒训练的时间复杂度。与现有方法不同，我们的方法可以适应各种训练目标，包括 TRADES、$\ell_p$-PGD 和感知对抗训练 (PAT)。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法将对抗性训练速度提高了 2-3 倍，同时干净和稳健的准确性略有下降。 本文提出了一种基于核心集选择理论的高效对抗训练方法，通过选择少量训练数据子集来降低计算复杂度。 Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Gihyun Kwon,Jong Chul Ye
title: CLIPstyler: Image Style Transfer with a Single Text Condition
title_zh: CLIPstyler：具有单个文本条件的图像样式转换
abstract: Existing neural style transfer methods require reference style images to transfer texture information of style images to content images. However, in many practical situations, users may not have reference style images but still be interested in transferring styles by just imagining them. In order to deal with such applications, we propose a new framework that enables a style transfer `without' a style image, but only with a text description of the desired style. Using the pre-trained text-image embedding model of CLIP, we demonstrate the modulation of the style of content images only with a single text condition. Specifically, we propose a patch-wise text-image matching loss with multiview augmentations for realistic texture transfer. Extensive experimental results confirmed the successful image style transfer with realistic textures that reflect semantic query texts.
summary: Existing neural style transfer methods require reference style images to transfer texture information of style images to content images. However, in many practical situations, users may not have reference style images but still be interested in transferring styles by just imagining them. In order to deal with such applications, we propose a new framework that enables a style transfer `without' a style image, but only with a text description of the desired style. Using the pre-trained text-image embedding model of CLIP, we demonstrate the modulation of the style of content images only with a single text condition. Specifically, we propose a patch-wise text-image matching loss with multiview augmentations for realistic texture transfer. Extensive experimental results confirmed the successful image style transfer with realistic textures that reflect semantic query texts.
abstract_zh: 现有的神经风格迁移方法需要参考风格图像来将风格图像的纹理信息迁移到内容图像。然而，在许多实际情况下，用户可能没有参考风格图像，但仍然有兴趣通过想象来转移风格。为了处理此类应用程序，我们提出了一个新的框架，该框架可以“不”使用样式图像而仅使用所需样式的文本描述来进行样式传输。使用 CLIP 的预训练文本图像嵌入模型，我们演示了仅使用单个文本条件对内容图像风格的调制。具体来说，我们提出了一种带有多视图增强的补丁式文本图像匹配损失，以实现真实的纹理传输。大量的实验结果证实了图像风格的成功转移，具有反映语义查询文本的真实纹理。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需参考风格图像，仅通过文本描述实现图像风格迁移的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统风格迁移依赖参考图像，但实际场景中用户常缺乏此类资源，需通过文本直接描述目标风格。
AI.method: 基于预训练CLIP模型，设计块级文本-图像匹配损失与多视图增强机制，实现单文本条件下的风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能生成符合文本语义的真实纹理图像，成功完成无参考图像的风格迁移任务。
AI.conclusion: CLIPstyler通过文本条件实现高质量风格迁移，为无参考图像的风格编辑提供了新思路与实用方案。

authors_text: Yuki Noguchi,Tatsuya Matsushima,Yutaka Matsuo,Shixiang Shane Gu
title: Tool as Embodiment for Recursive Manipulation
title_zh: 作为递归操作实施例的工具
abstract: Humans and many animals exhibit a robust capability to manipulate diverse objects, often directly with their bodies and sometimes indirectly with tools. Such flexibility is likely enabled by the fundamental consistency in underlying physics of object manipulation such as contacts and force closures. Inspired by viewing tools as extensions of our bodies, we present Tool-As-Embodiment (TAE), a parameterization for tool-based manipulation policies that treat hand-object and tool-object interactions in the same representation space. The result is a single policy that can be applied recursively on robots to use end effectors to manipulate objects, and use objects as tools, i.e. new end-effectors, to manipulate other objects. By sharing experiences across different embodiments for grasping or pushing, our policy exhibits higher performance than if separate policies were trained. Our framework could utilize all experiences from different resolutions of tool-enabled embodiments to a single generic policy for each manipulation skill. Videos at https://sites.google.com/view/recursivemanipulation
summary: Humans and many animals exhibit a robust capability to manipulate diverse objects, often directly with their bodies and sometimes indirectly with tools. Such flexibility is likely enabled by the fundamental consistency in underlying physics of object manipulation such as contacts and force closures. Inspired by viewing tools as extensions of our bodies, we present Tool-As-Embodiment (TAE), a parameterization for tool-based manipulation policies that treat hand-object and tool-object interactions in the same representation space. The result is a single policy that can be applied recursively on robots to use end effectors to manipulate objects, and use objects as tools, i.e. new end-effectors, to manipulate other objects. By sharing experiences across different embodiments for grasping or pushing, our policy exhibits higher performance than if separate policies were trained. Our framework could utilize all experiences from different resolutions of tool-enabled embodiments to a single generic policy for each manipulation skill. Videos at https://sites.google.com/view/recursivemanipulation
abstract_zh: 人类和许多动物表现出强大的操纵各种物体的能力，通常直接用身体，有时间接用工具。这种灵活性很可能是通过对象操纵的基础物理（例如接触和力闭合）的基本一致性来实现的。受到将工具视为我们身体的延伸的启发，我们提出了工具作为体现（TAE），这是一种基于工具的操作策略的参数化，在同一表示空间中处理手-对象和工具-对象交互。结果是一个单一的策略，可以递归地应用于机器人，以使用末端执行器来操纵对象，并使用对象作为工具，即新的末端执行器来操纵其他对象。通过在不同的抓取或推动实施例中共享经验，我们的策略比训练单独的策略表现出更高的性能。我们的框架可以利用从支持工具的实施例的不同分辨率的所有经验到针对每种操作技能的单个通用策略。视频位于 https://sites.google.com/view/recursivemanipulation

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tool-As-Embodiment（TAE）框架，通过统一表示空间实现工具与身体交互的递归操作策略，使机器人能递归使用工具或物体作为新工具进行操作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法常将工具与身体操作分离训练，导致策略灵活性不足。受生物体工具延伸特性的启发，需探索统一表征以提升跨形态操作的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建参数化策略空间，将手-物体与工具-物体交互映射至共享表征；通过递归策略实现末端执行器与工具的层级操作，并跨不同形态共享经验数据进行联合训练。
AI.result: 单一策略在多种工具形态下表现优于独立训练策略，框架可整合多分辨率工具经验生成通用操作策略，实验视频验证了递归操作的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TAE框架证明了工具与身体交互的统一表征可行性，为复杂递归操作任务提供了可扩展的解决方案，未来可拓展至多层级工具系统与更复杂环境交互。

authors_text: Masahiro Suzuki
title: Score Transformer: Generating Musical Score from Note-level Representation
title_zh: 乐谱转换器：从音符级别表示生成乐谱
comment: Accepted at ACM Multimedia Asia 2021 (MMAsia '21); Project page: https://score-transformer.github.io/
comments: Accepted at ACM Multimedia Asia 2021 (MMAsia '21); Project page: https://score-transformer.github.io/
abstract: In this paper, we explore the tokenized representation of musical scores using the Transformer model to automatically generate musical scores. Thus far, sequence models have yielded fruitful results with note-level (MIDI-equivalent) symbolic representations of music. Although the note-level representations can comprise sufficient information to reproduce music aurally, they cannot contain adequate information to represent music visually in terms of notation. Musical scores contain various musical symbols (e.g., clef, key signature, and notes) and attributes (e.g., stem direction, beam, and tie) that enable us to visually comprehend musical content. However, automated estimation of these elements has yet to be comprehensively addressed. In this paper, we first design score token representation corresponding to the various musical elements. We then train the Transformer model to transcribe note-level representation into appropriate music notation. Evaluations of popular piano scores show that the proposed method significantly outperforms existing methods on all 12 musical aspects that were investigated. We also explore an effective notation-level token representation to work with the model and determine that our proposed representation produces the steadiest results.
summary: In this paper, we explore the tokenized representation of musical scores using the Transformer model to automatically generate musical scores. Thus far, sequence models have yielded fruitful results with note-level (MIDI-equivalent) symbolic representations of music. Although the note-level representations can comprise sufficient information to reproduce music aurally, they cannot contain adequate information to represent music visually in terms of notation. Musical scores contain various musical symbols (e.g., clef, key signature, and notes) and attributes (e.g., stem direction, beam, and tie) that enable us to visually comprehend musical content. However, automated estimation of these elements has yet to be comprehensively addressed. In this paper, we first design score token representation corresponding to the various musical elements. We then train the Transformer model to transcribe note-level representation into appropriate music notation. Evaluations of popular piano scores show that the proposed method significantly outperforms existing methods on all 12 musical aspects that were investigated. We also explore an effective notation-level token representation to work with the model and determine that our proposed representation produces the steadiest results.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索使用 Transformer 模型自动生成乐谱的乐谱标记化表示。到目前为止，序列模型已经在音乐的音符级（MIDI 等效）符号表示方面取得了丰硕的成果。尽管音符级表示可以包括足够的信息以在听觉上再现音乐，但是它们不能包含足够的信息以在记谱方面以视觉方式表示音乐。乐谱包含各种音乐符号（例如谱号、调号和音符）和属性（例如干方向、横梁和连带），使我们能够直观地理解音乐内容。然而，这些元素的自动估计尚未得到全面解决。在本文中，我们首先设计与各种音乐元素相对应的乐谱标记表示。然后，我们训练 Transformer 模型将音符级表示转录为适当的音乐符号。对流行钢琴乐谱的评估表明，所提出的方法在所调查的所有 12 个音乐方面都显着优于现有方法。我们还探索了一种有效的符号级标记表示来与模型一起使用，并确定我们提出的表示会产生最稳定的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer模型的音乐乐谱生成方法，将音符级表示转换为包含视觉符号的乐谱表示。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型虽能通过音符级表示（如MIDI）生成音频，但无法完整表达乐谱中的视觉符号（如谱号、调号、连音线等），而这些元素对乐谱可视化至关重要。
AI.method: 设计包含乐谱元素的标记表示方案，训练Transformer模型将音符级输入转换为符合乐谱规范的符号表示，并探索有效的符号级标记表示方法。
AI.result: 在钢琴乐谱数据集上，该方法在12个音乐要素评估中均显著优于现有方法，且提出的表示方案具有最稳定的表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计针对性的乐谱标记表示与Transformer模型，实现了高质量乐谱生成，验证了符号级表示在音乐可视化任务中的有效性。

authors_text: I-Fan Chen,Brian King,Jasha Droppo
title: Investigation of Training Label Error Impact on RNN-T
title_zh: 训练标签错误对 RNN-T 影响的调查
abstract: In this paper, we propose an approach to quantitatively analyze impacts of different training label errors to RNN-T based ASR models. The result shows deletion errors are more harmful than substitution and insertion label errors in RNN-T training data. We also examined label error impact mitigation approaches on RNN-T and found that, though all the methods mitigate the label-error-caused degradation to some extent, they could not remove the performance gap between the models trained with and without the presence of label errors. Based on the analysis results, we suggest to design data pipelines for RNN-T with higher priority on reducing deletion label errors. We also find that ensuring high-quality training labels remains important, despite of the existence of the label error mitigation approaches.
summary: In this paper, we propose an approach to quantitatively analyze impacts of different training label errors to RNN-T based ASR models. The result shows deletion errors are more harmful than substitution and insertion label errors in RNN-T training data. We also examined label error impact mitigation approaches on RNN-T and found that, though all the methods mitigate the label-error-caused degradation to some extent, they could not remove the performance gap between the models trained with and without the presence of label errors. Based on the analysis results, we suggest to design data pipelines for RNN-T with higher priority on reducing deletion label errors. We also find that ensuring high-quality training labels remains important, despite of the existence of the label error mitigation approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种定量分析不同训练标签错误对基于 RNN-T 的 ASR 模型的影响的方法。结果表明，RNN-T 训练数据中的删除错误比替换和插入标签错误危害更大。我们还研究了 RNN-T 上的标签错误影响缓解方法，发现虽然所有方法都在一定程度上减轻了标签错误引起的退化，但它们无法消除存在和不存在标签错误的情况下训练的模型之间的性能差距。根据分析结果，我们建议为 RNN-T 设计数据管道，优先考虑减少删除标签错误。我们还发现，尽管存在标签错误缓解方法，但确保高质量的训练标签仍然很重要。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了训练标签错误对RNN-T模型的影响，并提出量化分析方法。
AI.motivation: 理解不同标签错误类型对RNN-T模型性能的影响，寻找有效的缓解方法以提升模型训练质量。
AI.method: 通过实验定量分析删除、替换和插入错误的影响，并测试多种标签错误缓解方法的效果。
AI.result: 删除错误对RNN-T模型危害最大，缓解方法可部分降低性能损失但无法完全消除标签错误带来的差距。
AI.conclusion: 应优先减少训练数据中的删除错误，同时保持高质量标签的重要性，即使存在缓解方法也需重视标签质量。

authors_text: Eimantas Ledinauskas,Julius Ruseckas,Julius Marozas,Kasparas Karlauskas,Justas Terentjevas,Augustas Mačijauskas,Alfonsas Juršėnas
title: Automatic travel pattern extraction from visa page stamps using CNN models
title_zh: 使用 CNN 模型从签证页印章中自动提取旅行模式
comment: 15 pages, 13 figures, 4 tables, submitted for peer review
comments: 15 pages, 13 figures, 4 tables, submitted for peer review
abstract: Manual travel pattern inference from visa page stamps is a time consuming activity and constitutes an important bottleneck in the efficiency of traveler inspection at border crossings. Despite efforts to digitize and record the border crossing information into databases, travel pattern inference from stamps will remain a problem until every country in the world is incorporated into such a unified system. This could take decades. We propose an automated document analysis system that processes scanned visa pages and automatically extracts the travel pattern from detected stamps. The system processes the page via the following pipeline: stamp detection in the visa page; general stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp date extraction. For each stage of the proposed pipeline we construct neural network models and train then on a mixture of real and synthetic data. We integrated Schengen area stamp detection and date, country, entry/exit recognition models together with a graphical user interface into a prototype of an automatic travel pattern extraction tool. We find that by combining simple neural network models into our proposed pipeline a useful tool can be created which can speed up the travel pattern extraction significantly.
summary: Manual travel pattern inference from visa page stamps is a time consuming activity and constitutes an important bottleneck in the efficiency of traveler inspection at border crossings. Despite efforts to digitize and record the border crossing information into databases, travel pattern inference from stamps will remain a problem until every country in the world is incorporated into such a unified system. This could take decades. We propose an automated document analysis system that processes scanned visa pages and automatically extracts the travel pattern from detected stamps. The system processes the page via the following pipeline: stamp detection in the visa page; general stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp date extraction. For each stage of the proposed pipeline we construct neural network models and train then on a mixture of real and synthetic data. We integrated Schengen area stamp detection and date, country, entry/exit recognition models together with a graphical user interface into a prototype of an automatic travel pattern extraction tool. We find that by combining simple neural network models into our proposed pipeline a useful tool can be created which can speed up the travel pattern extraction significantly.
abstract_zh: 根据签证页印章手动推断旅行模式是一项耗时的活动，并且构成了边境口岸旅客检查效率的重要瓶颈。尽管人们努力将过境信息数字化并记录到数据库中，但在世界上每个国家都纳入这样一个统一的系统之前，从邮票推断旅行模式仍然是一个问题。这可能需要几十年的时间。我们提出了一种自动文档分析系统，该系统可以处理扫描的签证页并自动从检测到的印章中提取旅行模式。系统通过以下流程处理页面：签证页面中的印章检测；一般印章国家和出入境认可；申根区盖章国家及出入境认可；申根区印章日期提取。对于所提出的管道的每个阶段，我们构建神经网络模型，然后在真实数据和合成数据的混合上进行训练。我们将申根区印章检测和日期、国家/地区、出入境识别模型以及图形用户界面集成到自动旅行模式提取工具的原型中。我们发现，通过将简单的神经网络模型组合到我们提出的管道中，可以创建一个有用的工具，可以显着加快旅行模式的提取速度。

AI.tldr: 开发基于CNN模型的自动签证印章旅行模式提取系统
AI.motivation: 手动推断旅行模式效率低且耗时，全球统一系统尚未实现，需自动化工具提升效率
AI.method: 采用CNN模型构建多阶段流水线，包括印章检测、国家出入识别、申根区日期提取，结合真实与合成数据训练模型，并集成GUI原型工具
AI.result: 成功开发原型工具，显著提升旅行模式提取效率
AI.conclusion: 验证了CNN模型在自动化旅行模式提取中的有效性，为边境检查提供高效解决方案

search_text: Automatic travel pattern extraction from visa page stamps using CNN models 使用 CNN 模型从签证页印章中自动提取旅行模式 Manual travel pattern inference from visa page stamps is a time consuming activity and constitutes an important bottleneck in the efficiency of traveler inspection at border crossings. Despite efforts to digitize and record the border crossing information into databases, travel pattern inference from stamps will remain a problem until every country in the world is incorporated into such a unified system. This could take decades. We propose an automated document analysis system that processes scanned visa pages and automatically extracts the travel pattern from detected stamps. The system processes the page via the following pipeline: stamp detection in the visa page; general stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp country and entry/exit recognition; Schengen area stamp date extraction. For each stage of the proposed pipeline we construct neural network models and train then on a mixture of real and synthetic data. We integrated Schengen area stamp detection and date, country, entry/exit recognition models together with a graphical user interface into a prototype of an automatic travel pattern extraction tool. We find that by combining simple neural network models into our proposed pipeline a useful tool can be created which can speed up the travel pattern extraction significantly. 根据签证页印章手动推断旅行模式是一项耗时的活动，并且构成了边境口岸旅客检查效率的重要瓶颈。尽管人们努力将过境信息数字化并记录到数据库中，但在世界上每个国家都纳入这样一个统一的系统之前，从邮票推断旅行模式仍然是一个问题。这可能需要几十年的时间。我们提出了一种自动文档分析系统，该系统可以处理扫描的签证页并自动从检测到的印章中提取旅行模式。系统通过以下流程处理页面：签证页面中的印章检测；一般印章国家和出入境认可；申根区盖章国家及出入境认可；申根区印章日期提取。对于所提出的管道的每个阶段，我们构建神经网络模型，然后在真实数据和合成数据的混合上进行训练。我们将申根区印章检测和日期、国家/地区、出入境识别模型以及图形用户界面集成到自动旅行模式提取工具的原型中。我们发现，通过将简单的神经网络模型组合到我们提出的管道中，可以创建一个有用的工具，可以显着加快旅行模式的提取速度。 开发基于CNN模型的自动签证印章旅行模式提取系统 Eimantas Ledinauskas,Julius Ruseckas,Julius Marozas,Kasparas Karlauskas,Justas Terentjevas,Augustas Mačijauskas,Alfonsas Juršėnas cs.CV

authors_text: Wei-Cheng Tseng,Po-Han Chi,Jia-Hua Wu,Min Sun
title: Leveraging Sequence Embedding and Convolutional Neural Network for Protein Function Prediction
title_zh: 利用序列嵌入和卷积神经网络进行蛋白质功能预测
comment: Published in NeurIPS 2018 Machine Learning for Molecules and Materials Workshop
comments: Published in NeurIPS 2018 Machine Learning for Molecules and Materials Workshop
abstract: The capability of accurate prediction of protein functions and properties is essential in the biotechnology industry, e.g. drug development and artificial protein synthesis, etc. The main challenges of protein function prediction are the large label space and the lack of labeled training data. Our method leverages unsupervised sequence embedding and the success of deep convolutional neural network to overcome these challenges. In contrast, most of the existing methods delete the rare protein functions to reduce the label space. Furthermore, some existing methods require additional bio-information (e.g., the 3-dimensional structure of the proteins) which is difficult to be determined in biochemical experiments. Our proposed method significantly outperforms the other methods on the publicly available benchmark using only protein sequences as input. This allows the process of identifying protein functions to be sped up.
summary: The capability of accurate prediction of protein functions and properties is essential in the biotechnology industry, e.g. drug development and artificial protein synthesis, etc. The main challenges of protein function prediction are the large label space and the lack of labeled training data. Our method leverages unsupervised sequence embedding and the success of deep convolutional neural network to overcome these challenges. In contrast, most of the existing methods delete the rare protein functions to reduce the label space. Furthermore, some existing methods require additional bio-information (e.g., the 3-dimensional structure of the proteins) which is difficult to be determined in biochemical experiments. Our proposed method significantly outperforms the other methods on the publicly available benchmark using only protein sequences as input. This allows the process of identifying protein functions to be sped up.
abstract_zh: 准确预测蛋白质功能和特性的能力在生物技术行业中至关重要，例如：药物开发和人工蛋白质合成等。蛋白质功能预测的主要挑战是标签空间大和缺乏标记的训练数据。我们的方法利用无监督序列嵌入和深度卷积神经网络的成功来克服这些挑战。相比之下，大多数现有方法删除稀有蛋白质功能以减少标签空间。此外，一些现有方法需要额外的生物信息（例如蛋白质的3维结构），这在生化实验中很难确定。我们提出的方法在仅使用蛋白质序列作为输入的公开基准上显着优于其他方法。这使得识别蛋白质功能的过程得以加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合序列嵌入和卷积神经网络的方法，用于仅基于蛋白质序列预测其功能。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质功能预测面临标签空间庞大和标注数据不足的挑战，现有方法常删除罕见功能或依赖难以获取的生物信息（如3D结构），限制了预测效果。
AI.method: 利用无监督序列嵌入技术提取蛋白质序列特征，并结合深度卷积神经网络进行功能预测，无需额外生物信息或减少标签空间。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上，该方法在仅使用蛋白质序列作为输入时显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用序列信息和深度学习模型，解决了蛋白质功能预测中的关键挑战，加速了功能识别过程。

authors_text: Seong Hyun Kim,Sunwon Jeong,Sungbum Park,Ju Yong Chang
title: Camera Motion Agnostic 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 与相机运动无关的 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: Although the performance of 3D human pose and shape estimation methods has improved significantly in recent years, existing approaches typically generate 3D poses defined in camera or human-centered coordinate system. This makes it difficult to estimate a person's pure pose and motion in world coordinate system for a video captured using a moving camera. To address this issue, this paper presents a camera motion agnostic approach for predicting 3D human pose and mesh defined in the world coordinate system. The core idea of the proposed approach is to estimate the difference between two adjacent global poses (i.e., global motion) that is invariant to selecting the coordinate system, instead of the global pose coupled to the camera motion. To this end, we propose a network based on bidirectional gated recurrent units (GRUs) that predicts the global motion sequence from the local pose sequence consisting of relative rotations of joints called global motion regressor (GMR). We use 3DPW and synthetic datasets, which are constructed in a moving-camera environment, for evaluation. We conduct extensive experiments and prove the effectiveness of the proposed method empirically. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/seonghyunkim1212/GMR
summary: Although the performance of 3D human pose and shape estimation methods has improved significantly in recent years, existing approaches typically generate 3D poses defined in camera or human-centered coordinate system. This makes it difficult to estimate a person's pure pose and motion in world coordinate system for a video captured using a moving camera. To address this issue, this paper presents a camera motion agnostic approach for predicting 3D human pose and mesh defined in the world coordinate system. The core idea of the proposed approach is to estimate the difference between two adjacent global poses (i.e., global motion) that is invariant to selecting the coordinate system, instead of the global pose coupled to the camera motion. To this end, we propose a network based on bidirectional gated recurrent units (GRUs) that predicts the global motion sequence from the local pose sequence consisting of relative rotations of joints called global motion regressor (GMR). We use 3DPW and synthetic datasets, which are constructed in a moving-camera environment, for evaluation. We conduct extensive experiments and prove the effectiveness of the proposed method empirically. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/seonghyunkim1212/GMR
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来 3D 人体姿势和形状估计方法的性能有了显着提高，但现有方法通常生成在相机或以人体为中心的坐标系中定义的 3D 姿势。这使得很难在使用移动摄像机捕获的视频中估计人在世界坐标系中的纯粹姿势和运动。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种与相机运动无关的方法，用于预测世界坐标系中定义的 3D 人体姿势和网格。该方法的核心思想是估计两个相邻全局姿态（即全局运动）之间的差异，该差异对于选择坐标系是不变的，而不是与相机运动耦合的全局姿态。为此，我们提出了一种基于双向门控循环单元（GRU）的网络，该网络从由关节相对旋转组成的局部姿势序列预测全局运动序列，称为全局运动回归器（GMR）。我们使用在移动相机环境中构建的 3DPW 和合成数据集进行评估。我们进行了大量的实验，并凭经验证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/seonghyunkim1212/GMR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种与相机运动无关的3D人体姿态估计方法，能够在世界坐标系中准确预测人体姿态和网格。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的3D姿态依赖于相机或人体中心坐标系，难以在移动相机拍摄的视频中估计世界坐标系下的纯人体运动。
AI.method: 设计基于双向门控循环单元（GRU）的全局运动回归器（GMR），通过预测局部姿态序列的相对关节旋转差异，生成与坐标系无关的全局运动序列。
AI.result: 在3DPW和合成数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验表明该方法能准确估计世界坐标系中的3D姿态。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法解决了相机运动对姿态估计的干扰问题，为复杂场景下的人体运动分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yichun Shen,Wanli Jiang,Zhen Xu,Rundong Li,Junghyun Kwon,Siyi Li
title: Confidence Propagation Cluster: Unleash Full Potential of Object Detectors
title_zh: 置信传播集群：释放物体检测器的全部潜力
abstract: It has been a long history that most object detection methods obtain objects by using the non-maximum suppression (NMS) and its improved versions like Soft-NMS to remove redundant bounding boxes. We challenge those NMS-based methods from three aspects: 1) The bounding box with highest confidence value may not be the true positive having the biggest overlap with the ground-truth box. 2) Not only suppression is required for redundant boxes, but also confidence enhancement is needed for those true positives. 3) Sorting candidate boxes by confidence values is not necessary so that full parallelism is achievable. In this paper, inspired by belief propagation (BP), we propose the Confidence Propagation Cluster (CP-Cluster) to replace NMS-based methods, which is fully parallelizable as well as better in accuracy. In CP-Cluster, we borrow the message passing mechanism from BP to penalize redundant boxes and enhance true positives simultaneously in an iterative way until convergence. We verified the effectiveness of CP-Cluster by applying it to various mainstream detectors such as FasterRCNN, SSD, FCOS, YOLOv3, YOLOv5, Centernet etc. Experiments on MS COCO show that our plug and play method, without retraining detectors, is able to steadily improve average mAP of all those state-of-the-art models with a clear margin from 0.3 to 1.9 respectively when compared with NMS-based methods.
summary: It has been a long history that most object detection methods obtain objects by using the non-maximum suppression (NMS) and its improved versions like Soft-NMS to remove redundant bounding boxes. We challenge those NMS-based methods from three aspects: 1) The bounding box with highest confidence value may not be the true positive having the biggest overlap with the ground-truth box. 2) Not only suppression is required for redundant boxes, but also confidence enhancement is needed for those true positives. 3) Sorting candidate boxes by confidence values is not necessary so that full parallelism is achievable. In this paper, inspired by belief propagation (BP), we propose the Confidence Propagation Cluster (CP-Cluster) to replace NMS-based methods, which is fully parallelizable as well as better in accuracy. In CP-Cluster, we borrow the message passing mechanism from BP to penalize redundant boxes and enhance true positives simultaneously in an iterative way until convergence. We verified the effectiveness of CP-Cluster by applying it to various mainstream detectors such as FasterRCNN, SSD, FCOS, YOLOv3, YOLOv5, Centernet etc. Experiments on MS COCO show that our plug and play method, without retraining detectors, is able to steadily improve average mAP of all those state-of-the-art models with a clear margin from 0.3 to 1.9 respectively when compared with NMS-based methods.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，大多数目标检测方法都是通过使用非极大值抑制（NMS）及其改进版本（如 Soft-NMS）来去除冗余边界框来获取目标。我们从三个方面挑战那些基于 NMS 的方法：1）具有最高置信值的边界框可能不是与地面实况框重叠最大的真阳性。 2）不仅需要对冗余框进行抑制，还需要对那些真阳性进行置信度增强。 3）不需要按置信度值对候选框进行排序，这样就可以实现完全并行。在本文中，受置信传播（BP）的启发，我们提出了置信传播集群（CP-Cluster）来替代基于 NMS 的方法，该方法完全可并行化且精度更高。在CP-Cluster中，我们借用BP的消息传递机制，以迭代的方式同时惩罚冗余框并增强真阳性，直至收敛。我们通过将 CP-Cluster 应用于各种主流检测器（例如 FasterRCNN、SSD、FCOS、YOLOv3、YOLOv5、Centernet 等）来验证 CP-Cluster 的有效性。在 MS COCO 上的实验表明，我们的即插即用方法在不重新训练检测器的情况下能够稳定地提高所有这些最先进模型的平均 mAP，与基于 NMS 的方法相比，其明显裕度分别从 0.3 到 1.9。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Confidence Propagation Cluster（CP-Cluster）的新方法，用于替代传统目标检测中的非极大值抑制（NMS）技术，以提升检测精度和并行效率。
AI.motivation: 传统NMS方法存在三大缺陷：最高置信度框未必与真实框重叠最大、需同时增强真实正样本置信度、按置信度排序限制了并行性。本文旨在挑战这些限制，挖掘检测器的潜力。
AI.method: 受信念传播（BP）启发，设计迭代的消息传递机制，通过惩罚冗余框并增强真实正样本置信度，实现完全并行化的聚类过程。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，CP-Cluster在无需重训练的情况下，使FasterRCNN、YOLOv3等主流检测器的平均mAP提升0.3-1.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: CP-Cluster通过并行化与置信度传播机制有效解决了NMS的局限性，在保持检测精度的同时显著提升了计算效率。
