search_text: Confidence Propagation Cluster: Unleash Full Potential of Object Detectors 置信传播集群：释放物体检测器的全部潜力 It has been a long history that most object detection methods obtain objects by using the non-maximum suppression (NMS) and its improved versions like Soft-NMS to remove redundant bounding boxes. We challenge those NMS-based methods from three aspects: 1) The bounding box with highest confidence value may not be the true positive having the biggest overlap with the ground-truth box. 2) Not only suppression is required for redundant boxes, but also confidence enhancement is needed for those true positives. 3) Sorting candidate boxes by confidence values is not necessary so that full parallelism is achievable. In this paper, inspired by belief propagation (BP), we propose the Confidence Propagation Cluster (CP-Cluster) to replace NMS-based methods, which is fully parallelizable as well as better in accuracy. In CP-Cluster, we borrow the message passing mechanism from BP to penalize redundant boxes and enhance true positives simultaneously in an iterative way until convergence. We verified the effectiveness of CP-Cluster by applying it to various mainstream detectors such as FasterRCNN, SSD, FCOS, YOLOv3, YOLOv5, Centernet etc. Experiments on MS COCO show that our plug and play method, without retraining detectors, is able to steadily improve average mAP of all those state-of-the-art models with a clear margin from 0.3 to 1.9 respectively when compared with NMS-based methods. 长期以来，大多数目标检测方法都是通过使用非极大值抑制（NMS）及其改进版本（如 Soft-NMS）来去除冗余边界框来获取目标。我们从三个方面挑战那些基于 NMS 的方法：1）具有最高置信值的边界框可能不是与地面实况框重叠最大的真阳性。 2）不仅需要对冗余框进行抑制，还需要对那些真阳性进行置信度增强。 3）不需要按置信度值对候选框进行排序，这样就可以实现完全并行。在本文中，受置信传播（BP）的启发，我们提出了置信传播集群（CP-Cluster）来替代基于 NMS 的方法，该方法完全可并行化且精度更高。在CP-Cluster中，我们借用BP的消息传递机制，以迭代的方式同时惩罚冗余框并增强真阳性，直至收敛。我们通过将 CP-Cluster 应用于各种主流检测器（例如 FasterRCNN、SSD、FCOS、YOLOv3、YOLOv5、Centernet 等）来验证 CP-Cluster 的有效性。在 MS COCO 上的实验表明，我们的即插即用方法在不重新训练检测器的情况下能够稳定地提高所有这些最先进模型的平均 mAP，与基于 NMS 的方法相比，其明显裕度分别从 0.3 到 1.9。 本文提出一种名为Confidence Propagation Cluster（CP-Cluster）的新方法，用于替代传统目标检测中的非极大值抑制（NMS）技术，以提升检测精度和并行效率。 Yichun Shen,Wanli Jiang,Zhen Xu,Rundong Li,Junghyun Kwon,Siyi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Jihyo Kim,Jiin Koo,Sangheum Hwang
title: A Unified Benchmark for the Unknown Detection Capability of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络未知检测能力的统一基准
abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved outstanding performance over various tasks, but they have a critical issue: over-confident predictions even for completely unknown samples. Many studies have been proposed to successfully filter out these unknown samples, but they only considered narrow and specific tasks, referred to as misclassification detection, open-set recognition, or out-of-distribution detection. In this work, we argue that these tasks should be treated as fundamentally an identical problem because an ideal model should possess detection capability for all those tasks. Therefore, we introduce the unknown detection task, an integration of previous individual tasks, for a rigorous examination of the detection capability of deep neural networks on a wide spectrum of unknown samples. To this end, unified benchmark datasets on different scales were constructed and the unknown detection capabilities of existing popular methods were subject to comparison. We found that Deep Ensemble consistently outperforms the other approaches in detecting unknowns; however, all methods are only successful for a specific type of unknown. The reproducible code and benchmark datasets are available at https://github.com/daintlab/unknown-detection-benchmarks .
summary: Deep neural networks have achieved outstanding performance over various tasks, but they have a critical issue: over-confident predictions even for completely unknown samples. Many studies have been proposed to successfully filter out these unknown samples, but they only considered narrow and specific tasks, referred to as misclassification detection, open-set recognition, or out-of-distribution detection. In this work, we argue that these tasks should be treated as fundamentally an identical problem because an ideal model should possess detection capability for all those tasks. Therefore, we introduce the unknown detection task, an integration of previous individual tasks, for a rigorous examination of the detection capability of deep neural networks on a wide spectrum of unknown samples. To this end, unified benchmark datasets on different scales were constructed and the unknown detection capabilities of existing popular methods were subject to comparison. We found that Deep Ensemble consistently outperforms the other approaches in detecting unknowns; however, all methods are only successful for a specific type of unknown. The reproducible code and benchmark datasets are available at https://github.com/daintlab/unknown-detection-benchmarks .
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在各种任务上都取得了出色的性能，但它们有一个关键问题：即使对于完全未知的样本，预测也过于自信。已经提出了许多研究来成功过滤掉这些未知样本，但它们只考虑了狭窄和特定的任务，称为错误分类检测、开放集识别或分布外检测。在这项工作中，我们认为这些任务应该被视为本质上相同的问题，因为理想的模型应该具备所有这些任务的检测能力。因此，我们引入了未知检测任务，整合了之前的各个任务，以严格检验深度神经网络对广泛的未知样本的检测能力。为此，构建了不同尺度的统一基准数据集，并对现有流行方法的未知检测能力进行了比较。我们发现 Deep Ensemble 在检测未知数方面始终优于其他方法；然而，所有方法仅对特定类型的未知物有效。可重现的代码和基准数据集可在 https://github.com/daintlab/unknown-detection-benchmarks 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一基准，用于严格评估深度神经网络在多种未知样本上的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有未知样本检测方法局限于特定任务（如误分类检测、开放集识别），缺乏对模型综合检测能力的统一评估。
AI.method: 整合多种未知检测任务，构建不同规模的统一基准数据集，系统比较现有主流方法的检测性能。
AI.result: Deep Ensemble方法在检测未知样本上表现最优，但所有方法均仅对特定类型的未知样本有效。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更通用的模型以应对多样化未知样本，统一基准为未来研究提供了可复现的评估框架。

authors_text: Jie Zhu,Bo Peng,Wanqing Li,Haifeng Shen,Zhe Zhang,Jianjun Lei
title: Multi-View Stereo with Transformer
title_zh: 带 Transformer 的多视图立体
abstract: This paper proposes a network, referred to as MVSTR, for Multi-View Stereo (MVS). It is built upon Transformer and is capable of extracting dense features with global context and 3D consistency, which are crucial to achieving reliable matching for MVS. Specifically, to tackle the problem of the limited receptive field of existing CNN-based MVS methods, a global-context Transformer module is first proposed to explore intra-view global context. In addition, to further enable dense features to be 3D-consistent, a 3D-geometry Transformer module is built with a well-designed cross-view attention mechanism to facilitate inter-view information interaction. Experimental results show that the proposed MVSTR achieves the best overall performance on the DTU dataset and strong generalization on the Tanks & Temples benchmark dataset.
summary: This paper proposes a network, referred to as MVSTR, for Multi-View Stereo (MVS). It is built upon Transformer and is capable of extracting dense features with global context and 3D consistency, which are crucial to achieving reliable matching for MVS. Specifically, to tackle the problem of the limited receptive field of existing CNN-based MVS methods, a global-context Transformer module is first proposed to explore intra-view global context. In addition, to further enable dense features to be 3D-consistent, a 3D-geometry Transformer module is built with a well-designed cross-view attention mechanism to facilitate inter-view information interaction. Experimental results show that the proposed MVSTR achieves the best overall performance on the DTU dataset and strong generalization on the Tanks & Temples benchmark dataset.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多视图立体 (MVS) 的网络，称为 MVSTR。它基于 Transformer 构建，能够提取具有全局上下文和 3D 一致性的密集特征，这对于实现 MVS 的可靠匹配至关重要。具体来说，为了解决现有基于 CNN 的 MVS 方法的感受野有限的问题，首先提出了全局上下文 Transformer 模块来探索视图内全局上下文。此外，为了进一步使密集特征保持3D一致性，构建了3D几何Transformer模块，并采用精心设计的跨视图注意机制，以促进视图间信息交互。实验结果表明，所提出的 MVSTR 在 DTU 数据集上实现了最佳的整体性能，并在 Tanks & Temples 基准数据集上实现了很强的泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多视角立体视觉网络MVSTR，通过全局上下文和3D一致性特征提取提升匹配可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN-based MVS方法存在感受野有限、3D一致性不足的问题，难以实现高精度的密集特征匹配。
AI.method: 设计全局-上下文Transformer模块提取单视角全局特征，并构建3D-几何Transformer模块通过跨视角注意力机制实现多视角特征交互。
AI.result: 在DTU数据集上取得最优整体性能，在Tanks & Temples基准数据集展现强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MVSTR通过Transformer架构有效解决了MVS中的全局上下文建模与3D一致性问题，验证了Transformer在立体视觉任务中的优势。

conclusion: MVSTR通过Transformer架构有效解决了MVS中的全局上下文建模与3D一致性问题，验证了Transformer在立体视觉任务中的优势。
search_text: Multi-View Stereo with Transformer 带 Transformer 的多视图立体 This paper proposes a network, referred to as MVSTR, for Multi-View Stereo (MVS). It is built upon Transformer and is capable of extracting dense features with global context and 3D consistency, which are crucial to achieving reliable matching for MVS. Specifically, to tackle the problem of the limited receptive field of existing CNN-based MVS methods, a global-context Transformer module is first proposed to explore intra-view global context. In addition, to further enable dense features to be 3D-consistent, a 3D-geometry Transformer module is built with a well-designed cross-view attention mechanism to facilitate inter-view information interaction. Experimental results show that the proposed MVSTR achieves the best overall performance on the DTU dataset and strong generalization on the Tanks & Temples benchmark dataset. 本文提出了一种用于多视图立体 (MVS) 的网络，称为 MVSTR。它基于 Transformer 构建，能够提取具有全局上下文和 3D 一致性的密集特征，这对于实现 MVS 的可靠匹配至关重要。具体来说，为了解决现有基于 CNN 的 MVS 方法的感受野有限的问题，首先提出了全局上下文 Transformer 模块来探索视图内全局上下文。此外，为了进一步使密集特征保持3D一致性，构建了3D几何Transformer模块，并采用精心设计的跨视图注意机制，以促进视图间信息交互。实验结果表明，所提出的 MVSTR 在 DTU 数据集上实现了最佳的整体性能，并在 Tanks & Temples 基准数据集上实现了很强的泛化性。 本文提出基于Transformer的多视角立体视觉网络MVSTR，通过全局上下文和3D一致性特征提取提升匹配可靠性。 Jie Zhu,Bo Peng,Wanqing Li,Haifeng Shen,Zhe Zhang,Jianjun Lei cs.CV

authors_text: Angelos Chatzimparmpas,Rafael M. Martins,Andreas Kerren
title: VisRuler: Visual Analytics for Extracting Decision Rules from Bagged and Boosted Decision Trees
title_zh: VisRuler：用于从袋装和提升决策树中提取决策规则的可视化分析
comment: This manuscript is accepted for publication in the Information Visualization (IV) - SAGE Journals
comments: This manuscript is accepted for publication in the Information Visualization (IV) - SAGE Journals
abstract: Bagging and boosting are two popular ensemble methods in machine learning (ML) that produce many individual decision trees. Due to the inherent ensemble characteristic of these methods, they typically outperform single decision trees or other ML models in predictive performance. However, numerous decision paths are generated for each decision tree, increasing the overall complexity of the model and hindering its use in domains that require trustworthy and explainable decisions, such as finance, social care, and health care. Thus, the interpretability of bagging and boosting algorithms, such as random forest and adaptive boosting, reduces as the number of decisions rises. In this paper, we propose a visual analytics tool that aims to assist users in extracting decisions from such ML models via a thorough visual inspection workflow that includes selecting a set of robust and diverse models (originating from different ensemble learning algorithms), choosing important features according to their global contribution, and deciding which decisions are essential for global explanation (or locally, for specific cases). The outcome is a final decision based on the class agreement of several models and the explored manual decisions exported by users. We evaluated the applicability and effectiveness of VisRuler via a use case, a usage scenario, and a user study. The evaluation revealed that most users managed to successfully use our system to explore decision rules visually, performing the proposed tasks and answering the given questions in a satisfying way.
summary: Bagging and boosting are two popular ensemble methods in machine learning (ML) that produce many individual decision trees. Due to the inherent ensemble characteristic of these methods, they typically outperform single decision trees or other ML models in predictive performance. However, numerous decision paths are generated for each decision tree, increasing the overall complexity of the model and hindering its use in domains that require trustworthy and explainable decisions, such as finance, social care, and health care. Thus, the interpretability of bagging and boosting algorithms, such as random forest and adaptive boosting, reduces as the number of decisions rises. In this paper, we propose a visual analytics tool that aims to assist users in extracting decisions from such ML models via a thorough visual inspection workflow that includes selecting a set of robust and diverse models (originating from different ensemble learning algorithms), choosing important features according to their global contribution, and deciding which decisions are essential for global explanation (or locally, for specific cases). The outcome is a final decision based on the class agreement of several models and the explored manual decisions exported by users. We evaluated the applicability and effectiveness of VisRuler via a use case, a usage scenario, and a user study. The evaluation revealed that most users managed to successfully use our system to explore decision rules visually, performing the proposed tasks and answering the given questions in a satisfying way.
abstract_zh: Bagging 和 boosting 是机器学习 (ML) 中两种流行的集成方法，可生成许多单独的决策树。由于这些方法固有的集成特性，它们在预测性能方面通常优于单个决策树或其他机器学习模型。然而，每个决策树都会生成大量决策路径，增加了模型的整体复杂性，并阻碍了其在需要可信和可解释决策的领域（例如金融、社会保健和医疗保健）的使用。因此，bagging 和 boosting 算法（例如随机森林和自适应 boosting）的可解释性随着决策数量的增加而降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种可视化分析工具，旨在帮助用户通过彻底的视觉检查工作流程从此类 ML 模型中提取决策，其中包括选择一组稳健且多样化的模型（源自不同的集成学习算法），根据其全局贡献选择重要特征，以及决定哪些决策对于全局解释（或局部，对于特定情况）至关重要。结果是基于多个模型的类别协议和用户导出的探索的手动决策的最终决策。我们通过用例、使用场景和用户研究评估了 VisRuler 的适用性和有效性。评估显示，大多数用户成功地使用我们的系统直观地探索决策规则，执行建议的任务并以令人满意的方式回答给定的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VisRuler工具，通过可视化分析从集成决策树模型中提取可解释的决策规则。
AI.motivation: Bagging和Boosting等集成方法虽提升预测性能，但生成大量决策路径导致模型复杂度高，难以满足金融、医疗等需要可解释性的领域需求。
AI.method: 设计包含模型选择、特征筛选和决策规则验证的可视化工作流，结合多模型共识与用户手动决策生成最终规则。
AI.result: 通过案例分析、使用场景和用户研究验证，多数用户能有效利用VisRuler完成决策规则探索任务。
AI.conclusion: VisRuler为集成决策树模型提供了可视化解释框架，有助于提升模型在需要可解释性场景下的应用价值。

authors_text: Zhehui Wang,Tao Luo,Rick Siow Mong Goh,Wei Zhang,Weng-Fai Wong
title: Optimizing for In-memory Deep Learning with Emerging Memory Technology
title_zh: 利用新兴内存技术优化内存深度学习
abstract: In-memory deep learning computes neural network models where they are stored, thus avoiding long distance communication between memory and computation units, resulting in considerable savings in energy and time. In-memory deep learning has already demonstrated orders of magnitude higher performance density and energy efficiency. The use of emerging memory technology promises to increase the gains in density, energy, and performance even further. However, emerging memory technology is intrinsically unstable, resulting in random fluctuations of data reads. This can translate to non-negligible accuracy loss, potentially nullifying the gains. In this paper, we propose three optimization techniques that can mathematically overcome the instability problem of emerging memory technology. They can improve the accuracy of the in-memory deep learning model while maximizing its energy efficiency. Experiments show that our solution can fully recover most models' state-of-the-art accuracy, and achieves at least an order of magnitude higher energy efficiency than the state-of-the-art.
summary: In-memory deep learning computes neural network models where they are stored, thus avoiding long distance communication between memory and computation units, resulting in considerable savings in energy and time. In-memory deep learning has already demonstrated orders of magnitude higher performance density and energy efficiency. The use of emerging memory technology promises to increase the gains in density, energy, and performance even further. However, emerging memory technology is intrinsically unstable, resulting in random fluctuations of data reads. This can translate to non-negligible accuracy loss, potentially nullifying the gains. In this paper, we propose three optimization techniques that can mathematically overcome the instability problem of emerging memory technology. They can improve the accuracy of the in-memory deep learning model while maximizing its energy efficiency. Experiments show that our solution can fully recover most models' state-of-the-art accuracy, and achieves at least an order of magnitude higher energy efficiency than the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 内存深度学习在存储神经网络模型的地方进行计算，从而避免了内存和计算单元之间的长距离通信，从而节省了大量的能源和时间。内存深度学习已经证明了性能密度和能源效率提高了几个数量级。新兴内存技术的使用有望进一步提高密度、能量和性能。然而，新兴的内存技术本质上不稳定，导致数据读取的随机波动。这可能会导致不可忽略的准确性损失，并可能抵消收益。在本文中，我们提出了三种优化技术，可以从数学上克服新兴存储技术的不稳定问题。它们可以提高内存深度学习模型的准确性，同时最大限度地提高其能源效率。实验表明，我们的解决方案可以完全恢复大多数模型的最先进的精度，并且比最先进的模型实现至少一个数量级的能源效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种优化技术，解决新兴内存技术在内存中深度学习中的不稳定性问题，提升模型精度和能效。
AI.motivation: 新兴内存技术虽能提升内存计算的性能密度和能效，但其固有的不稳定性会导致数据读取波动，进而引发模型精度显著下降，抵消性能优势。
AI.method: 通过数学方法设计三种优化技术，在保持能效优势的同时，补偿新兴内存技术的不稳定性对模型精度的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方案可恢复大多数模型的最先进精度，并实现比现有方法高一个数量级的能效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化技术有效解决了新兴内存技术的不稳定性问题，为内存计算深度学习的实用化提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Jia-Li Yin,Lehui Xie,Wanqing Zhu,Ximeng Liu,Bo-Hao Chen
title: Push Stricter to Decide Better: A Class-Conditional Feature Adaptive Framework for Improving Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 推动更严格以做出更好的决策：用于提高对抗鲁棒性的类条件特征自适应框架
abstract: In response to the threat of adversarial examples, adversarial training provides an attractive option for enhancing the model robustness by training models on online-augmented adversarial examples. However, most of the existing adversarial training methods focus on improving the robust accuracy by strengthening the adversarial examples but neglecting the increasing shift between natural data and adversarial examples, leading to a dramatic decrease in natural accuracy. To maintain the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy, we alleviate the shift from the perspective of feature adaption and propose a Feature Adaptive Adversarial Training (FAAT) optimizing the class-conditional feature adaption across natural data and adversarial examples. Specifically, we propose to incorporate a class-conditional discriminator to encourage the features become (1) class-discriminative and (2) invariant to the change of adversarial attacks. The novel FAAT framework enables the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy by generating features with similar distribution across natural and adversarial data, and achieve higher overall robustness benefited from the class-discriminative feature characteristics. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that FAAT produces more discriminative features and performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/VisionFlow/FAAT.
summary: In response to the threat of adversarial examples, adversarial training provides an attractive option for enhancing the model robustness by training models on online-augmented adversarial examples. To maintain the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy, we alleviate the shift from the perspective of feature adaption and propose a Feature Adaptive Adversarial Training (FAAT) optimizing the class-conditional feature adaption across natural data and adversarial examples. Specifically, we propose to incorporate a class-conditional discriminator to encourage the features become (1) class-discriminative and (2) invariant to the change of adversarial attacks. The novel FAAT framework enables the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy by generating features with similar distribution across natural and adversarial data, and achieve higher overall robustness benefited from the class-discriminative feature characteristics. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that FAAT produces more discriminative features and performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/VisionFlow/FAAT.
abstract_zh: 为了应对对抗性示例的威胁，对抗性训练提供了一种有吸引力的选择，通过在线增强对抗性示例上训练模型来增强模型的鲁棒性。然而，现有的对抗训练方法大多侧重于通过加强对抗样本来提高鲁棒精度，却忽略了自然数据和对抗样本之间不断增加的转变，导致自然精度急剧下降。为了保持自然准确度和鲁棒准确度之间的权衡，我们从特征适应的角度减轻了这种转变，并提出了一种特征自适应对抗训练（FAAT），优化自然数据和对抗样本之间的类条件特征适应。具体来说，我们建议合并一个类别条件判别器，以鼓励特征变得（1）类别判别性和（2）对抗性攻击的变化不变。新颖的 FAAT 框架通过在自然数据和对抗性数据中生成具有相似分布的特征，实现了自然精度和鲁棒精度之间的权衡，并受益于类判别特征特征，实现了更高的整体鲁棒性。对各种数据集的实验表明，FAAT 可以产生更具辨别力的特征，并且与最先进的方法相比表现更佳。代码可在 https://github.com/VisionFlow/FAAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类条件特征自适应的对抗训练框架FAAT，通过缩小自然数据与对抗样本之间的特征分布差异，提升模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法过度关注增强对抗样本强度，忽视了自然数据与对抗样本间的分布偏移问题，导致自然准确率显著下降，亟需平衡两者性能。
AI.method: 设计类条件判别器，强制特征满足两类约束：1）类间可区分性 2）对抗攻击不变性，通过特征自适应优化实现自然与对抗数据的分布对齐。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证FAAT生成的特征更具判别性，相较现有方法在鲁棒性指标上表现更优，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FAAT通过特征分布对齐有效缓解了自然准确率与鲁棒性间的矛盾，为对抗训练提供了新的思路和解决方案。

search_text: Push Stricter to Decide Better: A Class-Conditional Feature Adaptive Framework for Improving Adversarial Robustness 推动更严格以做出更好的决策：用于提高对抗鲁棒性的类条件特征自适应框架 In response to the threat of adversarial examples, adversarial training provides an attractive option for enhancing the model robustness by training models on online-augmented adversarial examples. However, most of the existing adversarial training methods focus on improving the robust accuracy by strengthening the adversarial examples but neglecting the increasing shift between natural data and adversarial examples, leading to a dramatic decrease in natural accuracy. To maintain the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy, we alleviate the shift from the perspective of feature adaption and propose a Feature Adaptive Adversarial Training (FAAT) optimizing the class-conditional feature adaption across natural data and adversarial examples. Specifically, we propose to incorporate a class-conditional discriminator to encourage the features become (1) class-discriminative and (2) invariant to the change of adversarial attacks. The novel FAAT framework enables the trade-off between natural and robust accuracy by generating features with similar distribution across natural and adversarial data, and achieve higher overall robustness benefited from the class-discriminative feature characteristics. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that FAAT produces more discriminative features and performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/VisionFlow/FAAT. 为了应对对抗性示例的威胁，对抗性训练提供了一种有吸引力的选择，通过在线增强对抗性示例上训练模型来增强模型的鲁棒性。然而，现有的对抗训练方法大多侧重于通过加强对抗样本来提高鲁棒精度，却忽略了自然数据和对抗样本之间不断增加的转变，导致自然精度急剧下降。为了保持自然准确度和鲁棒准确度之间的权衡，我们从特征适应的角度减轻了这种转变，并提出了一种特征自适应对抗训练（FAAT），优化自然数据和对抗样本之间的类条件特征适应。具体来说，我们建议合并一个类别条件判别器，以鼓励特征变得（1）类别判别性和（2）对抗性攻击的变化不变。新颖的 FAAT 框架通过在自然数据和对抗性数据中生成具有相似分布的特征，实现了自然精度和鲁棒精度之间的权衡，并受益于类判别特征特征，实现了更高的整体鲁棒性。对各种数据集的实验表明，FAAT 可以产生更具辨别力的特征，并且与最先进的方法相比表现更佳。代码可在 https://github.com/VisionFlow/FAAT 获取。 本文提出一种基于类条件特征自适应的对抗训练框架FAAT，通过缩小自然数据与对抗样本之间的特征分布差异，提升模型的鲁棒性。 Jia-Li Yin,Lehui Xie,Wanqing Zhu,Ximeng Liu,Bo-Hao Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Danila Rukhovich,Anna Vorontsova,Anton Konushin
title: FCAF3D: Fully Convolutional Anchor-Free 3D Object Detection
title_zh: FCAF3D：全卷积无锚 3D 物体检测
abstract: Recently, promising applications in robotics and augmented reality have attracted considerable attention to 3D object detection from point clouds. In this paper, we present FCAF3D - a first-in-class fully convolutional anchor-free indoor 3D object detection method. It is a simple yet effective method that uses a voxel representation of a point cloud and processes voxels with sparse convolutions. FCAF3D can handle large-scale scenes with minimal runtime through a single fully convolutional feed-forward pass. Existing 3D object detection methods make prior assumptions on the geometry of objects, and we argue that it limits their generalization ability. To get rid of any prior assumptions, we propose a novel parametrization of oriented bounding boxes that allows obtaining better results in a purely data-driven way. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art 3D object detection results in terms of mAP@0.5 on ScanNet V2 (+4.5), SUN RGB-D (+3.5), and S3DIS (+20.5) datasets. The code and models are available at https://github.com/samsunglabs/fcaf3d.
summary: Recently, promising applications in robotics and augmented reality have attracted considerable attention to 3D object detection from point clouds. In this paper, we present FCAF3D - a first-in-class fully convolutional anchor-free indoor 3D object detection method. It is a simple yet effective method that uses a voxel representation of a point cloud and processes voxels with sparse convolutions. FCAF3D can handle large-scale scenes with minimal runtime through a single fully convolutional feed-forward pass. Existing 3D object detection methods make prior assumptions on the geometry of objects, and we argue that it limits their generalization ability. To get rid of any prior assumptions, we propose a novel parametrization of oriented bounding boxes that allows obtaining better results in a purely data-driven way. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art 3D object detection results in terms of mAP@0.5 on ScanNet V2 (+4.5), SUN RGB-D (+3.5), and S3DIS (+20.5) datasets. The code and models are available at https://github.com/samsunglabs/fcaf3d.
abstract_zh: 最近，点云 3D 物体检测在机器人和增强现实领域的前景广阔的应用引起了人们的广泛关注。在本文中，我们提出了 FCAF3D——一种一流的全卷积无锚室内 3D 物体检测方法。这是一种简单而有效的方法，使用点云的体素表示并通过稀疏卷积处理体素。 FCAF3D 可以通过单个全卷积前馈通道以最短的运行时间处理大规模场景。现有的 3D 物体检测方法对物体的几何形状做出预先假设，我们认为这限制了它们的泛化能力。为了摆脱任何先前的假设，我们提出了一种新颖的定向边界框参数化，它允许以纯粹数据驱动的方式获得更好的结果。所提出的方法在 ScanNet V2 (+4.5)、SUN RGB-D (+3.5) 和 S3DIS (+20.5) 数据集上实现了最先进的 3D 物体检测结果（mAP@0.5）。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/samsunglabs/fcaf3d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FCAF3D，一种基于体素表示和稀疏卷积的室内3D目标检测方法，无需先验几何假设。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测方法依赖物体几何先验假设，限制了泛化能力，需通过数据驱动方式摆脱此类限制。
AI.method: 采用体素表示与稀疏卷积处理点云，设计无锚点的全卷积网络，并提出新的有向包围盒参数化方法。
AI.result: 在ScanNet V2（+4.5）、SUN RGB-D（+3.5）、S3DIS（+20.5）数据集上达到SOTA的mAP@0.5性能。
AI.conclusion: FCAF3D通过数据驱动的无锚点设计提升了3D检测性能，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Siu-Wing Cheng
title: Multistage Online Maxmin Allocation of Indivisible Entities
title_zh: 不可分割实体的多阶段在线最大最小分配
abstract: We consider an online allocation problem that involves a set $P$ of $n$ players and a set $E$ of $m$ indivisible entities over discrete time steps $1,2,\ldots,τ$. At each time step $t \in [1,τ]$, for every entity $e \in E$, there is a restriction list $L_t(e)$ that prescribes the subset of players to whom $e$ can be assigned and a non-negative value $v_t(e,p)$ of $e$ to every player $p \in P$. The sets $P$ and $E$ are fixed beforehand. The sets $L_t(\cdot)$ and values $v_t(\cdot,\cdot)$ are given in an online fashion. An allocation is a distribution of $E$ among $P$, and we are interested in the minimum total value of the entities received by a player according to the allocation. In the static case, it is NP-hard to find an optimal allocation the maximizes this minimum value. On the other hand, $ρ$-approximation algorithms have been developed for certain values of $ρ\in (0,1]$. We propose a $w$-lookahead algorithm for the multistage online maxmin allocation problem for any fixed $w \geq 1$ in which the restriction lists and values of entities may change between time steps, and there is a fixed stability reward for an entity to be assigned to the same player from one time step to the next. The objective is to maximize the sum of the minimum values and stability rewards over the time steps $1, 2, \ldots, τ$. Our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $(1-c)ρ$, where $c$ is the positive root of the equation $wc^2 = ρ(w+1)(1-c)$. When $w = 1$, it is greater than $\fracρ{4ρ+2} + \fracρ{10}$, which improves upon the previous ratio of $\fracρ{4ρ+2 - 2^{1-τ}(2ρ+1)}$ obtained for the case of 1-lookahead.
summary: We consider an online allocation problem that involves a set $P$ of $n$ players and a set $E$ of $m$ indivisible entities over discrete time steps $1,2,\ldots,τ$. At each time step $t \in [1,τ]$, for every entity $e \in E$, there is a restriction list $L_t(e)$ that prescribes the subset of players to whom $e$ can be assigned and a non-negative value $v_t(e,p)$ of $e$ to every player $p \in P$. The sets $P$ and $E$ are fixed beforehand. The sets $L_t(\cdot)$ and values $v_t(\cdot,\cdot)$ are given in an online fashion. An allocation is a distribution of $E$ among $P$, and we are interested in the minimum total value of the entities received by a player according to the allocation. In the static case, it is NP-hard to find an optimal allocation the maximizes this minimum value. On the other hand, $ρ$-approximation algorithms have been developed for certain values of $ρ\in (0,1]$. We propose a $w$-lookahead algorithm for the multistage online maxmin allocation problem for any fixed $w \geq 1$ in which the restriction lists and values of entities may change between time steps, and there is a fixed stability reward for an entity to be assigned to the same player from one time step to the next. The objective is to maximize the sum of the minimum values and stability rewards over the time steps $1, 2, \ldots, τ$. Our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $(1-c)ρ$, where $c$ is the positive root of the equation $wc^2 = ρ(w+1)(1-c)$. When $w = 1$, it is greater than $\fracρ{4ρ+2} + \fracρ{10}$, which improves upon the previous ratio of $\fracρ{4ρ+2 - 2^{1-τ}(2ρ+1)}$ obtained for the case of 1-lookahead.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个在线分配问题，该问题涉及离散时间步 $1,2,\ldots,τ$ 上的一组 $P$ 的 $n$ 玩家和一组 $E$ 的 $m$ 个不可分割的实体。在每个时间步 $t \in [1,τ]$，对于每个实体 $e \in E$，都有一个限制列表 $L_t(e)$，它规定了可以分配 $e$ 的玩家子集，以及每个玩家 $p \in P$ 的非负值 $e$ $v_t(e,p)$。集合$P$和$E$是预先固定的。集合 $L_t(\cdot)$ 和值 $v_t(\cdot,\cdot)$ 以在线方式给出。分配是 $E$ 在 $P$ 之间的分配，我们感兴趣的是玩家根据分配收到的实体的最小总价值。在静态情况下，找到最大化该最小值的最佳分配是 NP 困难的。另一方面，针对 $ρ\in (0,1]$ 的某些值开发了 $ρ$ 近似算法。我们针对任何固定 $w \geq 1$ 的多级在线 maxmin 分配问题提出了一种 $w$-lookahead 算法，其中实体的限制列表和值可能在时间步之间变化，并且从一个时间步到下一个时间步分配给同一玩家的实体有固定的稳定性奖励。目标是最大化最小值和稳定性的总和在时间步 $1, 2, \ldots, τ$ 上的奖励。我们的算法实现了 $(1-c)ρ$ 的竞争比，其中 $c$ 是方程 $wc^2 = ρ(w+1)(1-c)$ 的正根。当 $w = 1$ 时，它大于 $\fracρ{4ρ+2} + \fracρ{10}$，这比之前的 $\fracρ{4ρ+2 - 2^{1-τ}(2ρ+1)}$ 在 1-lookahead 的情况下获得。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多阶段在线不可分实体的最大最小分配问题，旨在通过考虑稳定性奖励和动态变化的限制列表，最大化玩家获得的最小总价值。
AI.motivation: 静态情况下该问题已被证明为NP难，现有算法的近似比有限，且未充分考虑实体分配稳定性对长期收益的影响。
AI.method: 提出一种基于w-lookahead的算法，结合未来w步的限制列表和价值变化，通过求解二次方程确定竞争比，平衡当前分配与长期稳定性奖励。
AI.result: 算法竞争比达到(1-c)ρ（c为方程根），当w=1时比现有结果提升，具体比值为ρ/(4ρ+2)+ρ/10。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入稳定性奖励和动态lookahead机制，该算法在多阶段在线分配问题中实现了更优的近似比，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Multistage Online Maxmin Allocation of Indivisible Entities 不可分割实体的多阶段在线最大最小分配 We consider an online allocation problem that involves a set $P$ of $n$ players and a set $E$ of $m$ indivisible entities over discrete time steps $1,2,\ldots,τ$. At each time step $t \in [1,τ]$, for every entity $e \in E$, there is a restriction list $L_t(e)$ that prescribes the subset of players to whom $e$ can be assigned and a non-negative value $v_t(e,p)$ of $e$ to every player $p \in P$. The sets $P$ and $E$ are fixed beforehand. The sets $L_t(\cdot)$ and values $v_t(\cdot,\cdot)$ are given in an online fashion. An allocation is a distribution of $E$ among $P$, and we are interested in the minimum total value of the entities received by a player according to the allocation. In the static case, it is NP-hard to find an optimal allocation the maximizes this minimum value. On the other hand, $ρ$-approximation algorithms have been developed for certain values of $ρ\in (0,1]$. We propose a $w$-lookahead algorithm for the multistage online maxmin allocation problem for any fixed $w \geq 1$ in which the restriction lists and values of entities may change between time steps, and there is a fixed stability reward for an entity to be assigned to the same player from one time step to the next. The objective is to maximize the sum of the minimum values and stability rewards over the time steps $1, 2, \ldots, τ$. Our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $(1-c)ρ$, where $c$ is the positive root of the equation $wc^2 = ρ(w+1)(1-c)$. When $w = 1$, it is greater than $\fracρ{4ρ+2} + \fracρ{10}$, which improves upon the previous ratio of $\fracρ{4ρ+2 - 2^{1-τ}(2ρ+1)}$ obtained for the case of 1-lookahead. 我们考虑一个在线分配问题，该问题涉及离散时间步 $1,2,\ldots,τ$ 上的一组 $P$ 的 $n$ 玩家和一组 $E$ 的 $m$ 个不可分割的实体。在每个时间步 $t \in [1,τ]$，对于每个实体 $e \in E$，都有一个限制列表 $L_t(e)$，它规定了可以分配 $e$ 的玩家子集，以及每个玩家 $p \in P$ 的非负值 $e$ $v_t(e,p)$。集合$P$和$E$是预先固定的。集合 $L_t(\cdot)$ 和值 $v_t(\cdot,\cdot)$ 以在线方式给出。分配是 $E$ 在 $P$ 之间的分配，我们感兴趣的是玩家根据分配收到的实体的最小总价值。在静态情况下，找到最大化该最小值的最佳分配是 NP 困难的。另一方面，针对 $ρ\in (0,1]$ 的某些值开发了 $ρ$ 近似算法。我们针对任何固定 $w \geq 1$ 的多级在线 maxmin 分配问题提出了一种 $w$-lookahead 算法，其中实体的限制列表和值可能在时间步之间变化，并且从一个时间步到下一个时间步分配给同一玩家的实体有固定的稳定性奖励。目标是最大化最小值和稳定性的总和在时间步 $1, 2, \ldots, τ$ 上的奖励。我们的算法实现了 $(1-c)ρ$ 的竞争比，其中 $c$ 是方程 $wc^2 = ρ(w+1)(1-c)$ 的正根。当 $w = 1$ 时，它大于 $\fracρ{4ρ+2} + \fracρ{10}$，这比之前的 $\fracρ{4ρ+2 - 2^{1-τ}(2ρ+1)}$ 在 1-lookahead 的情况下获得。 本文研究多阶段在线不可分实体的最大最小分配问题，旨在通过考虑稳定性奖励和动态变化的限制列表，最大化玩家获得的最小总价值。 Siu-Wing Cheng cs.DS

authors_text: Shlok Mishra,Anshul Shah,Ankan Bansal,Abhyuday Jagannatha,Janit Anjaria,Abhishek Sharma,David Jacobs,Dilip Krishnan
title: Object-Aware Cropping for Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 用于自我监督学习的对象感知裁剪
abstract: A core component of the recent success of self-supervised learning is cropping data augmentation, which selects sub-regions of an image to be used as positive views in the self-supervised loss. The underlying assumption is that randomly cropped and resized regions of a given image share information about the objects of interest, which the learned representation will capture. This assumption is mostly satisfied in datasets such as ImageNet where there is a large, centered object, which is highly likely to be present in random crops of the full image. However, in other datasets such as OpenImages or COCO, which are more representative of real world uncurated data, there are typically multiple small objects in an image. In this work, we show that self-supervised learning based on the usual random cropping performs poorly on such datasets. We propose replacing one or both of the random crops with crops obtained from an object proposal algorithm. This encourages the model to learn both object and scene level semantic representations. Using this approach, which we call object-aware cropping, results in significant improvements over scene cropping on classification and object detection benchmarks. For example, on OpenImages, our approach achieves an improvement of 8.8% mAP over random scene-level cropping using MoCo-v2 based pre-training. We also show significant improvements on COCO and PASCAL-VOC object detection and segmentation tasks over the state-of-the-art self-supervised learning approaches. Our approach is efficient, simple and general, and can be used in most existing contrastive and non-contrastive self-supervised learning frameworks.
summary: A core component of the recent success of self-supervised learning is cropping data augmentation, which selects sub-regions of an image to be used as positive views in the self-supervised loss. The underlying assumption is that randomly cropped and resized regions of a given image share information about the objects of interest, which the learned representation will capture. This assumption is mostly satisfied in datasets such as ImageNet where there is a large, centered object, which is highly likely to be present in random crops of the full image. However, in other datasets such as OpenImages or COCO, which are more representative of real world uncurated data, there are typically multiple small objects in an image. In this work, we show that self-supervised learning based on the usual random cropping performs poorly on such datasets. We propose replacing one or both of the random crops with crops obtained from an object proposal algorithm. This encourages the model to learn both object and scene level semantic representations. Using this approach, which we call object-aware cropping, results in significant improvements over scene cropping on classification and object detection benchmarks. For example, on OpenImages, our approach achieves an improvement of 8.8% mAP over random scene-level cropping using MoCo-v2 based pre-training. We also show significant improvements on COCO and PASCAL-VOC object detection and segmentation tasks over the state-of-the-art self-supervised learning approaches. Our approach is efficient, simple and general, and can be used in most existing contrastive and non-contrastive self-supervised learning frameworks.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习最近成功的一个核心组成部分是裁剪数据增强，它选择图像的子区域用作自监督损失中的正面视图。基本假设是给定图像的随机裁剪和调整大小的区域共享有关感兴趣对象的信息，学习的表示将捕获这些信息。这一假设在 ImageNet 等数据集中得到了满足，其中存在一个大型的居中对象，该对象很可能出现在整个图像的随机裁剪中。然而，在 OpenImages 或 COCO 等其他数据集中，它们更能代表现实世界的未经整理的数据，图像中通常存在多个小对象。在这项工作中，我们表明基于通常的随机裁剪的自监督学习在此类数据集上表现不佳。我们建议用从对象提议算法获得的作物替换一种或两种随机作物。这鼓励模型学习对象和场景级别的语义表示。使用这种我们称之为对象感知裁剪的方法，在分类和对象检测基准方面比场景裁剪有了显着的改进。例如，在 OpenImages 上，我们的方法比使用基于 MoCo-v2 的预训练进行随机场景级裁剪提高了 8.8% 的 mAP。我们还展示了 COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 对象检测和分割任务相对于最先进的自我监督学习方法的显着改进。我们的方法高效、简单且通用，可用于大多数现有的对比和非对比自监督学习框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为对象感知裁剪的方法，通过使用对象建议算法代替传统随机裁剪来改进自监督学习，以提升图像分类和目标检测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统随机裁剪在包含多个小物体的现实数据集（如OpenImages、COCO）中效果不佳，因为无法有效捕捉多物体信息，而现有方法在这些数据集上表现欠佳。
AI.method: 用对象建议算法生成的裁剪区域替代随机裁剪，使模型同时学习对象级和场景级语义表示，并兼容现有对比和非对比自监督框架。
AI.result: 在OpenImages上使用MoCo-v2预训练时，mAP提升8.8%；在COCO和PASCAL-VOC目标检测与分割任务中显著优于现有自监督方法，且方法高效通用。
AI.conclusion: 对象感知裁剪通过聚焦物体与场景信息，有效提升了自监督学习在复杂数据集上的表现，是一种简单且普适的改进方案。

authors_text: Zizheng Yang,Xin Jin,Kecheng Zheng,Feng Zhao
title: Unleashing the Potential of Unsupervised Pre-Training with Intra-Identity Regularization for Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 通过身份内正则化释放无监督预训练的潜力以进行人员重新识别
abstract: Existing person re-identification (ReID) methods typically directly load the pre-trained ImageNet weights for initialization. However, as a fine-grained classification task, ReID is more challenging and exists a large domain gap between ImageNet classification. Inspired by the great success of self-supervised representation learning with contrastive objectives, in this paper, we design an Unsupervised Pre-training framework for ReID based on the contrastive learning (CL) pipeline, dubbed UP-ReID. During the pre-training, we attempt to address two critical issues for learning fine-grained ReID features: (1) the augmentations in CL pipeline may distort the discriminative clues in person images. (2) the fine-grained local features of person images are not fully-explored. Therefore, we introduce an intra-identity (I$^2$-)regularization in the UP-ReID, which is instantiated as two constraints coming from global image aspect and local patch aspect: a global consistency is enforced between augmented and original person images to increase robustness to augmentation, while an intrinsic contrastive constraint among local patches of each image is employed to fully explore the local discriminative clues. Extensive experiments on multiple popular Re-ID datasets, including PersonX, Market1501, CUHK03, and MSMT17, demonstrate that our UP-ReID pre-trained model can significantly benefit the downstream ReID fine-tuning and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Codes and models will be released to https://github.com/Frost-Yang-99/UP-ReID.
summary: Existing person re-identification (ReID) methods typically directly load the pre-trained ImageNet weights for initialization. However, as a fine-grained classification task, ReID is more challenging and exists a large domain gap between ImageNet classification. Inspired by the great success of self-supervised representation learning with contrastive objectives, in this paper, we design an Unsupervised Pre-training framework for ReID based on the contrastive learning (CL) pipeline, dubbed UP-ReID. During the pre-training, we attempt to address two critical issues for learning fine-grained ReID features: (1) the augmentations in CL pipeline may distort the discriminative clues in person images. (2) the fine-grained local features of person images are not fully-explored. Therefore, we introduce an intra-identity (I$^2$-)regularization in the UP-ReID, which is instantiated as two constraints coming from global image aspect and local patch aspect: a global consistency is enforced between augmented and original person images to increase robustness to augmentation, while an intrinsic contrastive constraint among local patches of each image is employed to fully explore the local discriminative clues. Extensive experiments on multiple popular Re-ID datasets, including PersonX, Market1501, CUHK03, and MSMT17, demonstrate that our UP-ReID pre-trained model can significantly benefit the downstream ReID fine-tuning and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Codes and models will be released to https://github.com/Frost-Yang-99/UP-ReID.
abstract_zh: 现有的行人重新识别（ReID）方法通常直接加载预训练的 ImageNet 权重进行初始化。然而，作为一项细粒度的分类任务，ReID更具挑战性，并且与ImageNet分类之间存在较大的领域差距。受到具有对比目标的自监督表示学习取得巨大成功的启发，在本文中，我们设计了一个基于对比学习（CL）管道的无监督 ReID 预训练框架，称为 UP-ReID。在预训练期间，我们尝试解决学习细粒度 ReID 特征的两个关键问题：（1）CL 管道中的增强可能会扭曲人物图像中的判别线索。 (2)人物图像的细粒度局部特征没有得到充分的探索。因此，我们在UP-ReID中引入了身份内（I$^2$-）正则化，它被实例化为来自全局图像方面和局部补丁方面的两个约束：在增强和原始人物图像之间强制执行全局一致性以增加增强的鲁棒性，同时采用每个图像的局部补丁之间的内在对比约束来充分探索局部判别线索。对多个流行的 Re-ID 数据集（包括 PersonX、Market1501、CUHK03 和 MSMT17）的大量实验表明，我们的 UP-ReID 预训练模型可以显着有利于下游 ReID 微调并实现最先进的性能。代码和模型将发布到https://github.com/Frost-Yang-99/UP-ReID。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督预训练框架UP-ReID，用于解决行人重识别（ReID）任务中的特征学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的ReID方法通常直接使用ImageNet的预训练权重，但ReID作为细粒度分类任务，与ImageNet存在较大的领域差异，因此需要更适应ReID任务的预训练方法。
AI.method: 本文设计了UP-ReID框架，引入了I²-正则化，通过全局一致性约束增强对增强数据的鲁棒性，并利用局部对比约束挖掘图像的局部判别线索。
AI.result: 在PersonX、Market1501、CUHK03和MSMT17等多个数据集上的实验表明，UP-ReID预训练模型能显著提升下游ReID微调性能，达到最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的UP-ReID方法有效解决了ReID任务中特征学习的两个关键问题，为无监督预训练在ReID中的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Unleashing the Potential of Unsupervised Pre-Training with Intra-Identity Regularization for Person Re-Identification 通过身份内正则化释放无监督预训练的潜力以进行人员重新识别 Existing person re-identification (ReID) methods typically directly load the pre-trained ImageNet weights for initialization. However, as a fine-grained classification task, ReID is more challenging and exists a large domain gap between ImageNet classification. Inspired by the great success of self-supervised representation learning with contrastive objectives, in this paper, we design an Unsupervised Pre-training framework for ReID based on the contrastive learning (CL) pipeline, dubbed UP-ReID. During the pre-training, we attempt to address two critical issues for learning fine-grained ReID features: (1) the augmentations in CL pipeline may distort the discriminative clues in person images. (2) the fine-grained local features of person images are not fully-explored. Therefore, we introduce an intra-identity (I$^2$-)regularization in the UP-ReID, which is instantiated as two constraints coming from global image aspect and local patch aspect: a global consistency is enforced between augmented and original person images to increase robustness to augmentation, while an intrinsic contrastive constraint among local patches of each image is employed to fully explore the local discriminative clues. Extensive experiments on multiple popular Re-ID datasets, including PersonX, Market1501, CUHK03, and MSMT17, demonstrate that our UP-ReID pre-trained model can significantly benefit the downstream ReID fine-tuning and achieve state-of-the-art performance. Codes and models will be released to https://github.com/Frost-Yang-99/UP-ReID. 现有的行人重新识别（ReID）方法通常直接加载预训练的 ImageNet 权重进行初始化。然而，作为一项细粒度的分类任务，ReID更具挑战性，并且与ImageNet分类之间存在较大的领域差距。受到具有对比目标的自监督表示学习取得巨大成功的启发，在本文中，我们设计了一个基于对比学习（CL）管道的无监督 ReID 预训练框架，称为 UP-ReID。在预训练期间，我们尝试解决学习细粒度 ReID 特征的两个关键问题：（1）CL 管道中的增强可能会扭曲人物图像中的判别线索。 (2)人物图像的细粒度局部特征没有得到充分的探索。因此，我们在UP-ReID中引入了身份内（I$^2$-）正则化，它被实例化为来自全局图像方面和局部补丁方面的两个约束：在增强和原始人物图像之间强制执行全局一致性以增加增强的鲁棒性，同时采用每个图像的局部补丁之间的内在对比约束来充分探索局部判别线索。对多个流行的 Re-ID 数据集（包括 PersonX、Market1501、CUHK03 和 MSMT17）的大量实验表明，我们的 UP-ReID 预训练模型可以显着有利于下游 ReID 微调并实现最先进的性能。代码和模型将发布到https://github.com/Frost-Yang-99/UP-ReID。 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督预训练框架UP-ReID，用于解决行人重识别（ReID）任务中的特征学习问题。 Zizheng Yang,Xin Jin,Kecheng Zheng,Feng Zhao cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Zhichun Huang,Rudrasis Chakraborty,Vikas Singh
title: Forward Operator Estimation in Generative Models with Kernel Transfer Operators
title_zh: 具有核转移算子的生成模型中的前向算子估计
abstract: Generative models which use explicit density modeling (e.g., variational autoencoders, flow-based generative models) involve finding a mapping from a known distribution, e.g. Gaussian, to the unknown input distribution. This often requires searching over a class of non-linear functions (e.g., representable by a deep neural network). While effective in practice, the associated runtime/memory costs can increase rapidly, usually as a function of the performance desired in an application. We propose a much cheaper (and simpler) strategy to estimate this mapping based on adapting known results in kernel transfer operators. We show that our formulation enables highly efficient distribution approximation and sampling, and offers surprisingly good empirical performance that compares favorably with powerful baselines, but with significant runtime savings. We show that the algorithm also performs well in small sample size settings (in brain imaging).
summary: Generative models which use explicit density modeling (e.g., variational autoencoders, flow-based generative models) involve finding a mapping from a known distribution, e.g. Gaussian, to the unknown input distribution. This often requires searching over a class of non-linear functions (e.g., representable by a deep neural network). While effective in practice, the associated runtime/memory costs can increase rapidly, usually as a function of the performance desired in an application. We propose a much cheaper (and simpler) strategy to estimate this mapping based on adapting known results in kernel transfer operators. We show that our formulation enables highly efficient distribution approximation and sampling, and offers surprisingly good empirical performance that compares favorably with powerful baselines, but with significant runtime savings. We show that the algorithm also performs well in small sample size settings (in brain imaging).
abstract_zh: 使用显式密度建模的生成模型（例如，变分自动编码器、基于流的生成模型）涉及从已知分布（例如高斯，对于未知的输入分布。这通常需要搜索一类非线性函数（例如，可由深度神经网络表示）。虽然在实践中有效，但相关的运行时/内存成本可能会迅速增加，通常是应用程序所需性能的函数。我们提出了一种更便宜（也更简单）的策略来基于调整内核传输算子中的已知结果来估计此映射。我们表明，我们的公式可以实现高效的分布近似和采样，并提供令人惊讶的良好经验性能，与强大的基线相比毫不逊色，但可以显着节省运行时间。我们证明该算法在小样本量设置（脑成像）中也表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于核转移算子的生成模型前向映射估计方法，以降低传统显式密度建模的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统生成模型（如VAE、流模型）依赖深度网络进行非线性映射，导致计算和内存成本随性能需求激增，尤其在小样本场景（如脑成像）中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过适配核转移算子理论，构建更高效的前向映射估计框架，避免复杂网络结构的高昂计算开销。
AI.result: 该方法在分布近似和采样任务中实现高效计算，相比基线模型节省显著运行时间，且在小样本数据集上保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 核转移算子方法为生成模型提供了计算效率与性能兼顾的解决方案，适用于资源受限或小样本应用场景。

authors_text: Runhao Zeng,Wenbing Huang,Mingkui Tan,Yu Rong,Peilin Zhao,Junzhou Huang,Chuang Gan
title: Graph Convolutional Module for Temporal Action Localization in Videos
title_zh: 用于视频中时间动作定位的图卷积模块
abstract: Temporal action localization has long been researched in computer vision. Existing state-of-the-art action localization methods divide each video into multiple action units (i.e., proposals in two-stage methods and segments in one-stage methods) and then perform action recognition/regression on each of them individually, without explicitly exploiting their relations during learning. In this paper, we claim that the relations between action units play an important role in action localization, and a more powerful action detector should not only capture the local content of each action unit but also allow a wider field of view on the context related to it. To this end, we propose a general graph convolutional module (GCM) that can be easily plugged into existing action localization methods, including two-stage and one-stage paradigms. To be specific, we first construct a graph, where each action unit is represented as a node and their relations between two action units as an edge. Here, we use two types of relations, one for capturing the temporal connections between different action units, and the other one for characterizing their semantic relationship. Particularly for the temporal connections in two-stage methods, we further explore two different kinds of edges, one connecting the overlapping action units and the other one connecting surrounding but disjointed units. Upon the graph we built, we then apply graph convolutional networks (GCNs) to model the relations among different action units, which is able to learn more informative representations to enhance action localization. Experimental results show that our GCM consistently improves the performance of existing action localization methods, including two-stage methods (e.g., CBR and R-C3D) and one-stage methods (e.g., D-SSAD), verifying the generality and effectiveness of our GCM.
summary: Temporal action localization has long been researched in computer vision. Existing state-of-the-art action localization methods divide each video into multiple action units (i.e., proposals in two-stage methods and segments in one-stage methods) and then perform action recognition/regression on each of them individually, without explicitly exploiting their relations during learning. In this paper, we claim that the relations between action units play an important role in action localization, and a more powerful action detector should not only capture the local content of each action unit but also allow a wider field of view on the context related to it. To this end, we propose a general graph convolutional module (GCM) that can be easily plugged into existing action localization methods, including two-stage and one-stage paradigms. To be specific, we first construct a graph, where each action unit is represented as a node and their relations between two action units as an edge. Here, we use two types of relations, one for capturing the temporal connections between different action units, and the other one for characterizing their semantic relationship. Particularly for the temporal connections in two-stage methods, we further explore two different kinds of edges, one connecting the overlapping action units and the other one connecting surrounding but disjointed units. Upon the graph we built, we then apply graph convolutional networks (GCNs) to model the relations among different action units, which is able to learn more informative representations to enhance action localization. Experimental results show that our GCM consistently improves the performance of existing action localization methods, including two-stage methods (e.g., CBR and R-C3D) and one-stage methods (e.g., D-SSAD), verifying the generality and effectiveness of our GCM.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域长期以来一直在研究时间动作定位。现有最先进的动作定位方法将每个视频划分为多个动作单元（即两阶段方法中的提案和一阶段方法中的片段），然后对每个单元单独执行动作识别/回归，而在学习过程中没有明确利用它们的关系。在本文中，我们声称动作单元之间的关系在动作定位中发挥着重要作用，更强大的动作检测器不仅应该捕获每个动作单元的本地内容，而且还应该允许对其相关的上下文有更广泛的视野。为此，我们提出了一种通用图卷积模块（GCM），可以轻松插入现有的动作定位方法，包括两阶段和单阶段范例。具体来说，我们首先构建一个图，其中每个动作单元表示为一个节点，两个动作单元之间的关系表示为一条边。在这里，我们使用两种类型的关系，一种用于捕获不同动作单元之间的时间连接，另一种用于表征它们的语义关系。特别是对于两阶段方法中的时间连接，我们进一步探索了两种不同类型的边，一种连接重叠的动作单元，另一种连接周围但不相交的单元。在我们构建的图的基础上，我们应用图卷积网络（GCN）对不同动作单元之间的关系进行建模，从而能够学习更多信息表示来增强动作定位。实验结果表明，我们的 GCM 持续改进了现有动作定位方法的性能，包括两阶段方法（例如 CBR 和 R-C3D）和一阶段方法（例如 D-SSAD），验证了我们的 GCM 的通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种图卷积模块（GCM），通过建模动作单元间的时序和语义关系，提升视频中时序动作定位的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动作定位方法未显式利用动作单元间的关联，导致局部信息与上下文关系分离，限制了模型表现。
AI.method: 构建包含动作单元节点及其时序连接和语义关系边的图结构，应用图卷积网络（GCNs）建模关系，增强特征表示。
AI.result: GCM在两阶段（CBR、R-C3D）和一阶段（D-SSAD）方法上均取得性能提升，验证了其通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模动作单元间关系，GCM有效提升了时序动作定位的准确性，为后续研究提供了通用模块。

ai_content.motivation: 现有动作定位方法未显式利用动作单元间的关联，导致局部信息与上下文关系分离，限制了模型表现。
ai_content.method: 构建包含动作单元节点及其时序连接和语义关系边的图结构，应用图卷积网络（GCNs）建模关系，增强特征表示。
ai_content.result: GCM在两阶段（CBR、R-C3D）和一阶段（D-SSAD）方法上均取得性能提升，验证了其通用性与有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过显式建模动作单元间关系，GCM有效提升了时序动作定位的准确性，为后续研究提供了通用模块。

search_text: Graph Convolutional Module for Temporal Action Localization in Videos 用于视频中时间动作定位的图卷积模块 Temporal action localization has long been researched in computer vision. Existing state-of-the-art action localization methods divide each video into multiple action units (i.e., proposals in two-stage methods and segments in one-stage methods) and then perform action recognition/regression on each of them individually, without explicitly exploiting their relations during learning. In this paper, we claim that the relations between action units play an important role in action localization, and a more powerful action detector should not only capture the local content of each action unit but also allow a wider field of view on the context related to it. To this end, we propose a general graph convolutional module (GCM) that can be easily plugged into existing action localization methods, including two-stage and one-stage paradigms. To be specific, we first construct a graph, where each action unit is represented as a node and their relations between two action units as an edge. Here, we use two types of relations, one for capturing the temporal connections between different action units, and the other one for characterizing their semantic relationship. Particularly for the temporal connections in two-stage methods, we further explore two different kinds of edges, one connecting the overlapping action units and the other one connecting surrounding but disjointed units. Upon the graph we built, we then apply graph convolutional networks (GCNs) to model the relations among different action units, which is able to learn more informative representations to enhance action localization. Experimental results show that our GCM consistently improves the performance of existing action localization methods, including two-stage methods (e.g., CBR and R-C3D) and one-stage methods (e.g., D-SSAD), verifying the generality and effectiveness of our GCM. 计算机视觉领域长期以来一直在研究时间动作定位。现有最先进的动作定位方法将每个视频划分为多个动作单元（即两阶段方法中的提案和一阶段方法中的片段），然后对每个单元单独执行动作识别/回归，而在学习过程中没有明确利用它们的关系。在本文中，我们声称动作单元之间的关系在动作定位中发挥着重要作用，更强大的动作检测器不仅应该捕获每个动作单元的本地内容，而且还应该允许对其相关的上下文有更广泛的视野。为此，我们提出了一种通用图卷积模块（GCM），可以轻松插入现有的动作定位方法，包括两阶段和单阶段范例。具体来说，我们首先构建一个图，其中每个动作单元表示为一个节点，两个动作单元之间的关系表示为一条边。在这里，我们使用两种类型的关系，一种用于捕获不同动作单元之间的时间连接，另一种用于表征它们的语义关系。特别是对于两阶段方法中的时间连接，我们进一步探索了两种不同类型的边，一种连接重叠的动作单元，另一种连接周围但不相交的单元。在我们构建的图的基础上，我们应用图卷积网络（GCN）对不同动作单元之间的关系进行建模，从而能够学习更多信息表示来增强动作定位。实验结果表明，我们的 GCM 持续改进了现有动作定位方法的性能，包括两阶段方法（例如 CBR 和 R-C3D）和一阶段方法（例如 D-SSAD），验证了我们的 GCM 的通用性和有效性。 本文提出一种图卷积模块（GCM），通过建模动作单元间的时序和语义关系，提升视频中时序动作定位的性能。 Runhao Zeng,Wenbing Huang,Mingkui Tan,Yu Rong,Peilin Zhao,Junzhou Huang,Chuang Gan cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Zhang,Yifan Sun,Rui Wang,Haichang Li,Xiaohui Hu
title: Multiple Fusion Adaptation: A Strong Framework for Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation Adaptation
title_zh: 多重融合适应：无监督语义分割适应的强大框架
abstract: This paper challenges the cross-domain semantic segmentation task, aiming to improve the segmentation accuracy on the unlabeled target domain without incurring additional annotation. Using the pseudo-label-based unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) pipeline, we propose a novel and effective Multiple Fusion Adaptation (MFA) method. MFA basically considers three parallel information fusion strategies, i.e., the cross-model fusion, temporal fusion and a novel online-offline pseudo label fusion. Specifically, the online-offline pseudo label fusion encourages the adaptive training to pay additional attention to difficult regions that are easily ignored by offline pseudo labels, therefore retaining more informative details. While the other two fusion strategies may look standard, MFA pays significant efforts to raise the efficiency and effectiveness for integration, and succeeds in injecting all the three strategies into a unified framework. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, i.e., GTA5-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes, show that our method significantly improves the semantic segmentation adaptation, and sets up new state of the art (58.2% and 62.5% mIoU, respectively). The code will be available at https://github.com/KaiiZhang/MFA.
summary: This paper challenges the cross-domain semantic segmentation task, aiming to improve the segmentation accuracy on the unlabeled target domain without incurring additional annotation. Using the pseudo-label-based unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) pipeline, we propose a novel and effective Multiple Fusion Adaptation (MFA) method. MFA basically considers three parallel information fusion strategies, i.e., the cross-model fusion, temporal fusion and a novel online-offline pseudo label fusion. Specifically, the online-offline pseudo label fusion encourages the adaptive training to pay additional attention to difficult regions that are easily ignored by offline pseudo labels, therefore retaining more informative details. While the other two fusion strategies may look standard, MFA pays significant efforts to raise the efficiency and effectiveness for integration, and succeeds in injecting all the three strategies into a unified framework. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, i.e., GTA5-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes, show that our method significantly improves the semantic segmentation adaptation, and sets up new state of the art (58.2% and 62.5% mIoU, respectively). The code will be available at https://github.com/KaiiZhang/MFA.
abstract_zh: 本文挑战跨域语义分割任务，旨在提高未标记目标域的分割精度，而不会产生额外的注释。使用基于伪标签的无监督域适应（UDA）管道，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的多重融合适应（MFA）方法。 MFA基本上考虑了三种并行信息融合策略，即跨模型融合、时间融合和新颖的在线离线伪标签融合。具体来说，在线-离线伪标签融合鼓励自适应训练额外关注离线伪标签容易忽略的困难区域，从而保留更多信息细节。虽然其他两种融合策略看似标准，但 MFA 为提高整合的效率和有效性付出了巨大的努力，并成功地将所有三种策略注入到一个统一的框架中。对两个广泛使用的基准（即 GTA5-to-Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes）的实验表明，我们的方法显着改善了语义分割适应性，并建立了新的最先进技术（分别为 58.2% 和 62.5% mIoU）。该代码可在 https://github.com/KaiiZhang/MFA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多融合自适应框架（MFA），旨在通过无监督域自适应提升跨域语义分割的准确性，无需额外标注目标域数据。
AI.motivation: 跨域语义分割面临目标域无标注数据的挑战，传统方法难以有效利用伪标签信息，需探索更高效的多策略融合方法以提升适应性。
AI.method: 设计三种并行融合策略：跨模型融合、时序融合及在线-离线伪标签融合，通过在线-离线融合关注离线伪标签易忽略的困难区域，整合所有策略至统一框架。
AI.result: 在GTA5-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes基准测试中分别达到58.2%和62.5%的mIoU，刷新当时最优性能记录。
AI.conclusion: 多融合策略有效提升了无监督域自适应的性能，验证了综合多源信息融合方法在语义分割任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Abhisesh Silwal,Francisco Yandun,Anjana Nellithimaru,Terry Bates,George Kantor
title: Bumblebee: A Path Towards Fully Autonomous Robotic Vine Pruning
title_zh: Bumblebee：通往完全自主机器人葡萄树修剪的道路
abstract: Dormant season grapevine pruning requires skilled seasonal workers during the winter season which are becoming less available. As workers hasten to prune more vines in less time amid to the short-term seasonal hiring culture and low wages, vines are often pruned inconsistently leading to imbalanced grapevines. In addition to this, currently existing mechanical methods cannot selectively prune grapevines and manual follow-up operations are often required that further increase production cost. In this paper, we present the design and field evaluation of a rugged, and fully autonomous robot for end-to-end pruning of dormant season grapevines. The proposed design incorporates novel camera systems, a kinematically redundant manipulator, a ground robot, and novel algorithms in the perception system. The presented research prototype robot system was able to spur prune a row of vines from both sides completely in 213 sec/vine with a total pruning accuracy of 87%. Initial field tests of the autonomous system in a commercial vineyard have shown significant variability reduction in dormant season pruning when compared to mechanical pre-pruning trials. The design approach, system components, lessons learned, future enhancements as well as a brief economic analysis are described in the manuscript.
summary: Dormant season grapevine pruning requires skilled seasonal workers during the winter season which are becoming less available. As workers hasten to prune more vines in less time amid to the short-term seasonal hiring culture and low wages, vines are often pruned inconsistently leading to imbalanced grapevines. In addition to this, currently existing mechanical methods cannot selectively prune grapevines and manual follow-up operations are often required that further increase production cost. In this paper, we present the design and field evaluation of a rugged, and fully autonomous robot for end-to-end pruning of dormant season grapevines. The proposed design incorporates novel camera systems, a kinematically redundant manipulator, a ground robot, and novel algorithms in the perception system. The presented research prototype robot system was able to spur prune a row of vines from both sides completely in 213 sec/vine with a total pruning accuracy of 87%. Initial field tests of the autonomous system in a commercial vineyard have shown significant variability reduction in dormant season pruning when compared to mechanical pre-pruning trials. The design approach, system components, lessons learned, future enhancements as well as a brief economic analysis are described in the manuscript.
abstract_zh: 休眠季节的葡萄树修剪需要冬季熟练的季节性工人，而这些工人的数量越来越少。由于短期季节性雇佣文化和低工资，工人们急于在更短的时间内修剪更多的葡萄树，葡萄树的修剪往往不一致，导致葡萄树不平衡。除此之外，现有的机械方法无法选择性修剪葡萄藤，往往需要人工后续操作，进一步增加了生产成本。在本文中，我们介绍了一种坚固耐用的全自动机器人的设计和现场评估，用于对休眠季节葡萄藤进行端到端修剪。所提出的设计结合了新颖的相机系统、运动冗余操纵器、地面机器人和感知系统中的新颖算法。所展示的研究原型机器人系统能够在 213 秒/藤蔓的时间内从两侧完全修剪一排藤蔓，总修剪精度为 87%。在商业葡萄园中对自主系统进行的初步现场测试表明，与机械预修剪试验相比，休眠季节修剪的变异性显着降低。手稿中描述了设计方法、系统组件、经验教训、未来的改进以及简要的经济分析。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估一款全自动机器人系统，用于冬季葡萄藤的端到端修剪。
AI.motivation: 葡萄藤冬季修剪依赖稀缺的季节性人工，现有机械方法无法精准修剪且需人工干预，导致成本高且效果不均。
AI.method: 融合新型摄像头系统、运动学冗余机械臂、地面机器人及感知算法，构建全自主机器人系统。
AI.result: 原型机单侧修剪耗时213秒/株，总准确率87%，商业葡萄园测试显示显著降低修剪不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 验证了系统设计的有效性，总结了技术改进方向及经济可行性，为农业自动化提供新路径。

motivation: 葡萄藤冬季修剪依赖稀缺的季节性人工，现有机械方法无法精准修剪且需人工干预，导致成本高且效果不均。
method: 融合新型摄像头系统、运动学冗余机械臂、地面机器人及感知算法，构建全自主机器人系统。
result: 原型机单侧修剪耗时213秒/株，总准确率87%，商业葡萄园测试显示显著降低修剪不一致性。
conclusion: 验证了系统设计的有效性，总结了技术改进方向及经济可行性，为农业自动化提供新路径。
search_text: Bumblebee: A Path Towards Fully Autonomous Robotic Vine Pruning Bumblebee：通往完全自主机器人葡萄树修剪的道路 Dormant season grapevine pruning requires skilled seasonal workers during the winter season which are becoming less available. As workers hasten to prune more vines in less time amid to the short-term seasonal hiring culture and low wages, vines are often pruned inconsistently leading to imbalanced grapevines. In addition to this, currently existing mechanical methods cannot selectively prune grapevines and manual follow-up operations are often required that further increase production cost. In this paper, we present the design and field evaluation of a rugged, and fully autonomous robot for end-to-end pruning of dormant season grapevines. The proposed design incorporates novel camera systems, a kinematically redundant manipulator, a ground robot, and novel algorithms in the perception system. The presented research prototype robot system was able to spur prune a row of vines from both sides completely in 213 sec/vine with a total pruning accuracy of 87%. Initial field tests of the autonomous system in a commercial vineyard have shown significant variability reduction in dormant season pruning when compared to mechanical pre-pruning trials. The design approach, system components, lessons learned, future enhancements as well as a brief economic analysis are described in the manuscript. 休眠季节的葡萄树修剪需要冬季熟练的季节性工人，而这些工人的数量越来越少。由于短期季节性雇佣文化和低工资，工人们急于在更短的时间内修剪更多的葡萄树，葡萄树的修剪往往不一致，导致葡萄树不平衡。除此之外，现有的机械方法无法选择性修剪葡萄藤，往往需要人工后续操作，进一步增加了生产成本。在本文中，我们介绍了一种坚固耐用的全自动机器人的设计和现场评估，用于对休眠季节葡萄藤进行端到端修剪。所提出的设计结合了新颖的相机系统、运动冗余操纵器、地面机器人和感知系统中的新颖算法。所展示的研究原型机器人系统能够在 213 秒/藤蔓的时间内从两侧完全修剪一排藤蔓，总修剪精度为 87%。在商业葡萄园中对自主系统进行的初步现场测试表明，与机械预修剪试验相比，休眠季节修剪的变异性显着降低。手稿中描述了设计方法、系统组件、经验教训、未来的改进以及简要的经济分析。 设计并评估一款全自动机器人系统，用于冬季葡萄藤的端到端修剪。 Abhisesh Silwal,Francisco Yandun,Anjana Nellithimaru,Terry Bates,George Kantor cs.RO

authors_text: Andreas Heinecke,Emanuel Mayer,Abhinav Natarajan,Yoonju Jung
title: Unsupervised Statistical Learning for Die Analysis in Ancient Numismatics
title_zh: 古代钱币学中模具分析的无监督统计学习
abstract: Die analysis is an essential numismatic method, and an important tool of ancient economic history. Yet, manual die studies are too labor-intensive to comprehensively study large coinages such as those of the Roman Empire. We address this problem by proposing a model for unsupervised computational die analysis, which can reduce the time investment necessary for large-scale die studies by several orders of magnitude, in many cases from years to weeks. From a computer vision viewpoint, die studies present a challenging unsupervised clustering problem, because they involve an unknown and large number of highly similar semantic classes of imbalanced sizes. We address these issues through determining dissimilarities between coin faces derived from specifically devised Gaussian process-based keypoint features in a Bayesian distance clustering framework. The efficacy of our method is demonstrated through an analysis of 1135 Roman silver coins struck between 64-66 C.E..
summary: Die analysis is an essential numismatic method, and an important tool of ancient economic history. Yet, manual die studies are too labor-intensive to comprehensively study large coinages such as those of the Roman Empire. We address this problem by proposing a model for unsupervised computational die analysis, which can reduce the time investment necessary for large-scale die studies by several orders of magnitude, in many cases from years to weeks. From a computer vision viewpoint, die studies present a challenging unsupervised clustering problem, because they involve an unknown and large number of highly similar semantic classes of imbalanced sizes. We address these issues through determining dissimilarities between coin faces derived from specifically devised Gaussian process-based keypoint features in a Bayesian distance clustering framework. The efficacy of our method is demonstrated through an analysis of 1135 Roman silver coins struck between 64-66 C.E..
abstract_zh: 模具分析是钱币学的重要方法，也是古代经济史的重要工具。然而，手工模具研究过于劳力密集，无法全面研究罗马帝国的大型货币。我们通过提出一种无监督计算模具分析模型来解决这个问题，该模型可以将大规模模具研究所需的时间投入减少几个数量级，在许多情况下从几年到几周。从计算机视觉的角度来看，研究提出了一个具有挑战性的无监督聚类问题，因为它们涉及未知的且大量大小不平衡的高度相似的语义类别。我们通过确定贝叶斯距离聚类框架中专门设计的基于高斯过程的关键点特征得出的硬币表面之间的差异来解决这些问题。通过对公元 64 至 66 年间铸造的 1135 枚罗马银币的分析，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 开发无监督计算模型以加速古代钱币模具分析
AI.motivation: 手动模具分析耗时，需高效方法处理大规模钱币数据
AI.method: 利用高斯过程关键点特征与贝叶斯距离聚类框架进行无监督聚类
AI.result: 成功分析1135枚罗马银币，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 方法显著提升分析效率，适用于大规模古代钱币研究

authors_text: Joshua Knights,Peyman Moghadam,Clinton Fookes,Sridha Sridharan
title: Point Cloud Segmentation Using Sparse Temporal Local Attention
title_zh: 使用稀疏时间局部注意力的点云分割
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures Published at the Australasian Conference on Robotics and Automation (ACRA) 2021
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures Published at the Australasian Conference on Robotics and Automation (ACRA) 2021
abstract: Point clouds are a key modality used for perception in autonomous vehicles, providing the means for a robust geometric understanding of the surrounding environment. However despite the sensor outputs from autonomous vehicles being naturally temporal in nature, there is still limited exploration of exploiting point cloud sequences for 3D seman-tic segmentation. In this paper we propose a novel Sparse Temporal Local Attention (STELA) module which aggregates intermediate features from a local neighbourhood in previous point cloud frames to provide a rich temporal context to the decoder. Using the sparse local neighbourhood enables our approach to gather features more flexibly than those which directly match point features, and more efficiently than those which perform expensive global attention over the whole point cloud frame. We achieve a competitive mIoU of 64.3% on the SemanticKitti dataset, and demonstrate significant improvement over the single-frame baseline in our ablation studies.
summary: Point clouds are a key modality used for perception in autonomous vehicles, providing the means for a robust geometric understanding of the surrounding environment. However despite the sensor outputs from autonomous vehicles being naturally temporal in nature, there is still limited exploration of exploiting point cloud sequences for 3D seman-tic segmentation. In this paper we propose a novel Sparse Temporal Local Attention (STELA) module which aggregates intermediate features from a local neighbourhood in previous point cloud frames to provide a rich temporal context to the decoder. Using the sparse local neighbourhood enables our approach to gather features more flexibly than those which directly match point features, and more efficiently than those which perform expensive global attention over the whole point cloud frame. We achieve a competitive mIoU of 64.3% on the SemanticKitti dataset, and demonstrate significant improvement over the single-frame baseline in our ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 点云是自动驾驶汽车感知的关键模式，为对周围环境进行稳健的几何理解提供了手段。然而，尽管自动驾驶车辆的传感器输出本质上是时间性的，但利用点云序列进行 3D 语义分割的探索仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏时间局部注意（STELA）模块，该模块聚合来自先前点云帧中的局部邻域的中间特征，以为解码器提供丰富的时间上下文。使用稀疏局部邻域使我们的方法能够比直接匹配点特征的方法更灵活地收集特征，并且比在整个点云框架上执行昂贵的全局关注的方法更有效。我们在 SemanticKitti 数据集上实现了 64.3% 的竞争性 mIoU，并在我们的消融研究中证明了相对于单帧基线的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STELA的稀疏时序局部注意力模块，用于改进自动驾驶车辆点云序列的3D语义分割。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动驾驶车辆的传感器数据具有天然时序性，但现有方法对点云序列的时序信息利用不足，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 通过引入稀疏时序局部注意力模块，从历史点云帧的局部邻域中聚合特征，为解码器提供丰富的时序上下文，相比直接点特征匹配和全局注意力更高效灵活。
AI.result: 在SemanticKitti数据集上达到64.3%的mIoU指标，消融实验显示显著优于单帧基线方法。
AI.conclusion: STELA模块有效利用时序局部特征，兼顾计算效率与分割精度，为自动驾驶场景理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Linhao Li,Ming Xu,Yongfeng Dong,Xin Li,Ao Wang
title: Interactive Model with Structural Loss for Language-based Abductive Reasoning
title_zh: 基于语言的归纳推理的具有结构损失的交互模型
comment: The paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: The paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: The abductive natural language inference task ($α$NLI) is proposed to infer the most plausible explanation between the cause and the event. In the $α$NLI task, two observations are given, and the most plausible hypothesis is asked to pick out from the candidates. Existing methods model the relation between each candidate hypothesis separately and penalize the inference network uniformly. In this paper, we argue that it is unnecessary to distinguish the reasoning abilities among correct hypotheses; and similarly, all wrong hypotheses contribute the same when explaining the reasons of the observations. Therefore, we propose to group instead of ranking the hypotheses and design a structural loss called ``joint softmax focal loss'' in this paper. Based on the observation that the hypotheses are generally semantically related, we have designed a novel interactive language model aiming at exploiting the rich interaction among competing hypotheses. We name this new model for $α$NLI: Interactive Model with Structural Loss (IMSL). The experimental results show that our IMSL has achieved the highest performance on the RoBERTa-large pretrained model, with ACC and AUC results increased by about 1\% and 5\% respectively.
summary: The abductive natural language inference task ($α$NLI) is proposed to infer the most plausible explanation between the cause and the event. In the $α$NLI task, two observations are given, and the most plausible hypothesis is asked to pick out from the candidates. Existing methods model the relation between each candidate hypothesis separately and penalize the inference network uniformly. In this paper, we argue that it is unnecessary to distinguish the reasoning abilities among correct hypotheses; and similarly, all wrong hypotheses contribute the same when explaining the reasons of the observations. Therefore, we propose to group instead of ranking the hypotheses and design a structural loss called ``joint softmax focal loss'' in this paper. Based on the observation that the hypotheses are generally semantically related, we have designed a novel interactive language model aiming at exploiting the rich interaction among competing hypotheses. We name this new model for $α$NLI: Interactive Model with Structural Loss (IMSL). The experimental results show that our IMSL has achieved the highest performance on the RoBERTa-large pretrained model, with ACC and AUC results increased by about 1\% and 5\% respectively.
abstract_zh: 提出溯因自然语言推理任务（$α$NLI）来推断原因和事件之间最合理的解释。在 $α$NLI 任务中，给出两个观察结果，并要求从候选者中选出最合理的假设。现有方法分别对每个候选假设之间的关系进行建模，并对推理网络进行统一惩罚。在本文中，我们认为没有必要区分正确假设的推理能力；同样，所有错误的假设在解释观察结果的原因时都具有相同的作用。因此，我们建议对假设进行分组而不是排序，并在本文中设计一种称为“联合 softmax 焦点损失”的结构损失。基于对假设通常在语义上相关的观察，我们设计了一种新颖的交互式语言模型，旨在利用竞争假设之间丰富的交互。我们将这个新模型命名为$α$NLI：具有结构损失的交互模型（IMSL）。实验结果表明，我们的IMSL在RoBERTa-large预训练模型上取得了最高的性能，ACC和AUC结果分别提高了约1%和5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言的归纳推理交互模型（IMSL），通过结构损失函数解决αNLI任务中的假说选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对候选假说单独建模并统一惩罚推理网络，但作者认为正确假说无需区分推理能力，错误假说对解释贡献相同，因此提出分组而非排序的思路。
AI.method: 设计了'联合softmax焦点损失'结构损失函数，并构建交互语言模型（IMSL）以挖掘竞争假说间的语义关联。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-large预训练模型上，IMSL的ACC和AUC指标分别提升约1%和5%。
AI.conclusion: 结构损失与交互模型有效提升了αNLI任务性能，通过假说间语义交互和分组策略优化了推理过程。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言的归纳推理交互模型（IMSL），通过结构损失函数解决αNLI任务中的假说选择问题。

search_text: Interactive Model with Structural Loss for Language-based Abductive Reasoning 基于语言的归纳推理的具有结构损失的交互模型 The abductive natural language inference task ($α$NLI) is proposed to infer the most plausible explanation between the cause and the event. In the $α$NLI task, two observations are given, and the most plausible hypothesis is asked to pick out from the candidates. Existing methods model the relation between each candidate hypothesis separately and penalize the inference network uniformly. In this paper, we argue that it is unnecessary to distinguish the reasoning abilities among correct hypotheses; and similarly, all wrong hypotheses contribute the same when explaining the reasons of the observations. Therefore, we propose to group instead of ranking the hypotheses and design a structural loss called ``joint softmax focal loss'' in this paper. Based on the observation that the hypotheses are generally semantically related, we have designed a novel interactive language model aiming at exploiting the rich interaction among competing hypotheses. We name this new model for $α$NLI: Interactive Model with Structural Loss (IMSL). The experimental results show that our IMSL has achieved the highest performance on the RoBERTa-large pretrained model, with ACC and AUC results increased by about 1\% and 5\% respectively. 提出溯因自然语言推理任务（$α$NLI）来推断原因和事件之间最合理的解释。在 $α$NLI 任务中，给出两个观察结果，并要求从候选者中选出最合理的假设。现有方法分别对每个候选假设之间的关系进行建模，并对推理网络进行统一惩罚。在本文中，我们认为没有必要区分正确假设的推理能力；同样，所有错误的假设在解释观察结果的原因时都具有相同的作用。因此，我们建议对假设进行分组而不是排序，并在本文中设计一种称为“联合 softmax 焦点损失”的结构损失。基于对假设通常在语义上相关的观察，我们设计了一种新颖的交互式语言模型，旨在利用竞争假设之间丰富的交互。我们将这个新模型命名为$α$NLI：具有结构损失的交互模型（IMSL）。实验结果表明，我们的IMSL在RoBERTa-large预训练模型上取得了最高的性能，ACC和AUC结果分别提高了约1%和5%。 本文提出了一种基于语言的归纳推理交互模型（IMSL），通过结构损失函数解决αNLI任务中的假说选择问题。 Linhao Li,Ming Xu,Yongfeng Dong,Xin Li,Ao Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Liyuan Ma,Kejie Huang,Dongxu Wei,Zhaoyan Ming,Haibin Shen
title: FDA-GAN: Flow-based Dual Attention GAN for Human Pose Transfer
title_zh: FDA-GAN：用于人体姿势转移的基于流的双重注意力 GAN
abstract: Human pose transfer aims at transferring the appearance of the source person to the target pose. Existing methods utilizing flow-based warping for non-rigid human image generation have achieved great success. However, they fail to preserve the appearance details in synthesized images since the spatial correlation between the source and target is not fully exploited. To this end, we propose the Flow-based Dual Attention GAN (FDA-GAN) to apply occlusion- and deformation-aware feature fusion for higher generation quality. Specifically, deformable local attention and flow similarity attention, constituting the dual attention mechanism, can derive the output features responsible for deformable- and occlusion-aware fusion, respectively. Besides, to maintain the pose and global position consistency in transferring, we design a pose normalization network for learning adaptive normalization from the target pose to the source person. Both qualitative and quantitative results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models in public iPER and DeepFashion datasets.
summary: Human pose transfer aims at transferring the appearance of the source person to the target pose. Existing methods utilizing flow-based warping for non-rigid human image generation have achieved great success. However, they fail to preserve the appearance details in synthesized images since the spatial correlation between the source and target is not fully exploited. To this end, we propose the Flow-based Dual Attention GAN (FDA-GAN) to apply occlusion- and deformation-aware feature fusion for higher generation quality. Specifically, deformable local attention and flow similarity attention, constituting the dual attention mechanism, can derive the output features responsible for deformable- and occlusion-aware fusion, respectively. Besides, to maintain the pose and global position consistency in transferring, we design a pose normalization network for learning adaptive normalization from the target pose to the source person. Both qualitative and quantitative results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models in public iPER and DeepFashion datasets.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势迁移旨在将源人的外观迁移到目标姿势。现有的利用基于流的变形来生成非刚性人体图像的方法已经取得了巨大的成功。然而，由于源和目标之间的空间相关性没有得到充分利用，它们无法保留合成图像中的外观细节。为此，我们提出了基于流的双重注意力 GAN (FDA-GAN)，以应用遮挡和变形感知特征融合来实现更高的生成质量。具体来说，构成双重注意机制的可变形局部注意力和流相似性注意力可以分别导出负责可变形和遮挡感知融合的输出特征。此外，为了在转移过程中保持姿势和全局位置的一致性，我们设计了一个姿势归一化网络，用于学习从目标姿势到源人的自适应归一化。定性和定量结果都表明，我们的方法在公共 iPER 和 DeepFashion 数据集中优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FDA-GAN，一种基于流的双注意力生成对抗网络，用于人体姿态迁移任务，旨在将源人物的外观转移到目标姿态中。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的变形方法在非刚性人体图像生成中虽取得成功，但未充分利用源与目标间的空间关联，导致合成图像外观细节丢失。
AI.method: 设计双注意力机制（可变形局部注意力与流相似性注意力）实现遮挡和变形感知的特征融合，并引入姿态归一化网络以保持姿态与全局位置一致性。
AI.result: 在iPER和DeepFashion数据集上，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进的模型。
AI.conclusion: FDA-GAN通过有效融合特征并保持姿态一致性，显著提升了人体姿态迁移的生成质量。
