authors_text: Binghan He,Mahsa Ghasemi,Ufuk Topcu,Luis Sentis
title: A Barrier Pair Method for Safe Human-Robot Shared Autonomy
title_zh: 一种实现安全人机共享自主的屏障对方法
comment: Accepted in Proceedings of the 60th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control
comments: Accepted in Proceedings of the 60th IEEE Conference on Decision and Control
abstract: Shared autonomy provides a framework where a human and an automated system, such as a robot, jointly control the system's behavior, enabling an effective solution for various applications, including human-robot interaction. However, a challenging problem in shared autonomy is safety because the human input may be unknown and unpredictable, which affects the robot's safety constraints. If the human input is a force applied through physical contact with the robot, it also alters the robot's behavior to maintain safety. We address the safety issue of shared autonomy in real-time applications by proposing a two-layer control framework. In the first layer, we use the history of human input measurements to infer what the human wants the robot to do and define the robot's safety constraints according to that inference. In the second layer, we formulate a rapidly-exploring random tree of barrier pairs, with each barrier pair composed of a barrier function and a controller. Using the controllers in these barrier pairs, the robot is able to maintain its safe operation under the intervention from the human input. This proposed control framework allows the robot to assist the human while preventing them from encountering safety issues. We demonstrate the proposed control framework on a simulation of a two-linkage manipulator robot.
summary: Shared autonomy provides a framework where a human and an automated system, such as a robot, jointly control the system's behavior, enabling an effective solution for various applications, including human-robot interaction. However, a challenging problem in shared autonomy is safety because the human input may be unknown and unpredictable, which affects the robot's safety constraints. If the human input is a force applied through physical contact with the robot, it also alters the robot's behavior to maintain safety. We address the safety issue of shared autonomy in real-time applications by proposing a two-layer control framework. In the first layer, we use the history of human input measurements to infer what the human wants the robot to do and define the robot's safety constraints according to that inference. In the second layer, we formulate a rapidly-exploring random tree of barrier pairs, with each barrier pair composed of a barrier function and a controller. Using the controllers in these barrier pairs, the robot is able to maintain its safe operation under the intervention from the human input. This proposed control framework allows the robot to assist the human while preventing them from encountering safety issues. We demonstrate the proposed control framework on a simulation of a two-linkage manipulator robot.
abstract_zh: 共享自主提供了一个框架，在该框架中，人类和机器人等自动化系统共同控制系统的行为，从而为各种应用（包括人机交互）提供有效的解决方案。然而，共享自主的一个具有挑战性的问题是安全，因为人类输入可能是未知和不可预测的，这会影响机器人的安全约束。如果人类输入是通过与机器人的物理接触施加的力，它也会改变机器人的行为以保持安全。我们通过提出两层控制框架来解决实时应用程序中共享自治的安全问题。在第一层中，我们使用人类输入测量的历史来推断人类希望机器人做什么，并根据该推断定义机器人的安全约束。在第二层中，我们制定了一个快速探索的障碍对随机树，每个障碍对由一个障碍函数和一个控制器组成。使用这些障碍对中的控制器，机器人能够在人类输入的干预下保持安全运行。这种提出的控制框架允许机器人协助人类，同时防止他们遇到安全问题。我们在双联动机械手机器人的模拟中演示了所提出的控制框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双层控制框架，通过障碍对方法解决共享自主性中的安全问题，确保机器人在人类干预下安全运行。
AI.motivation: 共享自主性中人类输入的不可预测性可能导致机器人安全约束失效，需实时保障人机协作安全。
AI.method: 第一层基于历史人类输入推断意图并定义安全约束；第二层构建障碍对快速探索树，结合屏障函数与控制器实现安全控制。
AI.result: 在双连杆机械臂仿真中验证了框架有效性，机器人可在人类干预下维持安全操作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了人机协作中的安全辅助，为实时共享自主性应用提供了可行解决方案。

Using the controllers in these barrier pairs, the robot is able to maintain its safe operation under the intervention from the human input. This proposed control framework allows the robot to assist the human while preventing them from encountering safety issues. We demonstrate the proposed control framework on a simulation of a two-linkage manipulator robot. 共享自主提供了一个框架，在该框架中，人类和机器人等自动化系统共同控制系统的行为，从而为各种应用（包括人机交互）提供有效的解决方案。然而，共享自主的一个具有挑战性的问题是安全，因为人类输入可能是未知和不可预测的，这会影响机器人的安全约束。如果人类输入是通过与机器人的物理接触施加的力，它也会改变机器人的行为以保持安全。我们通过提出两层控制框架来解决实时应用程序中共享自治的安全问题。在第一层中，我们使用人类输入测量的历史来推断人类希望机器人做什么，并根据该推断定义机器人的安全约束。在第二层中，我们制定了一个快速探索的障碍对随机树，每个障碍对由一个障碍函数和一个控制器组成。使用这些障碍对中的控制器，机器人能够在人类输入的干预下保持安全运行。这种提出的控制框架允许机器人协助人类，同时防止他们遇到安全问题。我们在双联动机械手机器人的模拟中演示了所提出的控制框架。 本文提出一种双层控制框架，通过障碍对方法解决共享自主性中的安全问题，确保机器人在人类干预下安全运行。 Binghan He,Mahsa Ghasemi,Ufuk Topcu,Luis Sentis cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Sourabha Bharadwaj,Karunakar Gonabattula,Sudipta Saha,Chayan Sarkar,Rekha Raja
title: Concurrent Transmission for Multi-Robot Coordination
title_zh: 多机器人协调并发传输
comment: Accepted in Robocom 2022 in conjunction with IEEE CCNC 2022
comments: Accepted in Robocom 2022 in conjunction with IEEE CCNC 2022
abstract: An efficient communication mechanism forms the backbone for any multi-robot system to achieve fruitful collaboration and coordination. Limitation in the existing asynchronous transmission based strategies in fast dissemination and aggregation compels the designers to prune down such requirements as much as possible. This also restricts the possible application areas of mobile multi-robot systems. In this work, we introduce concurrent transmission based strategy as an alternative. Despite the commonly found difficulties in concurrent transmission such as microsecond level time synchronization, hardware heterogeneity, etc., we demonstrate how it can be exploited for multi-robot systems. We propose a split architecture where the two major activities - communication and computation are carried out independently and coordinate through periodic interactions. The proposed split architecture is applied on a custom build full networked control system consisting of five two-wheel differential drive mobile robots having heterogeneous architecture. We use the proposed design in a leader-follower setting for coordinated dynamic speed variation as well as the independent formation of various shapes. Experiments show a centimeter-level spatial and millisecond-level temporal accuracy while spending very low radio duty-cycling over multi-hop communication under a wide testing area.
summary: An efficient communication mechanism forms the backbone for any multi-robot system to achieve fruitful collaboration and coordination. Limitation in the existing asynchronous transmission based strategies in fast dissemination and aggregation compels the designers to prune down such requirements as much as possible. This also restricts the possible application areas of mobile multi-robot systems. In this work, we introduce concurrent transmission based strategy as an alternative. Despite the commonly found difficulties in concurrent transmission such as microsecond level time synchronization, hardware heterogeneity, etc., we demonstrate how it can be exploited for multi-robot systems. We propose a split architecture where the two major activities - communication and computation are carried out independently and coordinate through periodic interactions. The proposed split architecture is applied on a custom build full networked control system consisting of five two-wheel differential drive mobile robots having heterogeneous architecture. We use the proposed design in a leader-follower setting for coordinated dynamic speed variation as well as the independent formation of various shapes. Experiments show a centimeter-level spatial and millisecond-level temporal accuracy while spending very low radio duty-cycling over multi-hop communication under a wide testing area.
abstract_zh: 高效的通信机制是任何多机器人系统实现富有成效的协作和协调的支柱。现有的基于异步传输的策略在快速传播和聚合方面的局限性迫使设计者尽可能地减少此类要求。这也限制了移动多机器人系统可能的应用领域。在这项工作中，我们引入基于并发传输的策略作为替代方案。尽管并发传输中普遍存在困难，例如微秒级时间同步、硬件异构性等，但我们演示了如何将其用于多机器人系统。我们提出了一种分离式架构，其中通信和计算这两项主要活动独立进行，并通过周期性交互进行协调。所提出的分体架构应用于定制的全网络控制系统，该系统由五个具有异构架构的两轮差动驱动移动机器人组成。我们在领导者-跟随者设置中使用所提出的设计，以协调动态速度变化以及各种形状的独立形成。实验表明，在广泛的测试区域下，多跳通信具有厘米级的空间精度和毫秒级的时间精度，同时花费非常低的无线电占空比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并发传输的多机器人协调策略，通过分层架构实现通信与计算的独立运行，解决现有异步传输机制的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有异步传输策略在快速信息传播与聚合方面存在不足，限制了多机器人系统的应用范围，需探索更高效的通信机制以提升协作能力。
AI.method: 设计分层架构分离通信与计算模块，通过周期性交互协调；在五台异构双轮差速机器人组成的网络控制系统中，验证领导-跟随动态速度调节与形状编队能力。
AI.result: 实验实现厘米级空间精度、毫秒级时间同步，且多跳通信下无线电使用率极低，验证了方法在复杂场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 并发传输策略结合分层架构可有效提升多机器人系统的动态协调性能，为异构机器人网络提供了高精度、低能耗的解决方案。

authors_text: Yichen Zhu,Jie Du,Yuqin Zhu,Yi Wang,Zhicai Ou,Feifei Feng,Jian Tang
title: Training BatchNorm Only in Neural Architecture Search and Beyond
title_zh: 仅在神经架构搜索及其他领域训练 BatchNorm
abstract: This work investigates the usage of batch normalization in neural architecture search (NAS). Specifically, Frankle et al. find that training BatchNorm only can achieve nontrivial performance. Furthermore, Chen et al. claim that training BatchNorm only can speed up the training of the one-shot NAS supernet over ten times. Critically, there is no effort to understand 1) why training BatchNorm only can find the perform-well architectures with the reduced supernet-training time, and 2) what is the difference between the train-BN-only supernet and the standard-train supernet. We begin by showing that the train-BN-only networks converge to the neural tangent kernel regime, obtain the same training dynamics as train all parameters theoretically. Our proof supports the claim to train BatchNorm only on supernet with less training time. Then, we empirically disclose that train-BN-only supernet provides an advantage on convolutions over other operators, cause unfair competition between architectures. This is due to only the convolution operator being attached with BatchNorm. Through experiments, we show that such unfairness makes the search algorithm prone to select models with convolutions. To solve this issue, we introduce fairness in the search space by placing a BatchNorm layer on every operator. However, we observe that the performance predictor in Chen et al. is inapplicable on the new search space. To this end, we propose a novel composite performance indicator to evaluate networks from three perspectives: expressivity, trainability, and uncertainty, derived from the theoretical property of BatchNorm. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple NAS-benchmarks (NAS-Bench101, NAS-Bench-201) and search spaces (DARTS search space and MobileNet search space).
summary: This work investigates the usage of batch normalization in neural architecture search (NAS). Specifically, Frankle et al. find that training BatchNorm only can achieve nontrivial performance. Furthermore, Chen et al. claim that training BatchNorm only can speed up the training of the one-shot NAS supernet over ten times. Critically, there is no effort to understand 1) why training BatchNorm only can find the perform-well architectures with the reduced supernet-training time, and 2) what is the difference between the train-BN-only supernet and the standard-train supernet. We begin by showing that the train-BN-only networks converge to the neural tangent kernel regime, obtain the same training dynamics as train all parameters theoretically. Our proof supports the claim to train BatchNorm only on supernet with less training time. Then, we empirically disclose that train-BN-only supernet provides an advantage on convolutions over other operators, cause unfair competition between architectures. This is due to only the convolution operator being attached with BatchNorm. Through experiments, we show that such unfairness makes the search algorithm prone to select models with convolutions. To solve this issue, we introduce fairness in the search space by placing a BatchNorm layer on every operator. However, we observe that the performance predictor in Chen et al. is inapplicable on the new search space. To this end, we propose a novel composite performance indicator to evaluate networks from three perspectives: expressivity, trainability, and uncertainty, derived from the theoretical property of BatchNorm. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple NAS-benchmarks (NAS-Bench101, NAS-Bench-201) and search spaces (DARTS search space and MobileNet search space).
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了批量归一化在神经架构搜索（NAS）中的使用。具体来说，弗兰克尔等人。发现仅训练 BatchNorm 就可以获得不平凡的性能。此外，陈等人。声称仅训练 BatchNorm 就可以将一次性 NAS 超网的训练速度加快十倍以上。重要的是，我们没有努力去理解 1) 为什么训练 BatchNorm 只能找到性能良好的架构，同时减少超网训练时间，以及 2) 仅训练 BN 的超网和标准训练超网之间的区别是什么。我们首先证明仅训练 BN 的网络收敛到神经切线核机制，获得与理论上训练所有参数相同的训练动态。我们的证据支持仅在超网上训练 BatchNorm 且训练时间更少的主张。然后，我们凭经验发现，仅训练 BN 的超网络在卷积方面比其他算子具有优势，导致架构之间的不公平竞争。这是因为只有卷积算子附加了 BatchNorm。通过实验，我们表明这种不公平性使得搜索算法倾向于选择带有卷积的模型。为了解决这个问题，我们通过在每个运算符上放置 BatchNorm 层来引入搜索空间的公平性。然而，我们观察到 Chen 等人的性能预测器。不适用于新的搜索空间。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的复合性能指标，从 BatchNorm 的理论特性得出，从三个角度评估网络：表达性、可训练性和不确定性。我们在多个 NAS 基准（NAS-Bench101、NAS-Bench-201）和搜索空间（DARTS 搜索空间和 MobileNet 搜索空间）上证明了我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在神经架构搜索（NAS）中仅训练BatchNorm层的可行性，并探讨其优势及潜在偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工作发现仅训练BatchNorm层可显著加速NAS超网络训练，但缺乏对其有效性的理论解释及与标准训练方式的差异分析。
AI.method: 理论证明仅训练BatchNorm层的网络会收敛到神经切线核 regime，与全参数训练动态一致；通过实验揭示卷积操作因绑定BatchNorm获得不公平优势，并提出在所有操作符上添加BatchNorm以增强公平性，同时设计基于表达能力、可训练性和不确定性的复合性能指标。
AI.result: 在NAS-Bench101/201等基准及DARTS/MobileNet搜索空间中验证了方法有效性，且新指标优于Chen等人原有的性能预测器。
AI.conclusion: 仅训练BatchNorm层可加速NAS但引入操作符间不公平竞争，通过操作符级BatchNorm公平化与复合性能指标设计，能更准确指导架构搜索。

This is due to only the convolution operator being attached with BatchNorm. Through experiments, we show that such unfairness makes the search algorithm prone to select models with convolutions. To solve this issue, we introduce fairness in the search space by placing a BatchNorm layer on every operator. However, we observe that the performance predictor in Chen et al. is inapplicable on the new search space. To this end, we propose a novel composite performance indicator to evaluate networks from three perspectives: expressivity, trainability, and uncertainty, derived from the theoretical property of BatchNorm. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple NAS-benchmarks (NAS-Bench101, NAS-Bench-201) and search spaces (DARTS search space and MobileNet search space). 这项工作研究了批量归一化在神经架构搜索（NAS）中的使用。具体来说，弗兰克尔等人。发现仅训练 BatchNorm 就可以获得不平凡的性能。此外，陈等人。声称仅训练 BatchNorm 就可以将一次性 NAS 超网的训练速度加快十倍以上。重要的是，我们没有努力去理解 1) 为什么训练 BatchNorm 只能找到性能良好的架构，同时减少超网训练时间，以及 2) 仅训练 BN 的超网和标准训练超网之间的区别是什么。我们首先证明仅训练 BN 的网络收敛到神经切线核机制，获得与理论上训练所有参数相同的训练动态。我们的证据支持仅在超网上训练 BatchNorm 且训练时间更少的主张。然后，我们凭经验发现，仅训练 BN 的超网络在卷积方面比其他算子具有优势，导致架构之间的不公平竞争。这是因为只有卷积算子附加了 BatchNorm。通过实验，我们表明这种不公平性使得搜索算法倾向于选择带有卷积的模型。为了解决这个问题，我们通过在每个运算符上放置 BatchNorm 层来引入搜索空间的公平性。然而，我们观察到 Chen 等人的性能预测器。不适用于新的搜索空间。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的复合性能指标，从 BatchNorm 的理论特性得出，从三个角度评估网络：表达性、可训练性和不确定性。我们在多个 NAS 基准（NAS-Bench101、NAS-Bench-201）和搜索空间（DARTS 搜索空间和 MobileNet 搜索空间）上证明了我们的方法的有效性。 本文研究在神经架构搜索（NAS）中仅训练BatchNorm层的可行性，并探讨其优势及潜在偏差问题。 Yichen Zhu,Jie Du,Yuqin Zhu,Yi Wang,Zhicai Ou,Feifei Feng,Jian Tang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Liyuan Ma,Kejie Huang,Dongxu Wei,Haibin Shen
title: GLocal: Global Graph Reasoning and Local Structure Transfer for Person Image Generation
title_zh: GLocal：用于人物图像生成的全局图推理和局部结构迁移
abstract: In this paper, we focus on person image generation, namely, generating person image under various conditions, e.g., corrupted texture or different pose. To address texture occlusion and large pose misalignment in this task, previous works just use the corresponding region's style to infer the occluded area and rely on point-wise alignment to reorganize the context texture information, lacking the ability to globally correlate the region-wise style codes and preserve the local structure of the source. To tackle these problems, we present a GLocal framework to improve the occlusion-aware texture estimation by globally reasoning the style inter-correlations among different semantic regions, which can also be employed to recover the corrupted images in texture inpainting. For local structural information preservation, we further extract the local structure of the source image and regain it in the generated image via local structure transfer. We benchmark our method to fully characterize its performance on DeepFashion dataset and present extensive ablation studies that highlight the novelty of our method.
summary: In this paper, we focus on person image generation, namely, generating person image under various conditions, e.g., corrupted texture or different pose. To address texture occlusion and large pose misalignment in this task, previous works just use the corresponding region's style to infer the occluded area and rely on point-wise alignment to reorganize the context texture information, lacking the ability to globally correlate the region-wise style codes and preserve the local structure of the source. To tackle these problems, we present a GLocal framework to improve the occlusion-aware texture estimation by globally reasoning the style inter-correlations among different semantic regions, which can also be employed to recover the corrupted images in texture inpainting. For local structural information preservation, we further extract the local structure of the source image and regain it in the generated image via local structure transfer. We benchmark our method to fully characterize its performance on DeepFashion dataset and present extensive ablation studies that highlight the novelty of our method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们专注于人物图像生成，即在各种条件下生成人物图像，例如损坏的纹理或不同的姿势。为了解决此任务中的纹理遮挡和大姿势未对齐问题，以前的工作只是使用相应区域的样式来推断遮挡区域，并依靠逐点对齐来重新组织上下文纹理信息，缺乏全局关联逐区域样式代码和保留源的局部结构的能力。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个 GLocal 框架，通过全局推理不同语义区域之间的风格相互关系来改进遮挡感知纹理估计，该框架也可以用于恢复纹理修复中损坏的图像。为了保存局部结构信息，我们进一步提取源图像的​​局部结构，并通过局部结构迁移在生成的图像中重新获得它。我们对我们的方法进行了基准测试，以充分表征其在 DeepFashion 数据集上的性能，并提出广泛的消融研究，突显我们方法的新颖性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLocal框架，通过全局图推理和局部结构迁移解决人物图像生成中的纹理遮挡和姿态不对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理纹理遮挡和大姿态变化时，仅依赖局部区域风格和点对齐方式，缺乏全局风格关联性和局部结构保持能力，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计GLocal框架，包含全局图推理模块（建模语义区域间的风格关联）和局部结构迁移模块（保留源图像局部结构特征），结合深度学习实现纹理修复与结构保持。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion数据集上验证方法有效性，通过大量消融实验证明全局风格推理和局部结构迁移的创新性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: GLocal通过融合全局语义关联与局部结构保持机制，显著提升了复杂条件下人物图像生成的质量与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Pan Li,Shaogang Gong,Chengjie Wang,Yanwei Fu
title: Ranking Distance Calibration for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 跨域小样本学习的排名距离校准
abstract: Recent progress in few-shot learning promotes a more realistic cross-domain setting, where the source and target datasets are from different domains. Due to the domain gap and disjoint label spaces between source and target datasets, their shared knowledge is extremely limited. This encourages us to explore more information in the target domain rather than to overly elaborate training strategies on the source domain as in many existing methods. Hence, we start from a generic representation pre-trained by a cross-entropy loss and a conventional distance-based classifier, along with an image retrieval view, to employ a re-ranking process for calibrating a target distance matrix by discovering the reciprocal k-nearest neighbours within the task. Assuming the pre-trained representation is biased towards the source, we construct a non-linear subspace to minimise task-irrelevant features therewithin while keep more transferrable discriminative information by a hyperbolic tangent transformation. The calibrated distance in this target-aware non-linear subspace is complementary to that in the pre-trained representation. To impose such distance calibration information onto the pre-trained representation, a Kullback-Leibler divergence loss is employed to gradually guide the model towards the calibrated distance-based distribution. Extensive evaluations on eight target domains show that this target ranking calibration process can improve conventional distance-based classifiers in few-shot learning.
summary: Recent progress in few-shot learning promotes a more realistic cross-domain setting, where the source and target datasets are from different domains. Due to the domain gap and disjoint label spaces between source and target datasets, their shared knowledge is extremely limited. This encourages us to explore more information in the target domain rather than to overly elaborate training strategies on the source domain as in many existing methods. Hence, we start from a generic representation pre-trained by a cross-entropy loss and a conventional distance-based classifier, along with an image retrieval view, to employ a re-ranking process for calibrating a target distance matrix by discovering the reciprocal k-nearest neighbours within the task. Assuming the pre-trained representation is biased towards the source, we construct a non-linear subspace to minimise task-irrelevant features therewithin while keep more transferrable discriminative information by a hyperbolic tangent transformation. The calibrated distance in this target-aware non-linear subspace is complementary to that in the pre-trained representation. To impose such distance calibration information onto the pre-trained representation, a Kullback-Leibler divergence loss is employed to gradually guide the model towards the calibrated distance-based distribution. Extensive evaluations on eight target domains show that this target ranking calibration process can improve conventional distance-based classifiers in few-shot learning.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习的最新进展促进了更现实的跨域设置，其中源数据集和目标数据集来自不同的域。由于源数据集和目标数据集之间的领域差距和不相交的标签空间，它们的共享知识极其有限。这鼓励我们在目标领域探索更多信息，而不是像许多现有方法那样在源领域过度阐述训练策略。因此，我们从通过交叉熵损失和传统的基于距离的分类器预训练的通用表示开始，以及图像检索视图，通过发现任务中的倒数 k 最近邻，采用重新排序过程来校准目标距离矩阵。假设预训练的表示偏向于源，我们构造一个非线性子空间以最小化其中与任务无关的特征，同时通过双曲正切变换保留更多可转移的判别信息。该目标感知非线性子空间中的校准距离与预训练表示中的校准距离互补。为了将这种距离校准信息强加到预先训练的表示上，采用 Kullback-Leibler 散度损失来逐渐引导模型朝向校准的基于距离的分布。对八个目标域的广泛评估表明，这种目标排名校准过程可以改进小样本学习中传统的基于距离的分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对跨域少样本学习的排名距离校准方法，通过校准目标域的距离矩阵提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 跨域少样本学习中源域和目标域存在领域差异及标签空间不重叠问题，现有方法过度依赖源域训练策略，而目标域信息利用不足。
AI.method: 基于预训练表示，通过重排序过程校准目标域距离矩阵，构建非线性子空间消除无关特征，并利用KL散度损失将校准距离信息注入预训练模型。
AI.result: 在八个目标域数据集上实验表明，该方法有效提升了传统距离基分类器的跨域少样本学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦目标域距离校准而非源域优化，该方法为跨域少样本学习提供了更有效的知识迁移路径。

authors_text: Hongmin Gao,Zhonghao Chen,Chenming Li
title: Shallow Network Based on Depthwise Over-Parameterized Convolution for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 基于深度超参数化卷积的浅层网络高光谱图像分类
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) techniques have gained popularity as a tool for hyperspectral image classification (HSIC). To improve the feature extraction efficiency of HSIC under the condition of limited samples, the current methods generally use deep models with plenty of layers. However, deep network models are prone to overfitting and gradient vanishing problems when samples are limited. In addition, the spatial resolution decreases severely with deeper depth, which is very detrimental to spatial edge feature extraction. Therefore, this letter proposes a shallow model for HSIC, which is called depthwise over-parameterized convolutional neural network (DOCNN). To ensure the effective extraction of the shallow model, the depthwise over-parameterized convolution (DO-Conv) kernel is introduced to extract the discriminative features. The depthwise over-parameterized Convolution kernel is composed of a standard convolution kernel and a depthwise convolution kernel, which can extract the spatial feature of the different channels individually and fuse the spatial features of the whole channels simultaneously. Moreover, to further reduce the loss of spatial edge features due to the convolution operation, a dense residual connection (DRC) structure is proposed to apply to the feature extraction part of the whole network. Experimental results obtained from three benchmark data sets show that the proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and computational efficiency.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) techniques have gained popularity as a tool for hyperspectral image classification (HSIC). To improve the feature extraction efficiency of HSIC under the condition of limited samples, the current methods generally use deep models with plenty of layers. However, deep network models are prone to overfitting and gradient vanishing problems when samples are limited. In addition, the spatial resolution decreases severely with deeper depth, which is very detrimental to spatial edge feature extraction. Therefore, this letter proposes a shallow model for HSIC, which is called depthwise over-parameterized convolutional neural network (DOCNN). To ensure the effective extraction of the shallow model, the depthwise over-parameterized convolution (DO-Conv) kernel is introduced to extract the discriminative features. The depthwise over-parameterized Convolution kernel is composed of a standard convolution kernel and a depthwise convolution kernel, which can extract the spatial feature of the different channels individually and fuse the spatial features of the whole channels simultaneously. Moreover, to further reduce the loss of spatial edge features due to the convolution operation, a dense residual connection (DRC) structure is proposed to apply to the feature extraction part of the whole network. Experimental results obtained from three benchmark data sets show that the proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）技术作为高光谱图像分类（HSIC）的工具而受到欢迎。为了在样本有限的情况下提高HSIC的特征提取效率，目前的方法通常使用多层的深度模型。然而，深度网络模型在样本有限的情况下容易出现过拟合和梯度消失的问题。此外，随着深度的加深，空间分辨率严重下降，这对空间边缘特征提取非常不利。因此，这封信提出了HSIC的浅层模型，称为深度超参数化卷积神经网络（DOCNN）。为了保证浅层模型的有效提取，引入深度超参数化卷积（DO-Conv）内核来提取判别特征。深度超参数化卷积核由标准卷积核和深度卷积核组成，可以单独提取不同通道的空间特征，同时融合整个通道的空间特征。此外，为了进一步减少卷积运算造成的空间边缘特征的损失，提出了一种密集残差连接（DRC）结构应用于整个网络的特征提取部分。从三个基准数据集获得的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在分类精度和计算效率方面优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度可分离过参数化卷积的浅层网络模型（DOCNN），用于高光谱图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度CNN在高光谱图像分类中易出现过拟合、梯度消失及空间分辨率下降问题，而浅层模型能有效缓解这些问题并提升计算效率。
AI.method: 设计深度可分离过参数化卷积核（DO-Conv），结合标准卷积与深度卷积分支分别提取通道级空间特征并融合；引入密集残差连接（DRC）结构以减少卷积操作对边缘特征的损失。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，DOCNN在分类准确率和计算效率方面均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 浅层DOCNN通过创新卷积结构和残差连接设计，在高光谱图像分类中实现了性能与效率的平衡。

search_text: Shallow Network Based on Depthwise Over-Parameterized Convolution for Hyperspectral Image Classification 基于深度超参数化卷积的浅层网络高光谱图像分类 Recently, convolutional neural network (CNN) techniques have gained popularity as a tool for hyperspectral image classification (HSIC). To improve the feature extraction efficiency of HSIC under the condition of limited samples, the current methods generally use deep models with plenty of layers. However, deep network models are prone to overfitting and gradient vanishing problems when samples are limited. In addition, the spatial resolution decreases severely with deeper depth, which is very detrimental to spatial edge feature extraction. Therefore, this letter proposes a shallow model for HSIC, which is called depthwise over-parameterized convolutional neural network (DOCNN). To ensure the effective extraction of the shallow model, the depthwise over-parameterized convolution (DO-Conv) kernel is introduced to extract the discriminative features. The depthwise over-parameterized Convolution kernel is composed of a standard convolution kernel and a depthwise convolution kernel, which can extract the spatial feature of the different channels individually and fuse the spatial features of the whole channels simultaneously. Moreover, to further reduce the loss of spatial edge features due to the convolution operation, a dense residual connection (DRC) structure is proposed to apply to the feature extraction part of the whole network. Experimental results obtained from three benchmark data sets show that the proposed method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and computational efficiency. 最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）技术作为高光谱图像分类（HSIC）的工具而受到欢迎。为了在样本有限的情况下提高HSIC的特征提取效率，目前的方法通常使用多层的深度模型。然而，深度网络模型在样本有限的情况下容易出现过拟合和梯度消失的问题。此外，随着深度的加深，空间分辨率严重下降，这对空间边缘特征提取非常不利。因此，这封信提出了HSIC的浅层模型，称为深度超参数化卷积神经网络（DOCNN）。为了保证浅层模型的有效提取，引入深度超参数化卷积（DO-Conv）内核来提取判别特征。深度超参数化卷积核由标准卷积核和深度卷积核组成，可以单独提取不同通道的空间特征，同时融合整个通道的空间特征。此外，为了进一步减少卷积运算造成的空间边缘特征的损失，提出了一种密集残差连接（DRC）结构应用于整个网络的特征提取部分。从三个基准数据集获得的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在分类精度和计算效率方面优于其他最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种基于深度可分离过参数化卷积的浅层网络模型（DOCNN），用于高光谱图像分类任务。 Hongmin Gao,Zhonghao Chen,Chenming Li cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Gouhei Tanaka,Ryosho Nakane
title: Simulation platform for pattern recognition based on reservoir computing with memristor networks
title_zh: 基于忆阻网络储层计算的模式识别仿真平台
abstract: Memristive systems and devices are potentially available for implementing reservoir computing (RC) systems applied to pattern recognition. However, the computational ability of memristive RC systems depends on intertwined factors such as system architectures and physical properties of memristive elements, which complicates identifying the key factor for system performance. Here we develop a simulation platform for RC with memristor device networks, which enables testing different system designs for performance improvement. Numerical simulations show that the memristor-network-based RC systems can yield high computational performance comparable to that of state-of-the-art methods in three time series classification tasks. We demonstrate that the excellent and robust computation under device-to-device variability can be achieved by appropriately setting network structures, nonlinearity of memristors, and pre/post-processing, which increases the potential for reliable computation with unreliable component devices. Our results contribute to an establishment of a design guide for memristive reservoirs toward a realization of energy-efficient machine learning hardware.
summary: Memristive systems and devices are potentially available for implementing reservoir computing (RC) systems applied to pattern recognition. However, the computational ability of memristive RC systems depends on intertwined factors such as system architectures and physical properties of memristive elements, which complicates identifying the key factor for system performance. Here we develop a simulation platform for RC with memristor device networks, which enables testing different system designs for performance improvement. Numerical simulations show that the memristor-network-based RC systems can yield high computational performance comparable to that of state-of-the-art methods in three time series classification tasks. We demonstrate that the excellent and robust computation under device-to-device variability can be achieved by appropriately setting network structures, nonlinearity of memristors, and pre/post-processing, which increases the potential for reliable computation with unreliable component devices. Our results contribute to an establishment of a design guide for memristive reservoirs toward a realization of energy-efficient machine learning hardware.
abstract_zh: 忆阻系统和设备有可能用于实现应用于模式识别的储层计算（RC）系统。然而，忆阻 RC 系统的计算能力取决于系统架构和忆阻元件的物理特性等相互交织的因素，这使得确定系统性能的关键因素变得复杂。在这里，我们开发了一个带有忆阻器器件网络的 RC 仿真平台，可以测试不同的系统设计以提高性能。数值模拟表明，在三个时间序列分类任务中，基于忆阻器网络的 RC 系统可以产生与最先进的方法相当的高计算性能。我们证明，通过适当设置网络结构、忆阻器的非线性以及前/后处理，可以实现设备间可变性下的出色且鲁棒的计算，这增加了使用不可靠的组件设备进行可靠计算的潜力。我们的研究结果有助于建立忆阻储层的设计指南，以实现节能的机器学习硬件。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于忆阻器网络的储层计算模拟平台，用于模式识别。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器系统和器件在实现储层计算系统方面具有潜力，但其计算能力受到系统架构和忆阻器物理性质等复杂因素的影响，因此需要明确影响系统性能的关键因素。
AI.method: 开发了一个用于储层计算的模拟平台，通过测试不同的系统设计来提升性能，并通过数值模拟验证了忆阻器网络在时间序列分类任务中的计算能力。
AI.result: 结果表明，基于忆阻器网络的储层计算系统在三个时间序列分类任务中表现出与最先进方法相当的计算性能，并且通过适当设置网络结构、忆阻器非线性及预/后处理可以实现鲁棒计算。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为设计可靠的忆阻器储层提供了指导，有助于实现高效的机器学习硬件。

authors_text: Yian Wang,Ruihai Wu,Kaichun Mo,Jiaqi Ke,Qingnan Fan,Leonidas Guibas,Hao Dong
title: AdaAfford: Learning to Adapt Manipulation Affordance for 3D Articulated Objects via Few-shot Interactions
title_zh: AdaAfford：通过少镜头交互学习调整 3D 铰接对象的操作功能可供性
abstract: Perceiving and interacting with 3D articulated objects, such as cabinets, doors, and faucets, pose particular challenges for future home-assistant robots performing daily tasks in human environments. Besides parsing the articulated parts and joint parameters, researchers recently advocate learning manipulation affordance over the input shape geometry which is more task-aware and geometrically fine-grained. However, taking only passive observations as inputs, these methods ignore many hidden but important kinematic constraints (e.g., joint location and limits) and dynamic factors (e.g., joint friction and restitution), therefore losing significant accuracy for test cases with such uncertainties. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, named AdaAfford, that learns to perform very few test-time interactions for quickly adapting the affordance priors to more accurate instance-specific posteriors. We conduct large-scale experiments using the PartNet-Mobility dataset and prove that our system performs better than baselines.
summary: Perceiving and interacting with 3D articulated objects, such as cabinets, doors, and faucets, pose particular challenges for future home-assistant robots performing daily tasks in human environments. Besides parsing the articulated parts and joint parameters, researchers recently advocate learning manipulation affordance over the input shape geometry which is more task-aware and geometrically fine-grained. However, taking only passive observations as inputs, these methods ignore many hidden but important kinematic constraints (e.g., joint location and limits) and dynamic factors (e.g., joint friction and restitution), therefore losing significant accuracy for test cases with such uncertainties. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, named AdaAfford, that learns to perform very few test-time interactions for quickly adapting the affordance priors to more accurate instance-specific posteriors. We conduct large-scale experiments using the PartNet-Mobility dataset and prove that our system performs better than baselines.
abstract_zh: 感知 3D 铰接物体（例如橱柜、门和水龙头）并与之交互，对于未来在人类环境中执行日常任务的家庭助理机器人提出了特殊的挑战。除了解析铰接零件和关节参数之外，研究人员最近提倡学习对输入形状几何图形的操作可供性，这种几何形状更具任务意识且几何粒度更细。然而，这些方法仅以被动观测作为输入，忽略了许多隐藏但重要的运动学约束（例如关节位置和限制）和动态因素（例如关节摩擦和恢复），因此对于具有此类不确定性的测试用例失去了显着的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 AdaAfford 的新颖框架，它学习执行很少的测试时交互，以快速使可供性先验适应更准确的特定于实例的后验。我们使用 PartNet-Mobility 数据集进行大规模实验，并证明我们的系统性能优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaAfford框架，通过少量测试时交互快速适应3D关节物体的操作性，以提高机器人操作准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖被动观察，忽略关节运动学约束和动态因素（如摩擦力），导致在存在不确定性的测试案例中准确性不足。
AI.method: 设计AdaAfford框架，利用测试时的少量交互数据，动态调整操作性先验至更精确的实例后验分布。
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility数据集上实验表明，AdaAfford优于基线方法，显著提升操作准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过少量交互适应操作性先验，可有效提升家庭助手机器人对3D关节物体的操控性能。

search_text: AdaAfford: Learning to Adapt Manipulation Affordance for 3D Articulated Objects via Few-shot Interactions AdaAfford：通过少镜头交互学习调整 3D 铰接对象的操作功能可供性 Perceiving and interacting with 3D articulated objects, such as cabinets, doors, and faucets, pose particular challenges for future home-assistant robots performing daily tasks in human environments. Besides parsing the articulated parts and joint parameters, researchers recently advocate learning manipulation affordance over the input shape geometry which is more task-aware and geometrically fine-grained. However, taking only passive observations as inputs, these methods ignore many hidden but important kinematic constraints (e.g., joint location and limits) and dynamic factors (e.g., joint friction and restitution), therefore losing significant accuracy for test cases with such uncertainties. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, named AdaAfford, that learns to perform very few test-time interactions for quickly adapting the affordance priors to more accurate instance-specific posteriors. We conduct large-scale experiments using the PartNet-Mobility dataset and prove that our system performs better than baselines. 感知 3D 铰接物体（例如橱柜、门和水龙头）并与之交互，对于未来在人类环境中执行日常任务的家庭助理机器人提出了特殊的挑战。除了解析铰接零件和关节参数之外，研究人员最近提倡学习对输入形状几何图形的操作可供性，这种几何形状更具任务意识且几何粒度更细。然而，这些方法仅以被动观测作为输入，忽略了许多隐藏但重要的运动学约束（例如关节位置和限制）和动态因素（例如关节摩擦和恢复），因此对于具有此类不确定性的测试用例失去了显着的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 AdaAfford 的新颖框架，它学习执行很少的测试时交互，以快速使可供性先验适应更准确的特定于实例的后验。我们使用 PartNet-Mobility 数据集进行大规模实验，并证明我们的系统性能优于基线。 本文提出AdaAfford框架，通过少量测试时交互快速适应3D关节物体的操作性，以提高机器人操作准确性。 Yian Wang,Ruihai Wu,Kaichun Mo,Jiaqi Ke,Qingnan Fan,Leonidas Guibas,Hao Dong cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Noah Stier,Alexander Rich,Pradeep Sen,Tobias Höllerer
title: VoRTX: Volumetric 3D Reconstruction With Transformers for Voxelwise View Selection and Fusion
title_zh: VoRTX：使用 Transformers 进行体积 3D 重建，用于体素视图选择和融合
abstract: Recent volumetric 3D reconstruction methods can produce very accurate results, with plausible geometry even for unobserved surfaces. However, they face an undesirable trade-off when it comes to multi-view fusion. They can fuse all available view information by global averaging, thus losing fine detail, or they can heuristically cluster views for local fusion, thus restricting their ability to consider all views jointly. Our key insight is that greater detail can be retained without restricting view diversity by learning a view-fusion function conditioned on camera pose and image content. We propose to learn this multi-view fusion using a transformer. To this end, we introduce VoRTX, an end-to-end volumetric 3D reconstruction network using transformers for wide-baseline, multi-view feature fusion. Our model is occlusion-aware, leveraging the transformer architecture to predict an initial, projective scene geometry estimate. This estimate is used to avoid backprojecting image features through surfaces into occluded regions. We train our model on ScanNet and show that it produces better reconstructions than state-of-the-art methods. We also demonstrate generalization without any fine-tuning, outperforming the same state-of-the-art methods on two other datasets, TUM-RGBD and ICL-NUIM.
summary: Recent volumetric 3D reconstruction methods can produce very accurate results, with plausible geometry even for unobserved surfaces. However, they face an undesirable trade-off when it comes to multi-view fusion. They can fuse all available view information by global averaging, thus losing fine detail, or they can heuristically cluster views for local fusion, thus restricting their ability to consider all views jointly. Our key insight is that greater detail can be retained without restricting view diversity by learning a view-fusion function conditioned on camera pose and image content. We propose to learn this multi-view fusion using a transformer. To this end, we introduce VoRTX, an end-to-end volumetric 3D reconstruction network using transformers for wide-baseline, multi-view feature fusion. Our model is occlusion-aware, leveraging the transformer architecture to predict an initial, projective scene geometry estimate. This estimate is used to avoid backprojecting image features through surfaces into occluded regions. We train our model on ScanNet and show that it produces better reconstructions than state-of-the-art methods. We also demonstrate generalization without any fine-tuning, outperforming the same state-of-the-art methods on two other datasets, TUM-RGBD and ICL-NUIM.
abstract_zh: 最近的体积 3D 重建方法可以产生非常准确的结果，即使对于未观察到的表面也具有合理的几何形状。然而，在多视图融合方面，他们面临着不良的权衡。他们可以通过全局平均来融合所有可用的视图信息，从而丢失精细细节，或者他们可以启发式地聚类视图以进行局部融合，从而限制了他们共同考虑所有视图的能力。我们的主要见解是，通过学习以相机姿势和图像内容为条件的视图融合函数，可以在不限制视图多样性的情况下保留更多细节。我们建议使用变压器来学习这种多视图融合。为此，我们引入了 VoRTX，这是一种端到端体积 3D 重建网络，使用 Transformer 进行宽基线、多视图特征融合。我们的模型具有遮挡感知能力，利用 Transformer 架构来预测初始的投影场景几何估计。该估计用于避免将图像特征通过表面反投影到遮挡区域。我们在 ScanNet 上训练我们的模型，并表明它比最先进的方法能产生更好的重建效果。我们还展示了无需任何微调的泛化能力，在另外两个数据集 TUM-RGBD 和 ICL-NUIM 上的表现优于相同的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoRTX，一种基于Transformer的体素级三维重建方法，通过视角选择和融合解决多视角重建中的细节丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多视角融合时面临全局平均丢失细节与局部聚类限制视角联合考虑的权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的视角融合函数，结合相机姿态与图像内容，利用遮挡感知机制避免特征误投影，实现端到端重建。
AI.result: 在ScanNet、TUM-RGBD和ICL-NUIM数据集上均优于现有方法，且无需微调即可泛化。
AI.conclusion: VoRTX通过Transformer有效融合多视角信息，在保持细节与视角多样性间取得平衡，验证了方法的优越性与通用性。

authors_text: Kaihao Zhang,Tao Wang,Wenhan Luo,Boheng Chen,Wenqi Ren,Bjorn Stenger,Wei Liu,Hongdong Li,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: MC-Blur: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Image Deblurring
title_zh: MC-Blur：图像去模糊的综合基准
abstract: Blur artifacts can seriously degrade the visual quality of images, and numerous deblurring methods have been proposed for specific scenarios. However, in most real-world images, blur is caused by different factors, e.g., motion and defocus. In this paper, we address how different deblurring methods perform in the case of multiple types of blur. For in-depth performance evaluation, we construct a new large-scale multi-cause image deblurring dataset (called MC-Blur), including real-world and synthesized blurry images with mixed factors of blurs. The images in the proposed MC-Blur dataset are collected using different techniques: averaging sharp images captured by a 1000-fps high-speed camera, convolving Ultra-High-Definition (UHD) sharp images with large-size kernels, adding defocus to images, and real-world blurry images captured by various camera models. Based on the MC-Blur dataset, we conduct extensive benchmarking studies to compare SOTA methods in different scenarios, analyze their efficiency, and investigate the built dataset's capacity. These benchmarking results provide a comprehensive overview of the advantages and limitations of current deblurring methods, and reveal the advances of our dataset.
summary: Blur artifacts can seriously degrade the visual quality of images, and numerous deblurring methods have been proposed for specific scenarios. However, in most real-world images, blur is caused by different factors, e.g., motion and defocus. In this paper, we address how different deblurring methods perform in the case of multiple types of blur. For in-depth performance evaluation, we construct a new large-scale multi-cause image deblurring dataset (called MC-Blur), including real-world and synthesized blurry images with mixed factors of blurs. The images in the proposed MC-Blur dataset are collected using different techniques: averaging sharp images captured by a 1000-fps high-speed camera, convolving Ultra-High-Definition (UHD) sharp images with large-size kernels, adding defocus to images, and real-world blurry images captured by various camera models. Based on the MC-Blur dataset, we conduct extensive benchmarking studies to compare SOTA methods in different scenarios, analyze their efficiency, and investigate the built dataset's capacity. These benchmarking results provide a comprehensive overview of the advantages and limitations of current deblurring methods, and reveal the advances of our dataset.
abstract_zh: 模糊伪影会严重降低图像的视觉质量，并且针对特定场景提出了多种去模糊方法。然而，在大多数现实世界的图像中，模糊是由不同因素引起的，例如运动和散焦。在本文中，我们讨论了不同的去模糊方法在多种类型模糊的情况下如何执行。为了进行深入的性能评估，我们构建了一个新的大规模多原因图像去模糊数据集（称为 MC-Blur），包括真实世界和具有混合模糊因素的合成模糊图像。所提出的 MC-Blur 数据集中的图像是使用不同的技术收集的：对 1000 fps 高速相机捕获的清晰图像进行平均，将超高清 (UHD) 清晰图像与大尺寸内核进行卷积，向图像添加散焦，以及由各种相机模型捕获的真实世界模糊图像。基于 MC-Blur 数据集，我们进行了广泛的基准测试研究，以比较不同场景下的 SOTA 方法，分析其效率，并调查构建的数据集的容量。这些基准测试结果全面概述了当前去模糊方法的优点和局限性，并揭示了我们数据集的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MC-Blur数据集，用于全面评估多因素图像去模糊方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊方法多针对单一场景，但实际图像模糊常由多种因素（如运动、散焦）混合导致，缺乏综合评估基准。
AI.method: 构建包含真实和合成模糊图像的MC-Blur数据集，通过高速摄像机拍摄、UHD图像卷积、散焦模拟及多设备采集等方法生成混合模糊样本。
AI.result: 基于该数据集对SOTA方法进行基准测试，分析其效率与性能，揭示当前方法在多因素模糊场景下的优劣势。
AI.conclusion: MC-Blur数据集为研究多因素图像去模糊提供了全面基准，推动了更鲁棒算法的发展。

These benchmarking results provide a comprehensive overview of the advantages and limitations of current deblurring methods, and reveal the advances of our dataset. 模糊伪影会严重降低图像的视觉质量，并且针对特定场景提出了多种去模糊方法。然而，在大多数现实世界的图像中，模糊是由不同因素引起的，例如运动和散焦。在本文中，我们讨论了不同的去模糊方法在多种类型模糊的情况下如何执行。为了进行深入的性能评估，我们构建了一个新的大规模多原因图像去模糊数据集（称为 MC-Blur），包括真实世界和具有混合模糊因素的合成模糊图像。所提出的 MC-Blur 数据集中的图像是使用不同的技术收集的：对 1000 fps 高速相机捕获的清晰图像进行平均，将超高清 (UHD) 清晰图像与大尺寸内核进行卷积，向图像添加散焦，以及由各种相机模型捕获的真实世界模糊图像。基于 MC-Blur 数据集，我们进行了广泛的基准测试研究，以比较不同场景下的 SOTA 方法，分析其效率，并调查构建的数据集的容量。这些基准测试结果全面概述了当前去模糊方法的优点和局限性，并揭示了我们数据集的进步。 本文提出MC-Blur数据集，用于全面评估多因素图像去模糊方法的性能。 Kaihao Zhang,Tao Wang,Wenhan Luo,Boheng Chen,Wenqi Ren,Bjorn Stenger,Wei Liu,Hongdong Li,Ming-Hsuan Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Weise,Zhize Wu,Xinlu Li,Yan Chen,Jörg Lässig
title: Frequency Fitness Assignment: Optimization without Bias for Good Solutions can be Efficient
title_zh: 频率适应度分配：无偏见的优化可以提高良好解决方案的效率
abstract: A fitness assignment process transforms the features (such as the objective value) of a candidate solution to a scalar fitness, which then is the basis for selection. Under Frequency Fitness Assignment (FFA), the fitness corresponding to an objective value is its encounter frequency in selection steps and is subject to minimization. FFA creates algorithms that are not biased towards better solutions and are invariant under all injective transformations of the objective function value. We investigate the impact of FFA on the performance of two theory-inspired, state-of-the-art EAs, the Greedy (2+1) GA and the Self-Adjusting (1+(lambda,lambda)) GA. FFA improves their performance significantly on some problems that are hard for them. In our experiments, one FFA-based algorithm exhibited mean runtimes that appear to be polynomial on the theory-based benchmark problems in our study, including traps, jumps, and plateaus. We propose two hybrid approaches that use both direct and FFA-based optimization and find that they perform well. All FFA-based algorithms also perform better on satisfiability problems than any of the pure algorithm variants.
summary: A fitness assignment process transforms the features (such as the objective value) of a candidate solution to a scalar fitness, which then is the basis for selection. Under Frequency Fitness Assignment (FFA), the fitness corresponding to an objective value is its encounter frequency in selection steps and is subject to minimization. FFA creates algorithms that are not biased towards better solutions and are invariant under all injective transformations of the objective function value. We investigate the impact of FFA on the performance of two theory-inspired, state-of-the-art EAs, the Greedy (2+1) GA and the Self-Adjusting (1+(lambda,lambda)) GA. FFA improves their performance significantly on some problems that are hard for them. In our experiments, one FFA-based algorithm exhibited mean runtimes that appear to be polynomial on the theory-based benchmark problems in our study, including traps, jumps, and plateaus. We propose two hybrid approaches that use both direct and FFA-based optimization and find that they perform well. All FFA-based algorithms also perform better on satisfiability problems than any of the pure algorithm variants.
abstract_zh: 适应度分配过程将候选解决方案的特征（例如目标值）转换为标量适应度，然后作为选择的基础。在频率适应度分配（FFA）下，目标值对应的适应度是其在选择步骤中的遇到频率，并且会被最小化。 FFA 创建的算法不偏向于更好的解决方案，并且在目标函数值的所有单射变换下保持不变。我们研究了 FFA 对两种受理论启发的最先进 EA（贪婪 (2+1) GA 和自调整 (1+(lambda,lambda)) GA 性能的影响。 FFA 显着提高了他们在一些对他们来说很难的问题上的表现。在我们的实验中，一种基于 FFA 的算法表现出的平均运行时间似乎是我们研究中基于理论的基准问题的多项式，包括陷阱、跳跃和平台。我们提出了两种使用直接优化和基于 FFA 的优化的混合方法，并发现它们表现良好。所有基于 FFA 的算法在可满足性问题上也比任何纯算法变体表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为频率适应度分配（FFA）的适应度分配方法，并研究其对进化算法（EA）性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统适应度分配可能偏向优质解，而FFA通过频率统计实现无偏分配，且对目标函数的可逆变换保持不变，有望提升算法鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计FFA机制，将其集成到两种理论驱动的EA（Greedy (2+1) GA和Self-Adjusting (1+(λ,λ)) GA）中，并通过基准测试与混合优化方法验证效果。
AI.result: FFA显著提升了算法在陷阱、跳跃和高原问题上的表现，部分场景下均值运行时间呈多项式级别，混合方法在可满足性问题上优于纯算法变体。
AI.conclusion: FFA通过无偏适应度分配有效优化了EA性能，混合策略进一步增强了算法在复杂问题中的实用性。

authors_text: Taotao Zhou,Xiaoge Zhang,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Ali Mosleh
title: A generic physics-informed neural network-based framework for reliability assessment of multi-state systems
title_zh: 一种基于物理信息的通用神经网络框架，用于多状态系统的可靠性评估
abstract: In this paper, we leverage the recent advances in physics-informed neural network (PINN) and develop a generic PINN-based framework to assess the reliability of multi-state systems (MSSs). The proposed methodology consists of two major steps. In the first step, we recast the reliability assessment of MSS as a machine learning problem using the framework of PINN. A feedforward neural network with two individual loss groups are constructed to encode the initial condition and state transitions governed by ordinary differential equations (ODEs) in MSS. Next, we tackle the problem of high imbalance in the magnitude of the back-propagated gradients in PINN from a multi-task learning perspective. Particularly, we treat each element in the loss function as an individual task, and adopt a gradient surgery approach named projecting conflicting gradients (PCGrad), where a task's gradient is projected onto the norm plane of any other task that has a conflicting gradient. The gradient projection operation significantly mitigates the detrimental effects caused by the gradient interference when training PINN, thus accelerating the convergence speed of PINN to high-precision solutions to MSS reliability assessment. With the proposed PINN-based framework, we investigate its applications for MSS reliability assessment in several different contexts in terms of time-independent or dependent state transitions and system scales varying from small to medium. The results demonstrate that the proposed PINN-based framework shows generic and remarkable performance in MSS reliability assessment, and the incorporation of PCGrad in PINN leads to substantial improvement in solution quality and convergence speed.
summary: In this paper, we leverage the recent advances in physics-informed neural network (PINN) and develop a generic PINN-based framework to assess the reliability of multi-state systems (MSSs). The proposed methodology consists of two major steps. In the first step, we recast the reliability assessment of MSS as a machine learning problem using the framework of PINN. A feedforward neural network with two individual loss groups are constructed to encode the initial condition and state transitions governed by ordinary differential equations (ODEs) in MSS. Next, we tackle the problem of high imbalance in the magnitude of the back-propagated gradients in PINN from a multi-task learning perspective. Particularly, we treat each element in the loss function as an individual task, and adopt a gradient surgery approach named projecting conflicting gradients (PCGrad), where a task's gradient is projected onto the norm plane of any other task that has a conflicting gradient. The gradient projection operation significantly mitigates the detrimental effects caused by the gradient interference when training PINN, thus accelerating the convergence speed of PINN to high-precision solutions to MSS reliability assessment. With the proposed PINN-based framework, we investigate its applications for MSS reliability assessment in several different contexts in terms of time-independent or dependent state transitions and system scales varying from small to medium. The results demonstrate that the proposed PINN-based framework shows generic and remarkable performance in MSS reliability assessment, and the incorporation of PCGrad in PINN leads to substantial improvement in solution quality and convergence speed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 的最新进展，开发了一个基于 PINN 的通用框架来评估多状态系统 (MSS) 的可靠性。所提出的方法由两个主要步骤组成。第一步，我们使用 PINN 框架将 MSS 的可靠性评估重新定义为机器学习问题。构建具有两个单独损失组的前馈神经网络，以对 MSS 中常微分方程 (ODE) 控制的初始条件和状态转换进行编码。接下来，我们从多任务学习的角度解决 PINN 中反向传播梯度大小高度不平衡的问题。特别是，我们将损失函数中的每个元素视为单独的任务，并采用名为投影冲突梯度（PCGrad）的梯度手术方法，其中任务的梯度被投影到具有冲突梯度的任何其他任务的标准平面上。梯度投影操作显着减轻了训练PINN时梯度干扰造成的不利影响，从而加快了PINN收敛到MSS可靠性评估高精度解的速度。通过所提出的基于 PINN 的框架，我们研究了其在与时间无关或相关的状态转换以及从小到中不同的系统规模方面在几种不同环境下的 MSS 可靠性评估的应用。结果表明，所提出的基于 PINN 的框架在 MSS 可靠性评估中表现出通用且卓越的性能，并且将 PCGrad 纳入 PINN 可以显着提高解决方案质量和收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的通用框架，用于评估多状态系统的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 多状态系统（MSS）的可靠性评估具有挑战性，传统方法在处理复杂系统和状态转移时存在局限性，因此需要一种更高效和通用的方法。
AI.method: 作者将MSS的可靠性评估问题转化为机器学习问题，并构建了一个具有两个损失组的前馈神经网络，以编码初始条件和由常微分方程（ODEs）控制的状态转移。同时，采用多任务学习的视角，通过梯度手术方法（PCGrad）解决PINN中梯度不平衡问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的基于PINN的框架在多种情境下表现出良好的通用性和显著的性能提升，尤其是在结合PCGrad后，显著提高了解的质量和收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于PINN的框架为多状态系统的可靠性评估提供了一种高效、通用的解决方案，并通过引入PCGrad显著提升了模型的性能。

The gradient projection operation significantly mitigates the detrimental effects caused by the gradient interference when training PINN, thus accelerating the convergence speed of PINN to high-precision solutions to MSS reliability assessment. With the proposed PINN-based framework, we investigate its applications for MSS reliability assessment in several different contexts in terms of time-independent or dependent state transitions and system scales varying from small to medium. The results demonstrate that the proposed PINN-based framework shows generic and remarkable performance in MSS reliability assessment, and the incorporation of PCGrad in PINN leads to substantial improvement in solution quality and convergence speed. 在本文中，我们利用物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 的最新进展，开发了一个基于 PINN 的通用框架来评估多状态系统 (MSS) 的可靠性。所提出的方法由两个主要步骤组成。第一步，我们使用 PINN 框架将 MSS 的可靠性评估重新定义为机器学习问题。构建具有两个单独损失组的前馈神经网络，以对 MSS 中常微分方程 (ODE) 控制的初始条件和状态转换进行编码。接下来，我们从多任务学习的角度解决 PINN 中反向传播梯度大小高度不平衡的问题。特别是，我们将损失函数中的每个元素视为单独的任务，并采用名为投影冲突梯度（PCGrad）的梯度手术方法，其中任务的梯度被投影到具有冲突梯度的任何其他任务的标准平面上。梯度投影操作显着减轻了训练PINN时梯度干扰造成的不利影响，从而加快了PINN收敛到MSS可靠性评估高精度解的速度。通过所提出的基于 PINN 的框架，我们研究了其在与时间无关或相关的状态转换以及从小到中不同的系统规模方面在几种不同环境下的 MSS 可靠性评估的应用。结果表明，所提出的基于 PINN 的框架在 MSS 可靠性评估中表现出通用且卓越的性能，并且将 PCGrad 纳入 PINN 可以显着提高解决方案质量和收敛速度。 本文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的通用框架，用于评估多状态系统的可靠性。 Taotao Zhou,Xiaoge Zhang,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Ali Mosleh cs.LG,cs.AI
